quote_en: 我爱妈妈。 Wǒ ài māma.
ex_en: 爸爸爱喝茶，妈妈爱看书，我爱学习中文，大家都爱我们的家。 Bàba ài hē chá, māma ài kàn shū, wǒ ài xuéxí Zhōngwén, dàjiā dōu ài wǒmen de jiā.
ex_zh: Dad loves drinking tea, Mum loves reading, I love studying Chinese, and everyone loves our home.

quote_en: 我的爱好是看书。 Wǒ de ài hào shì kàn shū.
ex_en: 哥哥的爱好是打球，弟弟的爱好是游泳，妹妹的爱好是唱歌，我的爱好是学习汉语。 Gēge de ài hào shì dǎ qiú, dìdi de ài hào shì yóuyǒng, mèimei de ài hào shì chàng gē, wǒ de ài hào shì xuéxí Hànyǔ.
ex_zh: Older brother's hobby is playing ball games, younger brother's hobby is swimming, younger sister's hobby is singing, and my hobby is studying Chinese.

quote_en: 现在八点。 Xiànzài bā diǎn.
ex_en: 我们家有八个人：爷爷、奶奶、爸爸、妈妈、哥哥、姐姐、妹妹和我。 Wǒmen jiā yǒu bā ge rén: yéye, nǎinai, bàba, māma, gēge, jiějie, mèimei hé wǒ.
ex_zh: There are eight people in our family: grandfather, grandmother, dad, mum, older brother, older sister, younger sister, and me.

quote_en: 爸爸在工作。 Bàba zài gōngzuò.
ex_en: 爸爸每天早上六点起床，七点开车上班，下午五点下班回家，晚上陪我们吃饭。 Bàba měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn qǐchuáng, qī diǎn kāi chē shàngbān, xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn xiàbān huíjiā, wǎnshang péi wǒmen chī fàn.
ex_zh: Dad gets up at six every morning, drives to work at seven, finishes work and comes home at five in the afternoon, and has dinner with us in the evening.

quote_en: 她喜欢白色。 Tā xǐhuan bái sè.
ex_en: 新娘穿白色婚纱，医生穿白色大褂，雪也是白色的，我的校服是白色上衣和黑色裤子。 Xīnniáng chuān bái sè hūnshā, yīshēng chuān bái sè dà guà, xuě yě shì bái sè de, wǒ de xiàofú shì bái sè shàngyī hé hēi sè kùzi.
ex_zh: Brides wear white wedding dresses, doctors wear white coats, snow is also white, and my school uniform is a white top with black trousers.

quote_en: 这本书一百元。 Zhè běn shū yī bǎi yuán.
quote_zh: This book costs one hundred yuan.
ex_en: 一百个学生参加考试，九十个及格，八十个开心，七十个回家告诉爸爸妈妈。 Yī bǎi ge xuésheng cānjiā kǎoshì, jiǔ shí ge jígé, bā shí ge kāixīn, qī shí ge huíjiā gàosu bàba māma.
ex_zh: One hundred students took the exam, ninety passed, eighty were happy, and seventy went home to tell Mum and Dad.

quote_en: 他有一百万。 Tā yǒu yī bǎi wàn.
ex_en: 新西兰有五百万人，北岛住三百万人，南岛住两百万人，大家都很友好。 Xīn Xīlán yǒu wǔ bǎi wàn rén, Běi Dǎo zhù sān bǎi wàn rén, Nán Dǎo zhù liǎng bǎi wàn rén, dàjiā dōu hěn yǒuhǎo.
ex_zh: New Zealand has five million people: three million live in the North Island, two million live in the South Island, and everyone is very friendly.

quote_en: 我在一班。 Wǒ zài yī bān.
ex_en: 早上八点上课，我们班有二十个学生，老师教我们中文、数学和科学。 Zǎoshang bā diǎn shàngkè, wǒmen bān yǒu èr shí ge xuésheng, lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen Zhōngwén, shùxué hé kēxué.
ex_zh: Class starts at eight in the morning. Our class has twenty students, and the teacher teaches us Chinese, maths, and science.

quote_en: 我等了半小时。 Wǒ děng le bàn xiǎoshí.
quote_zh: I waited for half an hour.
ex_en: 今天下午我用了半天时间做功课，半小时休息，然后和朋友一起打篮球。 Jīntiān xiàwǔ wǒ yòng le bàn tiān shíjiān zuò gōngkè, bàn xiǎoshí xiūxi, ránhòu hé péngyou yìqǐ dǎ lánqiú.
ex_zh: This afternoon I spent half a day doing homework, rested for half an hour, and then played basketball with friends.

quote_en: 谢谢你帮助我。 Xièxie nǐ bāngzhù wǒ.
ex_en: 老师常常帮助我们学习，我们也应该帮助家人做事情，比如帮助妈妈做饭，帮助爸爸洗车。 Lǎoshī chángcháng bāngzhù wǒmen xuéxí, wǒmen yě yīnggāi bāngzhù jiārén zuò shìqing, bǐrú bāngzhù māma zuò fàn, bāngzhù bàba xǐ chē.
ex_zh: Teachers often help us study, and we should also help family members with tasks, such as helping Mum cook dinner and helping Dad wash the car.

quote_en: 我爱吃包子。 Wǒ ài chī bāo zi.
ex_en: 昨天妈妈买了十个包子，爸爸吃了三个，我吃了两个，妹妹吃了五个，大家都吃得很开心。 Zuótiān māma mǎi le shí ge bāo zi, bàba chī le sān ge, wǒ chī le liǎng ge, mèimei chī le wǔ ge, dàjiā dōu chī de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Yesterday Mum bought ten steamed buns. Dad ate three, I ate two, my younger sister ate five, and everyone ate happily.

quote_en: 学校在北边。 Xuéxiào zài běi bian.
quote_zh: The school is in the north.
ex_en: 新西兰的北边是北岛，奥克兰在北岛的中部，天气不冷也不热，很多人住在那里。 Xīn Xīlán de běi bian shì Běi Dǎo, Ào Kèlán zài Běi Dǎo de zhōngbù, tiānqì bù lěng yě bù rè, hěn duō rén zhù zài nàlǐ.
ex_zh: The north of New Zealand is the North Island. Auckland is in the central part of the North Island, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and many people live there.

quote_en: 北岛很大。 Běi Dǎo hěn dà.
quote_zh: The North Island is very big.
ex_en: 北岛有新西兰最大的城市，南岛有美丽的山和湖，从北岛到南岛可以坐飞机或者坐船。 Běi Dǎo yǒu Xīn Xīlán zuì dà de chéngshì, Nán Dǎo yǒu měilì de shān hé hú, cóng Běi Dǎo dào Nán Dǎo kěyǐ zuò fēijī huòzhě zuò chuán.
ex_zh: The North Island has New Zealand's largest city, the South Island has beautiful mountains and lakes, and you can travel from the North Island to the South Island by plane or by boat.

quote_en: 北京是中国的首都。 Běijīng shì Zhōngguó de shǒudū.
quote_zh: Beijing is the capital of China.
ex_en: 我爸爸去过北京，他看了长城，吃了烤鸭，还买了毛笔和汉字书送给我。 Wǒ bàba qù guò Běijīng, tā kàn le Chángchéng, chī le kǎo yā, hái mǎi le máo bǐ hé Hànzì shū sòng gěi wǒ.
ex_zh: My dad has been to Beijing. He saw the Great Wall, ate roast duck, and also bought a brush pen and a Chinese character book to give me.

quote_en: 我有一本书。 Wǒ yǒu yī běn shū.
ex_en: 图书馆里有三百本书，我喜欢看中文书，上个星期我借了五本，这个星期还要借两本。 Túshūguǎn lǐ yǒu sān bǎi běn shū, wǒ xǐhuan kàn Zhōngwén shū, shàng ge xīngqī wǒ jiè le wǔ běn, zhè ge xīngqī hái yào jiè liǎng běn.
ex_zh: There are three hundred books in the library. I like reading Chinese books. Last week I borrowed five, and this week I will borrow two more.

quote_en: 请给我一支笔。 Qǐng gěi wǒ yī zhī bǐ.
ex_en: 我的书包里有三支笔：一支毛笔写汉字，一支铅笔画画，一支圆珠笔做功课。 Wǒ de shūbāo lǐ yǒu sān zhī bǐ: yī zhī máo bǐ xiě Hànzì, yī zhī qiān bǐ huà huà, yī zhī yuánzhū bǐ zuò gōngkè.
ex_zh: In my schoolbag there are three pens: a brush pen for writing Chinese characters, a pencil for drawing, and a ballpoint pen for doing homework.

quote_en: 你在哪边？ Nǐ zài nǎ biān?
ex_en: 学校东边是公园，西边是商店，南边是车站，北边是图书馆，中间是我们的运动场。 Xuéxiào dōng bian shì gōngyuán, xī bian shì shāngdiàn, nán bian shì chēzhàn, běi bian shì túshūguǎn, zhōngjiān shì wǒmen de yùndòngchǎng.
ex_zh: East of the school is a park, west is shops, south is the bus stop, north is the library, and in the middle is our sports field.

def_zh: 不好意思打扰；真不好意思
quote_en: 不好意思，请问几点了？ Bù hǎo yì si, qǐng wèn jǐ diǎn le?
quote_zh: Excuse me, may I ask what time it is?
ex_en: 不好意思，我迟到了，因为路上堵车，下次我一定早出门，不让你等我。 Bù hǎo yì si, wǒ chídào le, yīnwèi lù shang dǔ chē, xià cì wǒ yīdìng zǎo chūmén, bù ràng nǐ děng wǒ.
ex_zh: I'm sorry I'm late because there was a traffic jam. Next time I will leave home early so I don't keep you waiting.

quote_en: 谢谢！——不客气。 Xièxie! — Bù kè qi.
ex_en: 你帮助我学习中文，我说谢谢，你说“不客气”，我们互相帮助，一起进步。 Nǐ bāngzhù wǒ xuéxí Zhōngwén, wǒ shuō xièxie, nǐ shuō “bù kè qi”, wǒmen hùxiāng bāngzhù, yìqǐ jìnbù.
ex_zh: You help me study Chinese, I say thank you, you say "you're welcome", we help each other and make progress together.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃菜。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī cài.
ex_en: 今天晚上妈妈做了三个菜：一个炒鸡蛋，一个炒饭，还有一个鱼，大家都说很好吃，我吃了两碗米饭。 Jīntiān wǎnshang māma zuò le sān ge cài: yí ge chǎo jīdàn, yí ge chǎo fàn, hái yǒu yí ge yú, dàjiā dōu shuō hěn hǎo chī, wǒ chī le liǎng wǎn mǐfàn.
ex_zh: Tonight Mum made three dishes: scrambled eggs, fried rice, and a fish dish. Everyone said it was very delicious, and I ate two bowls of rice.

quote_en: 我爱喝茶。 Wǒ ài hē chá.
ex_en: 爸爸每天早上喝一杯绿茶，妈妈喜欢喝红茶，我喝奶茶，妹妹不喝茶，她喝果汁。 Bàba měitiān zǎoshang hē yī bēi lǜ chá, māma xǐhuan hē hóng chá, wǒ hē nǎi chá, mèimei bù hē chá, tā hē guǒ zhī.
ex_zh: Dad drinks a cup of green tea every morning, Mum likes drinking black tea, I drink milk tea, and my younger sister doesn't drink tea – she drinks juice.

quote_en: 她的头发很长。 Tā de tóufa hěn cháng.
ex_en: 从北京到上海的路很长，坐火车要五个小时，坐飞机快一点，但是要提前到飞机场。 Cóng Běijīng dào Shànghǎi de lù hěn cháng, zuò huǒchē yào wǔ ge xiǎoshí, zuò fēijī kuài yī diǎn, dànshì yào tíqián dào fēijīchǎng.
ex_zh: The road from Beijing to Shanghai is very long. Taking the train takes five hours; taking the plane is faster, but you need to arrive at the airport early.

quote_en: 我常常去公园。 Wǒ chángcháng qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: I often go to the park.
ex_en: 爷爷常常在早上走路去海边，奶奶常常在家里看电视，我常常和朋友一起打球或者游泳。 Yéye chángcháng zài zǎoshang zǒulù qù hǎibiān, nǎinai chángcháng zài jiā lǐ kàn diànshì, wǒ chángcháng hé péngyou yìqǐ dǎ qiú huòzhě yóuyǒng.
ex_zh: Grandfather often walks to the seaside in the morning, grandmother often watches TV at home, and I often play ball games or swim with my friends.

quote_en: 长城在中国。 Chángchéng zài Zhōngguó.
quote_zh: The Great Wall is in China.
ex_en: 去年我和爸爸去北京看了长城，长城真的很长，我们走了半天，拍了很多照片，还买了长城的小礼物。 Qùnián wǒ hé bàba qù Běijīng kàn le Chángchéng, Chángchéng zhēn de hěn cháng, wǒmen zǒu le bàn tiān, pāi le hěn duō zhàopiàn, hái mǎi le Chángchéng de xiǎo lǐwù.
ex_zh: Last year Dad and I went to Beijing to see the Great Wall. The Great Wall is really long. We walked for half a day, took many photos, and also bought small Great Wall souvenirs.

quote_en: 妹妹喜欢唱歌。 Mèimei xǐhuan chàng gē.
quote_zh: My younger sister likes to sing.
ex_en: 生日会上大家都很开心，妈妈唱了一首中文歌，爸爸唱英文歌，我和弟弟一起唱“新年好”，爷爷奶奶听了很高兴。 Shēngrì huì shang dàjiā dōu hěn kāixīn, māma chàng le yī shǒu Zhōngwén gē, bàba chàng Yīngwén gē, wǒ hé dìdi yìqǐ chàng “Xīn Nián Hǎo”, yéye nǎinai tīng le hěn gāoxìng.
ex_zh: Everyone was very happy at the birthday party. Mum sang a Chinese song, Dad sang an English song, my younger brother and I sang "Happy New Year" together, and grandparents were very happy to hear it.

quote_en: 妈妈在炒菜。 Māma zài chǎo cài.
ex_en: 爸爸会炒饭，也会炒鸡蛋，但是他不会炒肉，所以每次做肉都是妈妈来，爸爸帮忙洗菜。 Bàba huì chǎo fàn, yě huì chǎo jīdàn, dànshì tā bù huì chǎo ròu, suǒyǐ měi cì zuò ròu dōu shì māma lái, bàba bāngmáng xǐ cài.
ex_zh: Dad can make fried rice and also scrambled eggs, but he can't stir-fry meat, so every time meat is cooked, Mum does it, and Dad helps wash the vegetables.

quote_en: 我爱吃炒饭。 Wǒ ài chī chǎo fàn.
ex_en: 中午我不想吃面包，就去饭馆点了一份蛋炒饭，里面有鸡蛋、米饭还有一点菜，很好吃，只要十块钱。 Zhōngwǔ wǒ bù xiǎng chī miànbāo, jiù qù fànguǎn diǎn le yī fèn dàn chǎo fàn, lǐmiàn yǒu jīdàn, mǐfàn hái yǒu yī diǎn cài, hěn hǎo chī, zhǐ yào shí kuài qián.
ex_zh: At noon I didn't want to eat bread, so I went to a restaurant and ordered a serving of egg fried rice. It had eggs, rice, and a little vegetable. It was very tasty and only cost ten yuan.

quote_en: 爸爸的车是白色的。 Bàba de chē shì bái sè de.
ex_en: 学校里有很多车，老师的车停在学校东边，校车停在南边，学生不能开车，因为大家还不会开车。 Xuéxiào li yǒu hěn duō chē, lǎoshī de chē tíng zài xuéxiào dōng bian, xiàochē tíng zài nán bian, xuésheng bù néng kāi chē, yīnwèi dàjiā hái bù huì kāi chē.
ex_zh: There are many vehicles at school. Teachers' cars park on the east side of the school, the school bus parks on the south side. Students cannot drive because they don't know how to drive yet.

quote_en: 车站很近。 Chēzhàn hěn jìn.
quote_zh: The bus stop is very close.
ex_en: 每天早上七点我走到车站，坐公共汽车去学校，下午三点半放学，再坐车回家，车票两块钱。 Měitiān zǎoshang qī diǎn wǒ zǒu dào chēzhàn, zuò gōnggòng qìchē qù xuéxiào, xiàwǔ sān diǎn bàn fàngxué, zài zuò chē huíjiā, chēpiào liǎng kuài qián.
ex_zh: Every morning at seven I walk to the bus stop and take the bus to school. At 3:30 in the afternoon school finishes, and I take the bus home. The ticket costs two yuan.

quote_en: 你吃饭了吗？ Nǐ chī fàn le ma?
ex_en: 中午十二点我们在学校食堂吃饭，我常常吃米饭、炒菜和鱼，有时候吃面条，不吃饭的时候会吃包子。 Zhōngwǔ shí èr diǎn wǒmen zài xuéxiào shítáng chī fàn, wǒ chángcháng chī mǐfàn, chǎo cài hé yú, yǒu shíhou chī miàntiáo, bù chī fàn de shíhou huì chī bāo zi.
ex_zh: At twelve noon we eat at the school canteen. I often eat rice, stir-fried vegetables, and fish. Sometimes I eat noodles. When I don't eat rice, I eat steamed buns.

quote_en: 今天很冷，多穿衣服。 Jīntiān hěn lěng, duō chuān yīfu.
quote_zh: It's cold today, wear more clothes.
ex_en: 我们学校要求学生穿校服，男生穿白色上衣和黑色裤子，女生穿白色上衣和黑色裙子，冬天还要穿毛衣。 Wǒmen xuéxiào yāoqiú xuésheng chuān xiàofú, nánshēng chuān bái sè shàngyī hé hēi sè kùzi, nǚshēng chuān bái sè shàngyī hé hēi sè qúnzi, dōngtiān hái yào chuān máo yī.
ex_zh: Our school requires students to wear uniforms. Boys wear white tops and black trousers; girls wear white tops and black skirts. In winter they also need to wear wool jumpers.

def_en: the Spring Festival, Chinese New Year
quote_en: 春节要到了。 Chūnjié yào dào le.
ex_en: 每年春节我们家一起吃饭，妈妈做很多菜，爸爸给红包，我和妹妹穿新衣服，大家说“新年快乐”。 Měi nián Chūnjié wǒmen jiā yìqǐ chī fàn, māma zuò hěn duō cài, bàba gěi hóngbāo, wǒ hé mèimei chuān xīn yīfu, dàjiā shuō “Xīn Nián Kuài Lè”.
ex_zh: Every year at Spring Festival our family eats together. Mum makes many dishes, Dad gives red envelopes, my younger sister and I wear new clothes, and everyone says "Happy New Year."

quote_en: 春天很暖和。 Chūntiān hěn nuǎn huo.
ex_en: 春天天气不冷也不热，常常下雨，花开了，树绿了，我们喜欢在公园里走路、跑步、放风筝。 Chūntiān tiānqì bù lěng yě bù rè, chángcháng xià yǔ, huā kāi le, shù lǜ le, wǒmen xǐhuan zài gōngyuán lǐ zǒulù, pǎobù, fàng fēngzheng.
ex_zh: In spring the weather is neither cold nor hot, it often rains, flowers bloom, trees turn green, and we like to walk, run, and fly kites in the park.

def_en: to call, to make a phone call
def_zh: 给妈妈打电话；打一个电话
quote_en: 我打电话给爸爸。 Wǒ dǎ diànhuà gěi bàba.
ex_en: 昨天我给奶奶打电话，问她身体好不好，奶奶说她很健康，让我多喝水多运动，我说谢谢奶奶。 Zuótiān wǒ gěi nǎinai dǎ diànhuà, wèn tā shēntǐ hǎo bù hǎo, nǎinai shuō tā hěn jiànkāng, ràng wǒ duō hē shuǐ duō yùndòng, wǒ shuō xièxie nǎinai.
ex_zh: Yesterday I called Grandma and asked if she was well. She said she was very healthy and told me to drink more water and exercise more. I said thank you, Grandma.

def_en: to open, to turn on (e.g., 打开电视)
quote_en: 请打开书。 Qǐng dǎkāi shū.
ex_en: 回到家我打开电视看新闻，然后打开电脑做功课，写完作业再打开手机给朋友发信息。 Huí dào jiā wǒ dǎkāi diànshì kàn xīnwén, ránhòu dǎkāi diànnǎo zuò gōngkè, xiě wán zuòyè zài dǎkāi shǒujī gěi péngyou fā xìnxī.
ex_zh: When I get home I turn on the TV to watch the news, then turn on the computer to do homework. After finishing my homework, I turn on my phone to send messages to friends.

quote_en: 我们一起去打球吧！ Wǒmen yìqǐ qù dǎ qiú ba!
quote_zh: Let's go play ball games together!
ex_en: 下午放学后我和同学去体育馆打篮球，有时候打乒乓球，累了就休息喝水，大家都喜欢运动。 Xiàwǔ fàngxué hòu wǒ hé tóngxué qù tǐyùguǎn dǎ lánqiú, yǒu shíhou dǎ pīngpāng qiú, lèi le jiù xiūxi hē shuǐ, dàjiā dōu xǐhuan yùndòng.
ex_zh: After school in the afternoon my classmates and I go to the gym to play basketball. Sometimes we play table tennis. When we get tired we rest and drink water. Everyone likes sports.

quote_en: 这个苹果很大。 Zhè ge píngguǒ hěn dà.
ex_en: 北京是个很大的城市，有大学、商店、公园、火车站和飞机场，从南边到北边开车要很久。 Běijīng shì ge hěn dà de chéngshì, yǒu dàxué, shāngdiàn, gōngyuán, huǒchēzhàn hé fēijīchǎng, cóng nán bian dào běi bian kāi chē yào hěn jiǔ.
ex_zh: Beijing is a very big city. It has universities, shops, parks, train stations, and an airport. Driving from the south side to the north side takes a long time.

quote_en: 大家好，我是老师。 Dàjiā hǎo, wǒ shì lǎoshī.
quote_zh: Hello everyone, I am the teacher.
ex_en: 今天大家都很开心，因为明天放假，我们可以一起去海边玩，游泳、吃海鲜、看日落。 Jīntiān dàjiā dōu hěn kāixīn, yīnwèi míngtiān fàngjià, wǒmen kěyǐ yìqǐ qù hǎibiān wán, yóuyǒng, chī hǎixiān, kàn rìluò.
ex_zh: Everyone is very happy today because tomorrow is a holiday. We can go to the seaside together to swim, eat seafood, and watch the sunset.

quote_en: 哥哥在大学学习。 Gēge zài dàxué xuéxí.
quote_zh: Older brother is studying at university.
ex_en: 我明年想上大学，我喜欢中文和数学，大学里有图书馆和运动场，我可以学习也可以运动。 Wǒ míngnián xiǎng shàng dàxué, wǒ xǐhuan Zhōngwén hé shùxué, dàxué li yǒu túshūguǎn hé yùndòngchǎng, wǒ kěyǐ xuéxí yě kěyǐ yùndòng.
ex_zh: Next year I want to go to university. I like Chinese and maths. The university has a library and a sports field, so I can study and also exercise.

def_zh: 我是大学生；一个大学生
quote_en: 她是一个大学生。 Tā shì yī ge dàxué shēng.
ex_en: 大学生每天要上课、做功课、考试，周末可以去图书馆看书，或者和朋友一起打球、看电影。 Dàxué shēng měitiān yào shàngkè, zuò gōngkè, kǎoshì, zhōumò kěyǐ qù túshūguǎn kàn shū, huòzhě hé péngyou yìqǐ dǎ qiú, kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: University students have to attend class, do homework, and take exams every day. On weekends they can go to the library to read, or play ball games and watch movies with friends.

quote_en: 别忘了带水。 Bié wàng le dài shuǐ.
ex_en: 明天我们去北京，爸爸带相机，妈妈带衣服，我带中文书和笔记本，妹妹带她的玩具。 Míngtiān wǒmen qù Běijīng, bàba dài xiàngjī, māma dài yīfu, wǒ dài Zhōngwén shū hé bǐjì běn, mèimei dài tā de wánjù.
ex_zh: Tomorrow we are going to Beijing. Dad will bring a camera, Mum will bring clothes, I will bring a Chinese book and a notebook, and my younger sister will bring her toys.

quote_en: 蛋糕很好吃。 Dàngāo hěn hǎo chī.
ex_en: 妹妹生日会上妈妈买了一个大蛋糕，上面有白色的奶油和红色的花，我们点蜡烛、唱歌、吃蛋糕，真开心。 Mèimei shēngrì huì shang māma mǎi le yī ge dà dàngāo, shàngmiàn yǒu bái sè de nǎiyóu hé hóng sè de huā, wǒmen diǎn làzhú, chàng gē, chī dàngāo, zhēn kāixīn.
ex_zh: At my younger sister's birthday party, Mum bought a big cake with white cream and red flowers on top. We lit candles, sang songs, ate cake – it was really happy.

quote_en: 我到学校了。 Wǒ dào xuéxiào le.
ex_en: 早上八点我到了车站，等车十分钟，然后坐车到学校，八点半到教室，老师已经开始上课了。 Zǎoshang bā diǎn wǒ dào le chēzhàn, děng chē shí fēn zhōng, ránhòu zuò chē dào xuéxiào, bā diǎn bàn dào jiàoshì, lǎoshī yǐjīng kāishǐ shàngkè le.
ex_zh: At eight in the morning I arrived at the bus stop, waited ten minutes for the bus, then took the bus to school. At 8:30 I arrived at the classroom, and the teacher had already started the lesson.

quote_en: 请等我一下。 Qǐng děng wǒ yīxià.
quote_zh: Please wait for me a moment.
ex_en: 爸爸在车站等我放学，可是我今天要打扫教室，所以让他等了三十分钟，爸爸说没关系。 Bàba zài chēzhàn děng wǒ fàngxué, kěshì wǒ jīntiān yào dǎsǎo jiàoshì, suǒyǐ ràng tā děng le sān shí fēn zhōng, bàba shuō méi guānxi.
ex_zh: Dad was waiting for me at the bus stop after school, but today I had to clean the classroom, so I made him wait for thirty minutes. Dad said it's okay.

quote_en: 我是第一个。 Wǒ shì dì yī ge.
ex_en: 今天考试我得了第三名，妈妈说不错，爸爸说下次努力得第一，我要好好学习。 Jīntiān kǎoshì wǒ dé le dì sān míng, māma shuō bù cuò, bàba shuō xià cì nǔlì dé dì yī, wǒ yào hǎohǎo xuéxí.
ex_zh: Today on the exam I got third place. Mum said not bad, Dad said next time work hard to get first. I will study hard.

quote_en: 弟弟在睡觉。 Dìdi zài shuìjiào.
ex_en: 弟弟今年五岁，他喜欢玩球和看电视，每天早上他比我起得早，叫我起床去上学。 Dìdi jīnnián wǔ suì, tā xǐhuan wán qiú hé kàn diànshì, měitiān zǎoshang tā bǐ wǒ qǐ de zǎo, jiào wǒ qǐchuáng qù shàngxué.
ex_zh: My younger brother is five years old this year. He likes playing with balls and watching TV. Every morning he wakes up earlier than me and calls me to get up and go to school.

quote_en: 北京是个好地方。 Běijīng shì ge hǎo dìfang.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多美丽的地方，北岛有海滩和火山，南岛有山和湖，每个地方都很好玩。 Xīn Xīlán yǒu hěn duō měilì de dìfang, Běi Dǎo yǒu hǎitān hé huǒshān, Nán Dǎo yǒu shān hé hú, měi ge dìfang dōu hěn hǎo wán.
ex_zh: New Zealand has many beautiful places. The North Island has beaches and volcanoes, the South Island has mountains and lakes. Every place is very fun.

quote_en: 现在几点？ Xiànzài jǐ diǎn?
ex_en: 我每天早上六点起床，七点吃早饭，八点到学校上课，下午三点放学回家，晚上九点睡觉。 Wǒ měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn qǐchuáng, qī diǎn chī zǎofàn, bā diǎn dào xuéxiào shàngkè, xiàwǔ sān diǎn fàngxué huíjiā, wǎnshang jiǔ diǎn shuìjiào.
ex_zh: Every morning I get up at six, eat breakfast at seven, arrive at school at eight for class, finish school at three in the afternoon and go home, and at nine in the evening I go to sleep.

quote_en: 你想点菜吗？ Nǐ xiǎng diǎn cài ma?
quote_zh: Do you want to order dishes?
ex_en: 昨天我们去饭馆吃饭，我点了一个炒饭，爸爸点了两个菜，妈妈点了鱼和汤，我们一共花了五十块钱。 Zuótiān wǒmen qù fànguǎn chī fàn, wǒ diǎn le yī ge chǎo fàn, bàba diǎn le liǎng ge cài, māma diǎn le yú hé tāng, wǒmen yīgòng huā le wǔ shí kuài qián.
ex_zh: Yesterday we went to a restaurant to eat. I ordered a fried rice, Dad ordered two dishes, Mum ordered fish and soup, and we spent fifty yuan in total.

quote_en: 妈妈做了点心。 Māma zuò le diǎn xin.
ex_en: 下午三点我有点饿，奶奶给了我点心和茶，有包子、蛋糕和水果，我吃得很开心。 Xiàwǔ sān diǎn wǒ yǒu diǎn è, nǎinai gěi le wǒ diǎn xin hé chá, yǒu bāo zi, dàngāo hé shuǐguǒ, wǒ chī de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: At three in the afternoon I was a bit hungry. Grandma gave me snacks and tea, including steamed buns, cake, and fruit. I ate very happily.

quote_en: 手机没电了。 Shǒujī méi diàn le.
ex_en: 昨天晚上刮大风，停电了一个小时，我们点蜡烛，爸爸讲故事，妈妈唱歌，我觉得很有意思。 Zuótiān wǎnshang guā dà fēng, tíng diàn le yī ge xiǎoshí, wǒmen diǎn làzhú, bàba jiǎng gùshi, māma chàng gē, wǒ juéde hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Last night there was strong wind and the power went out for an hour. We lit candles, Dad told stories, Mum sang songs, and I thought it was very interesting.

quote_en: 你的电话响了。 Nǐ de diànhuà xiǎng le.
ex_en: 昨天朋友给我打电话，问我星期天有没有时间一起去看电影，我说有，我们约好下午两点在电影院门口见。 Zuótiān péngyou gěi wǒ dǎ diànhuà, wèn wǒ xīngqītiān yǒu méiyǒu shíjiān yìqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng, wǒ shuō yǒu, wǒmen yuē hǎo xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu jiàn.
ex_zh: Yesterday a friend called me and asked if I had time on Sunday to go see a movie together. I said yes, and we agreed to meet at two in the afternoon at the cinema entrance.

quote_en: 我用电脑做功课。 Wǒ yòng diànnǎo zuò gōngkè.
quote_zh: I use the computer to do homework.
ex_en: 弟弟每天玩电脑游戏，妈妈说他应该少玩电脑，多看书画画，可是弟弟不听，还是天天玩。 Dìdi měitiān wán diànnǎo yóuxì, māma shuō tā yīnggāi shǎo wán diànnǎo, duō kàn shū huà huà, kěshì dìdi bù tīng, háishì tiāntiān wán.
ex_zh: My younger brother plays computer games every day. Mum says he should play on the computer less and read more books and draw more, but he doesn't listen and still plays every day.

quote_en: 我爱看电视。 Wǒ ài kàn diànshì.
ex_en: 每天晚上爸爸看电视新闻，妈妈看电视剧，我和妹妹看动画片，有时候大家会一起看电影。 Měitiān wǎnshang bàba kàn diànshì xīnwén, māma kàn diànshì jù, wǒ hé mèimei kàn dònghuà piàn, yǒu shíhou dàjiā huì yìqǐ kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: Every evening Dad watches TV news, Mum watches TV dramas, my younger sister and I watch cartoons, and sometimes everyone watches a movie together.

quote_en: 我们去看电影吧。 Wǒmen qù kàn diànyǐng ba.
ex_en: 上星期我看了一部中文电影，讲的是北京的故事，有长城、胡同和北京烤鸭，很好看。 Shàng xīngqī wǒ kàn le yī bù Zhōngwén diànyǐng, jiǎng de shì Běijīng de gùshi, yǒu Chángchéng, hútòng hé Běijīng kǎo yā, hěn hǎo kàn.
ex_zh: Last week I watched a Chinese movie about Beijing, featuring the Great Wall, hutongs, and Beijing roast duck. It was very good.

quote_en: 电影院在哪儿？ Diànyǐngyuàn zài nǎr?
ex_en: 星期天下午我和朋友去电影院看电影，电影两点开始，我们一点半就到了，买了可乐和爆米花。 Xīngqītiān xiàwǔ wǒ hé péngyou qù diànyǐngyuàn kàn diànyǐng, diànyǐng liǎng diǎn kāishǐ, wǒmen yī diǎn bàn jiù dào le, mǎi le kělè hé bàomǐhuā.
ex_zh: On Sunday afternoon my friend and I went to the cinema to watch a movie. The movie started at two, and we arrived at 1:30, bought cola and popcorn.

quote_en: 冬天来了。 Dōngtiān lái le.
ex_en: 新西兰的冬天不很冷，北岛不下雪，南岛下雪，我们穿毛衣和外套，喝热水，有时候去滑雪。 Xīn Xīlán de dōngtiān bù hěn lěng, Běi Dǎo bù xià xuě, Nán Dǎo xià xuě, wǒmen chuān máo yī hé wàitào, hē rè shuǐ, yǒu shíhou qù huá xuě.
ex_zh: Winter in New Zealand is not very cold. The North Island doesn't get snow, the South Island does. We wear wool jumpers and coats, drink hot water, and sometimes go skiing.

quote_en: 她很喜欢动物。 Tā hěn xǐhuan dòngwù.
ex_en: 动物园里有很多动物，有熊猫、老虎、猴子、鸟和鱼，小朋友们都喜欢去看动物，特别是大熊猫。 Dòngwùyuán li yǒu hěn duō dòngwù, yǒu xióngmāo, lǎohǔ, hóuzi, niǎo hé yú, xiǎopéngyou men dōu xǐhuan qù kàn dòngwù, tèbié shì dà xióngmāo.
ex_zh: There are many animals in the zoo, including pandas, tigers, monkeys, birds, and fish. Children all like to go see the animals, especially giant pandas.

quote_en: 星期天我们去动物园。 Xīngqītiān wǒmen qù dòngwùyuán.
quote_zh: On Sunday we are going to the zoo.
ex_en: 昨天老师带我们去动物园，我们看了长颈鹿、大象、狮子和北极熊，还拍了很多照片，回家给爸爸妈妈看。 Zuótiān lǎoshī dài wǒmen qù dòngwùyuán, wǒmen kàn le chángjǐnglù, dàxiàng, shīzi hé běijí xióng, hái pāi le hěn duō zhàopiàn, huíjiā gěi bàba māma kàn.
ex_zh: Yesterday the teacher took us to the zoo. We saw giraffes, elephants, lions, and polar bears, and took many photos to show Mum and Dad at home.

quote_en: 太阳从东边出来。 Tàiyáng cóng dōng bian chūlái.
quote_zh: The sun rises from the east.
ex_en: 学校东边是公园，西边是商店，南边是车站，北边是图书馆，我家在学校东边，走路十分钟。 Xuéxiào dōng bian shì gōngyuán, xī bian shì shāngdiàn, nán bian shì chēzhàn, běi bian shì túshūguǎn, wǒ jiā zài xuéxiào dōng bian, zǒulù shí fēn zhōng.
ex_zh: East of the school is a park, west is shops, south is the bus stop, north is the library. My home is east of the school, a ten-minute walk.

quote_en: 我买了很多东西。 Wǒ mǎi le hěn duō dōng xi.
quote_zh: I bought a lot of things.
ex_en: 书包里有好多东西：书、笔、本子、手机、钱包、水杯和一点吃的东西。 Shūbāo li yǒu hǎo duō dōng xi: shū, bǐ, běn zi, shǒujī, qiánbāo, shuǐ bēi hé yī diǎn chī de dōng xi.
ex_zh: There are many things in the schoolbag: books, pens, notebooks, a mobile phone, a wallet, a water bottle, and a little bit of food.

quote_en: 你的答案是对的。 Nǐ de dá'àn shì duì de.
ex_en: 老师说这道题选A，我说选B，结果我对了，老师说我很聪明，我心里很高兴。 Lǎoshī shuō zhè dào tí xuǎn A, wǒ shuō xuǎn B, jiéguǒ wǒ duì le, lǎoshī shuō wǒ hěn cōngming, wǒ xīn li hěn gāoxìng.
ex_zh: The teacher said the answer to this question was A, I said B. In the end I was right. The teacher said I am smart, and I felt very happy in my heart.

quote_en: 对不起，我迟到了。 Duìbuqǐ, wǒ chídào le.
ex_en: 昨天我不小心把弟弟的杯子打坏了，我跟他说对不起，他说没关系，我给他买了一个新的。 Zuótiān wǒ bù xiǎoxīn bǎ dìdi de bēizi dǎ huài le, wǒ gēn tā shuō duìbuqǐ, tā shuō méi guānxi, wǒ gěi tā mǎi le yī ge xīn de.
ex_zh: Yesterday I accidentally broke my younger brother's cup. I said sorry to him, he said never mind, and I bought him a new one.

quote_en: 学校在公园对面。 Xuéxiào zài gōngyuán duìmiàn.
quote_zh: The school is opposite the park.
ex_en: 我家对面有一家商店，商店旁边是饭馆，饭馆对面是车站，车站北边是图书馆。 Wǒ jiā duìmiàn yǒu yī jiā shāngdiàn, shāngdiàn pángbiān shì fànguǎn, fànguǎn duìmiàn shì chēzhàn, chēzhàn běi bian shì túshūguǎn.
ex_zh: Opposite my home there is a shop. Next to the shop is a restaurant. Opposite the restaurant is a bus stop. North of the bus stop is the library.

quote_en: 她有很多书。 Tā yǒu hěn duō shū.
ex_en: 今天超市的人很多，妈妈买了许多东西：水果、牛奶、鸡蛋、面包和蛋糕，花了三百多块钱。 Jīntiān chāoshì de rén hěn duō, māma mǎi le xǔduō dōng xi: shuǐguǒ, niúnǎi, jīdàn, miànbāo hé dàngāo, huā le sān bǎi duō kuài qián.
ex_zh: Today there were many people at the supermarket. Mum bought many things: fruit, milk, eggs, bread, and cake, and spent over three hundred yuan.

quote_en: 你多大岁数？ Nǐ duō dà suì shu?
ex_en: 弟弟问我多大，我说我十五岁，他说他五岁，我说你比我小十岁，你长大就知道了。 Dìdi wèn wǒ duō dà, wǒ shuō wǒ shíwǔ suì, tā shuō tā wǔ suì, wǒ shuō nǐ bǐ wǒ xiǎo shí suì, nǐ zhǎng dà jiù zhīdào le.
ex_zh: My younger brother asked me how old I am. I said I am fifteen. He said he is five. I said you are ten years younger than me; when you grow up you will know.

quote_en: 这个多少钱？ Zhè ge duō shǎo qián?
ex_en: 你知道你家有多少口人吗？我家有五口人：爸爸、妈妈、哥哥、妹妹和我。 Nǐ zhīdào nǐ jiā yǒu duō shǎo kǒu rén ma? Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén: bàba, māma, gēge, mèimei hé wǒ.
ex_zh: Do you know how many people are in your family? My family has five people: Dad, Mum, older brother, younger sister, and me.

quote_en: 你要多久才能到？ Nǐ yào duō jiǔ cáinéng dào?
quote_zh: How long will it take for you to arrive?
ex_en: 从北京坐火车到上海要多久？大概五个小时。从新西兰飞到中国要十多个小时。 Cóng Běijīng zuò huǒchē dào Shànghǎi yào duō jiǔ? Dàgài wǔ ge xiǎoshí. Cóng Xīn Xīlán fēi dào Zhōngguó yào shí duō ge xiǎoshí.
ex_zh: How long does it take to go from Beijing to Shanghai by train? About five hours. How long to fly from New Zealand to China? More than ten hours.

quote_en: 我饿了，想吃饭。 Wǒ è le, xiǎng chī fàn.
quote_zh: I'm hungry, I want to eat.
ex_en: 中午十二点放学的时候我很饿，因为早上只吃了一个包子和一杯牛奶。我马上跑去饭馆点了一份炒饭。 Zhōngwǔ shí'èr diǎn fàngxué de shíhou wǒ hěn è, yīnwèi zǎoshang zhǐ chī le yī ge bāo zi hé yī bēi niúnǎi. Wǒ mǎshàng pǎo qù fànguǎn diǎn le yī fèn chǎo fàn.
ex_zh: When school finished at twelve noon, I was very hungry because I only ate one steamed bun and a glass of milk in the morning. I immediately ran to the restaurant and ordered a serving of fried rice.

quote_en: 我有二个苹果。 Wǒ yǒu èr ge píngguǒ.
ex_en: 星期二下午我有两节课：第一节是数学，第二节是体育。星期二放学后我要去图书馆还二本书。 Xīngqī'èr xiàwǔ wǒ yǒu liǎng jié kè: dì yī jié shì shùxué, dì èr jié shì tǐyù. Xīngqī'èr fàngxué hòu wǒ yào qù túshūguǎn huán èr běn shū.
ex_zh: On Tuesday afternoon I have two lessons: the first is maths, the second is PE. After school on Tuesday I will go to the library to return two books.

quote_en: 你吃饭了吗？ Nǐ chī fàn le ma?
ex_en: 每天我吃三顿饭：早饭吃面包和牛奶，午饭在学校吃米饭和菜，晚饭回家和家人一起吃，妈妈常常做鱼和炒鸡蛋。 Měitiān wǒ chī sān dùn fàn: zǎofàn chī miànbāo hé niúnǎi, wǔfàn zài xuéxiào chī mǐfàn hé cài, wǎnfàn huíjiā hé jiārén yìqǐ chī, māma chángcháng zuò yú hé chǎo jīdàn.
ex_zh: Every day I eat three meals: breakfast with bread and milk, lunch at school eating rice and vegetables, dinner at home eating with family. Mum often cooks fish and scrambled eggs.

quote_en: 我们去饭馆吃饭吧。 Wǒmen qù fànguǎn chī fàn ba.
quote_zh: Let's go eat at a restaurant.
ex_en: 星期六晚上我们全家去一家中国饭馆吃饭。我们点了饺子、炒饭、鱼和青菜。一共花了二百块钱，很好吃。 Xīngqīliù wǎnshang wǒmen quánjiā qù yī jiā Zhōngguó fànguǎn chī fàn. Wǒmen diǎn le jiǎo zi, chǎo fàn, yú hé qīngcài. Yīgòng huā le èr bǎi kuài qián, hěn hǎo chī.
ex_zh: On Saturday evening our whole family went to eat at a Chinese restaurant. We ordered dumplings, fried rice, fish, and green vegetables. It cost two hundred yuan in total and was very delicious.

quote_en: 坐地铁很方便。 Zuò dìtiě hěn fāng biàn.
quote_zh: Taking the subway is very convenient.
ex_en: 我家旁边有一个大超市，买东西很方便。走路五分钟就到。可是车站离我家不近，走路要二十分钟，不太方便。 Wǒ jiā pángbiān yǒu yī ge dà chāoshì, mǎi dōng xi hěn fāng biàn. Zǒulù wǔ fēn zhōng jiù dào. Kěshì chēzhàn lí wǒ jiā bù jìn, zǒulù yào èr shí fēn zhōng, bù tài fāng biàn.
ex_zh: There is a big supermarket next to my home, so buying things is very convenient – a five-minute walk. But the bus stop is not close to my home, a twenty-minute walk – not very convenient.

quote_en: 明天开始放假。 Míngtiān kāishǐ fàngjià.
ex_en: 每年夏天学校放两个月的假。放假的时候我和家人一起去海边玩，或者去南岛看山和湖。有时候我在家看书、看电影。 Měi nián xiàtiān xuéxiào fàng liǎng ge yuè de jià. Fàngjià de shíhou wǒ hé jiārén yìqǐ qù hǎibiān wán, huòzhě qù Nán Dǎo kàn shān hé hú. Yǒu shíhou wǒ zài jiā kàn shū, kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: Every summer the school has a two-month holiday. During the holiday I go to the seaside with my family, or go to the South Island to see mountains and lakes. Sometimes I stay home reading books and watching movies.

quote_en: 下午三点放学。 Xiàwǔ sān diǎn fàngxué.
quote_zh: School finishes at three in the afternoon.
ex_en: 放学后我通常先去图书馆做功课，然后和朋友打半小时篮球，最后走路回家。妈妈每天放学的时候会打电话问我到哪儿了。 Fàngxué hòu wǒ tōngcháng xiān qù túshūguǎn zuò gōngkè, ránhòu hé péngyou dǎ bàn xiǎoshí lánqiú, zuìhòu zǒulù huíjiā. Māma měitiān fàngxué de shíhou huì dǎ diànhuà wèn wǒ dào nǎr le.
ex_zh: After school I usually first go to the library to do homework, then play basketball with friends for half an hour, and finally walk home. Mum calls me every day when school finishes to ask where I am.

quote_en: 飞机很快。 Fēijī hěn kuài.
ex_en: 去年我坐飞机去北京看长城。从新西兰飞到北京要十多个小时，在飞机上我看电影、吃饭、睡觉。我觉得坐飞机很有意思。 Qùnián wǒ zuò fēijī qù Běijīng kàn Chángchéng. Cóng Xīn Xīlán fēi dào Běijīng yào shí duō ge xiǎoshí, zài fēijī shang wǒ kàn diànyǐng, chī fàn, shuìjiào. Wǒ juéde zuò fēijī hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Last year I took a plane to Beijing to see the Great Wall. Flying from New Zealand to Beijing takes more than ten hours. On the plane I watched movies, ate, and slept. I think flying is very interesting.

quote_en: 飞机场很大。 Fēijīchǎng hěn dà.
ex_en: 星期天早上爸爸开车送我去飞机场，因为我要坐飞机去上海看爷爷。飞机场里有很多人，大家都在等飞机。 Xīngqītiān zǎoshang bàba kāi chē sòng wǒ qù fēijīchǎng, yīnwèi wǒ yào zuò fēijī qù Shànghǎi kàn yéye. Fēijīchǎng li yǒu hěn duō rén, dàjiā dōu zài děng fēijī.
ex_zh: On Sunday morning Dad drove me to the airport because I was going to fly to Shanghai to see Grandfather. There were many people at the airport, all waiting for their planes.

quote_en: 请等我五分钟。 Qǐng děng wǒ wǔ fēn zhōng.
quote_zh: Please wait five minutes for me.
ex_en: 从我家走到学校要十五分钟，骑自行车只要五分钟。今天我起晚了，所以骑自行车去上学，没有迟到。 Cóng wǒ jiā zǒu dào xuéxiào yào shíwǔ fēn zhōng, qí zìxíngchē zhǐ yào wǔ fēn zhōng. Jīntiān wǒ qǐ wǎn le, suǒyǐ qí zìxíngchē qù shàngxué, méiyǒu chídào.
ex_zh: Walking from my home to school takes fifteen minutes, but riding a bicycle takes only five minutes. Today I got up late, so I rode my bike to school and wasn't late.

quote_en: 今天风很大。 Jīntiān fēng hěn dà.
quote_zh: The wind is very strong today.
ex_en: 春天常常刮风，但不冷。我喜欢在公园里放风筝，风大的时候风筝飞得很高。可是风太大的时候就不能打球了。 Chūntiān chángcháng guā fēng, dàn bù lěng. Wǒ xǐhuan zài gōngyuán li fàng fēngzheng, fēng dà de shíhou fēngzheng fēi de hěn gāo. Kěshì fēng tài dà de shíhou jiù bù néng dǎ qiú le.
ex_zh: In spring it is often windy, but not cold. I like to fly kites in the park. When the wind is strong, kites fly very high. But when the wind is too strong, you can't play ball games.

quote_en: 他喜欢打橄榄球。 Tā xǐhuan dǎ gǎnlǎnqiú.
ex_en: 新西兰很多人都喜欢橄榄球，特别是男生。星期六下午我和同学们在运动场打橄榄球，虽然很累，但是很开心。 Xīn Xīlán hěn duō rén dōu xǐhuan gǎnlǎnqiú, tèbié shì nánshēng. Xīngqīliù xiàwǔ wǒ hé tóngxué men zài yùndòngchǎng dǎ gǎnlǎnqiú, suīrán hěn lèi, dànshì hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Many people in New Zealand like rugby, especially boys. On Saturday afternoon my classmates and I played rugby on the sports field. Although we were very tired, we were very happy.

quote_en: 他个子很高。 Tā gèzi hěn gāo.
ex_en: 我哥哥比我高十厘米，他打篮球很好，因为他个子高，可以轻松把球投进篮筐。 Wǒ gēge bǐ wǒ gāo shí límǐ, tā dǎ lánqiú hěn hǎo, yīnwèi tā gèzi gāo, kěyǐ qīngsōng bǎ qiú tóu jìn lánkuāng.
ex_zh: My older brother is ten centimeters taller than me. He plays basketball very well because he is tall and can easily throw the ball into the basket.

quote_en: 我今天很高兴。 Wǒ jīntiān hěn gāoxìng.
ex_en: 妈妈收到我送的生日礼物，她很高兴，说我很懂事。爸爸看到妈妈高兴，他也笑了，我们全家都很开心。 Māma shōudào wǒ sòng de shēngrì lǐwù, tā hěn gāoxìng, shuō wǒ hěn dǒngshì. Bàba kàndào māma gāoxìng, tā yě xiào le, wǒmen quánjiā dōu hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Mum received the birthday present I gave her. She was very happy and said I am very thoughtful. Dad saw Mum happy, and he also smiled. Our whole family was very happy.

quote_en: 请告诉我你的名字。 Qǐng gàosu wǒ nǐ de míngzi.
ex_en: 老师告诉我们明天要考试，让我们好好复习。我回家告诉妈妈，妈妈让我早点睡觉，不要玩手机。 Lǎoshī gàosu wǒmen míngtiān yào kǎoshì, ràng wǒmen hǎohǎo fùxí. Wǒ huíjiā gàosu māma, māma ràng wǒ zǎo diǎn shuìjiào, bùyào wán shǒujī.
ex_zh: The teacher told us that there will be an exam tomorrow and asked us to review well. I went home and told Mum. Mum told me to go to bed early and not play with my phone.

quote_en: 哥哥在大学学习。 Gēge zài dàxué xuéxí.
quote_zh: My older brother is studying at university.
ex_en: 哥哥每天骑自行车上学，他比我大三岁。他常常教我数学，有时候还带我去公园打球。 Gēge měitiān qí zìxíngchē shàngxué, tā bǐ wǒ dà sān suì. Tā chángcháng jiāo wǒ shùxué, yǒu shíhou hái dài wǒ qù gōngyuán dǎ qiú.
ex_zh: My older brother rides his bike to school every day. He is three years older than me. He often teaches me maths and sometimes takes me to the park to play ball games.

def_en: measure word for people and many everyday objects
quote_en: 我有一个弟弟。 Wǒ yǒu yī ge dìdi.
ex_en: 我们班有三十个学生，二十个女生，十个男生。每个学生都有一个书包和两本中文书。 Wǒmen bān yǒu sānshí ge xuésheng, èrshí ge nǚshēng, shí ge nánshēng. Měi ge xuésheng dōu yǒu yī ge shūbāo hé liǎng běn Zhōngwén shū.
ex_zh: Our class has thirty students: twenty girls and ten boys. Each student has one schoolbag and two Chinese books.

quote_en: 他想学功夫。 Tā xiǎng xué gōngfu.
ex_en: 我爸爸喜欢看功夫电影，他说中国功夫很有意思。我也想学功夫，可是妈妈说先好好学习，以后再学。 Wǒ bàba xǐhuan kàn gōngfu diànyǐng, tā shuō Zhōngguó gōngfu hěn yǒu yìsi. Wǒ yě xiǎng xué gōngfu, kěshì māma shuō xiān hǎohǎo xuéxí, yǐhòu zài xué.
ex_zh: My dad likes watching Kungfu movies. He says Chinese Kungfu is very interesting. I also want to learn Kungfu, but Mum says study well first and learn it later.

def_zh: 坐公共汽车；等公共汽车
quote_en: 我坐公共汽车上学。 Wǒ zuò gōnggòng qìchē shàngxué.
quote_zh: I take the bus to school.
ex_en: 每天早上七点我在车站等公共汽车。车票两块钱，用学生卡可以便宜一点。公共汽车上有很多人，有时候没有座位。 Měitiān zǎoshang qī diǎn wǒ zài chēzhàn děng gōnggòng qìchē. Chēpiào liǎng kuài qián, yòng xuésheng kǎ kěyǐ piányi yī diǎn. Gōnggòng qìchē shang yǒu hěn duō rén, yǒu shíhou méiyǒu zuòwèi.
ex_zh: Every morning at seven I wait for the bus at the bus stop. The ticket costs two yuan, and with a student card it can be a bit cheaper. There are many people on the bus, and sometimes there are no seats.

quote_en: 我每天做功课。 Wǒ měitiān zuò gōngkè.
ex_en: 今天的功课不多，只有数学和中文。我先做数学，然后写汉字，最后复习课文。做完功课以后我可以看一会儿电视。 Jīntiān de gōngkè bù duō, zhǐyǒu shùxué hé Zhōngwén. Wǒ xiān zuò shùxué, ránhòu xiě Hànzì, zuìhòu fùxí kèwén. Zuò wán gōngkè yǐhòu wǒ kěyǐ kàn yī huìr diànshì.
ex_zh: Today's homework is not much, only maths and Chinese. I do maths first, then write Chinese characters, and finally review the text. After finishing homework I can watch TV for a little while.

quote_en: 公园很美。 Gōngyuán hěn měi.
ex_en: 星期天我和朋友去公园玩。公园里有花、树、湖和很多鸟。我们走路、跑步、放风筝，还在湖边吃了点心。 Xīngqītiān wǒ hé péngyou qù gōngyuán wán. Gōngyuán li yǒu huā, shù, hú hé hěn duō niǎo. Wǒmen zǒulù, pǎobù, fàng fēngzheng, hái zài hú biān chī le diǎn xin.
ex_zh: On Sunday my friend and I went to the park to play. The park has flowers, trees, a lake, and many birds. We walked, ran, flew kites, and also ate snacks by the lake.

quote_en: 爸爸在工作。 Bàba zài gōngzuò.
ex_en: 妈妈在医院工作，她是医生。她每天工作八个小时，有时候很忙，不能回家吃晚饭。我希望以后也能找到一份好工作。 Māma zài yīyuàn gōngzuò, tā shì yīshēng. Tā měitiān gōngzuò bā ge xiǎoshí, yǒu shíhou hěn máng, bù néng huíjiā chī wǎnfàn. Wǒ xīwàng yǐhòu yě néng zhǎodào yī fèn hǎo gōngzuò.
ex_zh: Mum works at a hospital. She is a doctor. She works eight hours every day, and sometimes she is very busy and cannot come home for dinner. I hope to find a good job in the future too.

quote_en: 我家有一只狗。 Wǒ jiā yǒu yī zhī gǒu.
ex_en: 奶奶家的狗很可爱，白色的毛，大大的眼睛。每天下午我带它去公园走路，它很高兴，跑来跑去。 Nǎinai jiā de gǒu hěn kě'ài, bái sè de máo, dà dà de yǎnjing. Měitiān xiàwǔ wǒ dài tā qù gōngyuán zǒulù, tā hěn gāoxìng, pǎo lái pǎo qù.
ex_zh: Grandmother's dog is very cute, with white fur and big eyes. Every afternoon I take it to the park for a walk. It is very happy and runs around.

quote_en: 这个手机很贵。 Zhè ge shǒujī hěn guì.
quote_zh: This mobile phone is very expensive.
ex_en: 北京的东西不都很贵，有的很便宜。比如包子一块钱一个，但是烤鸭就比较贵，一只要一百多块钱。 Běijīng de dōng xi bù dōu hěn guì, yǒu de hěn piányi. Bǐrú bāo zi yī kuài qián yī ge, dànshì kǎo yā jiù bǐjiào guì, yī zhī yào yī bǎi duō kuài qián.
ex_zh: Not everything in Beijing is expensive; some things are cheap. For example, steamed buns are one yuan each, but roast duck is more expensive – one duck costs over one hundred yuan.

quote_en: 中国是个大国。 Zhōngguó shì ge dà guó.
ex_en: 新西兰是一个美丽的国家，有山、有海、有动物。中国也很大，有长城、北京、上海。每个国家都有自己的文化和节日。 Xīn Xīlán shì yī ge měilì de guójiā, yǒu shān, yǒu hǎi, yǒu dòngwù. Zhōngguó yě hěn dà, yǒu Chángchéng, Běijīng, Shànghǎi. Měi ge guójiā dōu yǒu zìjǐ de wénhuà hé jiérì.
ex_zh: New Zealand is a beautiful country with mountains, seas, and animals. China is also very big, with the Great Wall, Beijing, and Shanghai. Every country has its own culture and festivals.

quote_en: 我们要过春节。 Wǒmen yào guò Chūnjié.
quote_zh: We are going to celebrate the Spring Festival.
ex_en: 过马路的时候要小心，先看左边，再看右边，没有车了再走。昨天我和弟弟过马路去商店买果汁。 Guò mǎlù de shíhou yào xiǎoxīn, xiān kàn zuǒbian, zài kàn yòubian, méiyǒu chē le zài zǒu. Zuótiān wǒ hé dìdi guò mǎlù qù shāngdiàn mǎi guǒzhī.
ex_zh: When crossing the road, you need to be careful: first look left, then look right, and only walk when there are no cars. Yesterday my younger brother and I crossed the road to go to the shop to buy juice.

quote_en: 我想喝果汁。 Wǒ xiǎng hē guǒzhī.
quote_zh: I want to drink some juice.
ex_en: 妹妹每天早上喝一杯橙汁，我喝牛奶。妈妈说果汁有维生素，对身体好。但是不能喝太多，因为太甜了。 Mèimei měitiān zǎoshang hē yī bēi chéngzhī, wǒ hē niúnǎi. Māma shuō guǒzhī yǒu wéishēngsù, duì shēntǐ hǎo. Dànshì bù néng hē tài duō, yīnwèi tài tián le.
ex_zh: My younger sister drinks a glass of orange juice every morning, and I drink milk. Mum says juice has vitamins and is good for the body. But you can't drink too much because it is too sweet.

quote_en: 海边很美。 Hǎibiān hěn měi.
ex_en: 夏天我们全家去海边玩。爸爸游泳，妈妈在沙滩上看书，我和妹妹捡贝壳、堆沙子。我们在海边吃了海鲜和水果。 Xiàtiān wǒmen quánjiā qù hǎibiān wán. Bàba yóuyǒng, māma zài shātān shang kàn shū, wǒ hé mèimei jiǎn bèiké, duī shāzi. Wǒmen zài hǎibiān chī le hǎixiān hé shuǐguǒ.
ex_zh: In summer our whole family goes to the seaside to play. Dad swims, Mum reads a book on the beach, and my younger sister and I collect shells and build sandcastles. We ate seafood and fruit by the sea.

quote_en: 我会说一点汉语。 Wǒ huì shuō yī diǎn Hànyǔ.
quote_zh: I can speak a little Chinese.
ex_en: 我在学校学汉语，已经学了一年了。我会说“你好”、“谢谢”、“对不起”。我的汉语老师说我说得很好，我很高兴。 Wǒ zài xuéxiào xué Hànyǔ, yǐjīng xué le yī nián le. Wǒ huì shuō “nǐ hǎo”, “xièxie”, “duìbuqǐ”. Wǒ de Hànyǔ lǎoshī shuō wǒ shuō de hěn hǎo, wǒ hěn gāoxìng.
ex_zh: I study Chinese at school and have been studying for one year. I can say "hello," "thank you," and "sorry." My Chinese teacher says I speak very well, and I am very happy.

quote_en: 汉字很难写。 Hànzì hěn nán xiě.
quote_zh: Chinese characters are hard to write.
ex_en: 我每天写十个汉字，复习五个。我觉得汉字很有意思，有的像画一样。比如“山”字像山，“水”字像水。 Wǒ měitiān xiě shí ge Hànzì, fùxí wǔ ge. Wǒ juéde Hànzì hěn yǒu yìsi, yǒu de xiàng huà yīyàng. Bǐrú “shān” zì xiàng shān, “shuǐ” zì xiàng shuǐ.
ex_zh: I write ten Chinese characters every day and review five. I think Chinese characters are very interesting – some look like pictures. For example, the character for "mountain" looks like a mountain, and the character for "water" looks like water.

quote_en: 这本书很好。 Zhè běn shū hěn hǎo.
ex_en: 妈妈做的饭很好吃，爸爸说妈妈的手艺很好。我觉得一家人一起吃饭是一件很好的事情。 Māma zuò de fàn hěn hǎo chī, bàba shuō māma de shǒuyì hěn hǎo. Wǒ juéde yī jiā rén yìqǐ chī fàn shì yī jiàn hěn hǎo de shìqing.
ex_zh: The food Mum cooks is very delicious. Dad says Mum's cooking skills are very good. I think eating together as a family is a very good thing.

quote_en: 这个蛋糕很好吃。 Zhè ge dàngāo hěn hǎo chī.
ex_en: 北京烤鸭很好吃，皮脆脆的，肉嫩嫩的。我吃的时候用薄饼包起来，加点黄瓜和酱，非常好吃。 Běijīng kǎo yā hěn hǎo chī, pí cuì cuì de, ròu nèn nèn de. Wǒ chī de shíhou yòng báo bǐng bāo qǐlái, jiā diǎn huángguā hé jiàng, fēicháng hǎo chī.
ex_zh: Beijing roast duck is very delicious – the skin is crispy and the meat is tender. When I eat it, I wrap it in a thin pancake, add some cucumber and sauce – it is extremely delicious.

quote_en: 这件衣服很好看。 Zhè jiàn yīfu hěn hǎo kàn.
quote_zh: This piece of clothing is very good looking.
ex_en: 妹妹的新裙子是红色的，上面有白色的花，她穿上以后大家都说很好看。妈妈也说她很漂亮。 Mèimei de xīn qúnzi shì hóng sè de, shàngmian yǒu bái sè de huā, tā chuān shàng yǐhòu dàjiā dōu shuō hěn hǎo kàn. Māma yě shuō tā hěn piàoliang.
ex_zh: Younger sister's new skirt is red with white flowers on it. After she put it on, everyone said it looks very good. Mum also said she is very pretty.

quote_en: 这首歌很好听。 Zhè shǒu gē hěn hǎo tīng.
quote_zh: This song is very pleasant to hear.
ex_en: 姐姐会唱很多好听的中文歌，她常常在晚上唱歌给我听。我觉得她的声音很好听，像小鸟一样。 Jiějie huì chàng hěn duō hǎo tīng de Zhōngwén gē, tā chángcháng zài wǎnshang chàng gē gěi wǒ tīng. Wǒ juéde tā de shēngyīn hěn hǎo tīng, xiàng xiǎo niǎo yīyàng.
ex_zh: Older sister can sing many pleasant-sounding Chinese songs. She often sings to me in the evening. I think her voice is very pleasant to hear, like a little bird.

quote_en: 这个游戏很好玩。 Zhè ge yóuxì hěn hǎo wán.
ex_en: 星期六我和朋友去动物园看动物，熊猫吃竹子很好玩，猴子跳来跳去也很好玩。我们玩得很开心。 Xīngqīliù wǒ hé péngyou qù dòngwùyuán kàn dòngwù, xióngmāo chī zhúzi hěn hǎo wán, hóuzi tiào lái tiào qù yě hěn hǎo wán. Wǒmen wán de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: On Saturday my friend and I went to the zoo to see animals. The pandas eating bamboo was very fun, and the monkeys jumping around were also very fun. We had a great time.

quote_en: 今天几号？ Jīntiān jǐ hào?
quote_zh: What day of the month is today?
ex_en: 我的生日是五月三号。妈妈的生日是八月十五号。爸爸说十月一号是中国国庆节，那天很多人放假。 Wǒ de shēngrì shì wǔ yuè sān hào. Māma de shēngrì shì bā yuè shíwǔ hào. Bàba shuō shí yuè yī hào shì Zhōngguó guóqìng jié, nèi tiān hěn duō rén fàngjià.
ex_zh: My birthday is May 3rd. Mum's birthday is August 15th. Dad says October 1st is China's National Day, and many people have a holiday on that day.

quote_en: 我想喝水。 Wǒ xiǎng hē shuǐ.
ex_en: 天很热的时候我喜欢喝冰水，但是妈妈说喝太多冰水对身体不好。冬天我常常喝热茶，觉得很舒服。 Tiān hěn rè de shíhou wǒ xǐhuan hē bīng shuǐ, dànshì māma shuō hē tài duō bīng shuǐ duì shēntǐ bù hǎo. Dōngtiān wǒ chángcháng hē rè chá, juéde hěn shūfu.
ex_zh: When the weather is very hot, I like to drink ice water, but Mum says drinking too much ice water is bad for the body. In winter I often drink hot tea and feel very comfortable.

quote_en: 这条河很长。 Zhè tiáo hé hěn cháng.
ex_en: 我家旁边有一条小河，河水很干净。夏天我和弟弟去河边玩，但是妈妈说不可以下水，因为太危险了。 Wǒ jiā pángbiān yǒu yī tiáo xiǎo hé, hé shuǐ hěn gānjìng. Xiàtiān wǒ hé dìdi qù hé biān wán, dànshì māma shuō bù kěyǐ xià shuǐ, yīnwèi tài wēixiǎn le.
ex_zh: Next to my home there is a small river. The river water is very clean. In summer my younger brother and I go to play by the river, but Mum says we cannot go into the water because it is too dangerous.

quote_en: 他穿黑色裤子。 Tā chuān hēi sè kùzi.
ex_en: 爸爸的车是黑色的，很干净。妈妈不喜欢黑色，她喜欢红色和白色。我的书包是黑色的，因为不容易脏。 Bàba de chē shì hēi sè de, hěn gānjìng. Māma bù xǐhuan hēi sè, tā xǐhuan hóng sè hé bái sè. Wǒ de shūbāo shì hēi sè de, yīnwèi bù róngyì zāng.
ex_zh: Dad's car is black and very clean. Mum doesn't like black; she likes red and white. My schoolbag is black because it doesn't get dirty easily.

quote_en: 过年的时候我收到很多红包。 Guònián de shíhou wǒ shōudào hěn duō hóngbāo.
quote_zh: During New Year I receive many red envelopes.
ex_en: 春节的时候长辈给小孩子发红包，红包里面有钱。我把红包里的钱存起来，以后买书和礼物。 Chūnjié de shíhou zhǎngbèi gěi xiǎohái zi fā hóngbāo, hóngbāo lǐmian yǒu qián. Wǒ bǎ hóngbāo lǐ de qián cún qǐlái, yǐhòu mǎi shū hé lǐwù.
ex_zh: During Spring Festival, elders give red envelopes to children. There is money inside the red envelopes. I save the money from the red envelopes to buy books and gifts later.

quote_en: 她喜欢红色。 Tā xǐhuan hóng sè.
ex_en: 中国的国旗是红色的，有五个黄色的星星。春节的时候人们喜欢穿红色的衣服，因为红色代表好运。 Zhōngguó de guóqí shì hóng sè de, yǒu wǔ ge huáng sè de xīngxing. Chūnjié de shíhou rénmen xǐhuan chuān hóng sè de yīfu, yīnwèi hóng sè dàibiǎo hǎo yùn.
ex_zh: China's national flag is red with five yellow stars. During Spring Festival people like to wear red clothes because red represents good luck.

quote_en: 学校在我家后边。 Xuéxiào zài wǒ jiā hòu bian.
quote_zh: The school is behind my home.
ex_en: 我坐在教室的后边，前面是妹妹，左边是朋友。老师写字的时候我看不太清楚，所以我要戴眼镜。 Wǒ zuò zài jiàoshì de hòu bian, qiánmian shì mèimei, zuǒbian shì péngyou. Lǎoshī xiě zì de shíhou wǒ kàn bù tài qīngchu, suǒyǐ wǒ yào dài yǎnjìng.
ex_zh: I sit at the back of the classroom. In front of me is my younger sister, and on my left is my friend. When the teacher writes, I can't see very clearly, so I need to wear glasses.

quote_en: 这朵花很漂亮。 Zhè duǒ huā hěn piàoliang.
ex_en: 春天公园里开了很多花，有红色的、黄色的、白色的。妈妈喜欢花，我常常买花送给她。 Chūntiān gōngyuán li kāi le hěn duō huā, yǒu hóng sè de, huáng sè de, bái sè de. Māma xǐhuan huā, wǒ chángcháng mǎi huā sòng gěi tā.
ex_zh: In spring, many flowers bloom in the park – red, yellow, and white. Mum likes flowers, so I often buy flowers and give them to her.

quote_en: 我家有一个小花园。 Wǒ jiā yǒu yī ge xiǎo huāyuán.
quote_zh: My home has a small garden.
ex_en: 奶奶在花园里种了很多花和菜。每天早上去花园浇水、拔草。花园里的花很好看，菜也很好吃。 Nǎinai zài huāyuán li zhòng le hěn duō huā hé cài. Měitiān zǎoshang qù huāyuán jiāo shuǐ, bá cǎo. Huāyuán li de huā hěn hǎo kàn, cài yě hěn hǎo chī.
ex_zh: Grandmother plants many flowers and vegetables in the garden. Every morning she goes to the garden to water and pull weeds. The flowers in the garden are very pretty, and the vegetables are very delicious.

quote_en: 妹妹喜欢画画。 Mèimei xǐhuan huà huà.
ex_en: 我画了一幅画送给妈妈，画上有山、河、花和太阳。妈妈把画贴在墙上，说我画得很好。 Wǒ huà le yī fú huà sòng gěi māma, huà shang yǒu shān, hé, huā hé tàiyáng. Māma bǎ huà tiē zài qiáng shang, shuō wǒ huà de hěn hǎo.
ex_zh: I drew a picture to give to Mum. In the picture there are mountains, a river, flowers, and the sun. Mum put the picture on the wall and said I drew very well.

quote_en: 欢迎来我家！ Huānyíng lái wǒ jiā!
ex_en: 老师欢迎新同学来我们班，大家鼓掌说“欢迎欢迎”。新同学很开心，说她很高兴认识大家。 Lǎoshī huānyíng xīn tóngxué lái wǒmen bān, dàjiā gǔzhǎng shuō “huānyíng huānyíng”. Xīn tóngxué hěn kāixīn, shuō tā hěn gāoxìng rènshi dàjiā.
ex_zh: The teacher welcomed the new classmate to our class. Everyone applauded and said "welcome, welcome." The new classmate was very happy and said she was very happy to meet everyone.

quote_en: 她穿黄色裙子。 Tā chuān huáng sè qúnzi.
quote_zh: She is wearing a yellow skirt.
ex_en: 秋天的树叶变成黄色和红色，很漂亮。我和弟弟在公园里捡黄色的叶子，回家做书签。 Qiūtiān de shùyè biàn chéng huáng sè hé hóng sè, hěn piàoliang. Wǒ hé dìdi zài gōngyuán li jiǎn huáng sè de yèzi, huíjiā zuò shūqiān.
ex_zh: In autumn, tree leaves turn yellow and red – very beautiful. My younger brother and I pick up yellow leaves in the park and take them home to make bookmarks.

def_en: to go home, to return home
quote_en: 我每天五点回家。 Wǒ měitiān wǔ diǎn huíjiā.
quote_zh: I go home at five every day.
ex_en: 放学后我和朋友先打一会儿篮球，然后一起走路回家。到家以后我跟妈妈说“我回来了”，妈妈会说“快去洗手吃饭”。 Fàngxué hòu wǒ hé péngyou xiān dǎ yī huìr lánqiú, ránhòu yìqǐ zǒulù huíjiā. Dào jiā yǐhòu wǒ gēn māma shuō “wǒ huílái le”, māma huì shuō “kuài qù xǐ shǒu chī fàn”.
ex_zh: After school, my friend and I first play basketball for a while, then walk home together. When I get home, I say to Mum "I'm back," and Mum says "go wash your hands and eat."

quote_en: 我会说中文。 Wǒ huì shuō Zhōngwén.
ex_en: 爸爸会开车，也会做饭，但是他不会游泳。妈妈每周一上午去学校开会，下午才回家。 Bàba huì kāi chē, yě huì zuò fàn, dànshì tā bù huì yóuyǒng. Māma měi zhōu yī shàngwǔ qù xuéxiào kāi huì, xiàwǔ cái huíjiā.
ex_zh: Dad can drive and can cook, but he cannot swim. Mum goes to meetings at school every Monday morning and doesn't come home until the afternoon.

quote_en: 今天有活动。 Jīntiān yǒu huódòng.
ex_en: 我们学校有很多活动，比如打篮球、唱歌、画画。我参加了中文活动，和同学们一起学写汉字、唱中文歌。 Wǒmen xuéxiào yǒu hěn duō huódòng, bǐrú dǎ lánqiú, chàng gē, huà huà. Wǒ cānjiā le Zhōngwén huódòng, hé tóngxué men yìqǐ xué xiě Hànzì, chàng Zhōngwén gē.
ex_zh: Our school has many activities, such as playing basketball, singing, and drawing. I joined a Chinese activity, learning to write Chinese characters and sing Chinese songs with my classmates.

quote_en: 火车很快。 Huǒchē hěn kuài.
ex_en: 去年我和妈妈坐火车从北京到上海。火车上有餐厅、厕所，还可以睡觉。我坐在窗边看外面的山、河和农田。 Qùnián wǒ hé māma zuò huǒchē cóng Běijīng dào Shànghǎi. Huǒchē shang yǒu cāntīng, cèsuǒ, hái kěyǐ shuìjiào. Wǒ zuò zài chuāng biān kàn wàimian de shān, hé hé nóngtián.
ex_zh: Last year Mum and I took the train from Beijing to Shanghai. On the train there was a dining car, toilets, and we could also sleep. I sat by the window looking at the mountains, rivers, and farmland outside.

quote_en: 火车站在东边。 Huǒchēzhàn zài dōng bian.
quote_zh: The train station is in the east.
ex_en: 火车站里有很多人，有的在等车，有的在买票。我和爸爸到火车站的时候，火车已经到了，我们马上上车找座位。 Huǒchēzhàn li yǒu hěn duō rén, yǒu de zài děng chē, yǒu de zài mǎi piào. Wǒ hé bàba dào huǒchēzhàn de shíhou, huǒchē yǐjīng dào le, wǒmen mǎshàng shàng chē zhǎo zuòwèi.
ex_zh: There are many people at the train station – some waiting for the train, some buying tickets. When Dad and I arrived at the station, the train had already arrived, so we immediately got on and found seats.

quote_en: 新西兰有火山。 Xīn Xīlán yǒu huǒshān.
ex_en: 北岛有一座很大的火山，但是很久没有喷发了。老师带我们去那里看火山口，我觉得很害怕，也很好玩。 Běi Dǎo yǒu yī zuò hěn dà de huǒshān, dànshì hěn jiǔ méiyǒu pēnfā le. Lǎoshī dài wǒmen qù nàlǐ kàn huǒshān kǒu, wǒ juéde hěn hàipà, yě hěn hǎo wán.
ex_zh: There is a very large volcano in the North Island, but it hasn't erupted for a long time. The teacher took us there to see the volcano crater. I felt very scared but also very interested.

quote_en: 我每天吃一个鸡蛋。 Wǒ měitiān chī yī ge jīdàn.
quote_zh: I eat one egg every day.
ex_en: 妈妈早上给我做炒鸡蛋和面包，很好吃。奶奶说鸡蛋对身体好，让我多吃。弟弟不喜欢吃鸡蛋，他喜欢喝牛奶。 Māma zǎoshang gěi wǒ zuò chǎo jīdàn hé miànbāo, hěn hǎo chī. Nǎinai shuō jīdàn duì shēntǐ hǎo, ràng wǒ duō chī. Dìdi bù xǐhuan chī jīdàn, tā xǐhuan hē niúnǎi.
ex_zh: Mum makes me scrambled eggs and bread in the morning; it's very delicious. Grandmother says eggs are good for the body and tells me to eat more. My younger brother doesn't like eating eggs; he likes drinking milk.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃鸡肉。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī jīròu.
ex_en: 星期天爸爸做了炒鸡肉和米饭。鸡肉很好吃，我吃了两碗米饭。妹妹不吃鸡肉，她吃鱼和菜。 Xīngqītiān bàba zuò le chǎo jīròu hé mǐfàn. Jīròu hěn hǎo chī, wǒ chī le liǎng wǎn mǐfàn. Mèimei bù chī jīròu, tā chī yú hé cài.
ex_zh: On Sunday Dad made stir-fried chicken and rice. The chicken was very delicious; I ate two bowls of rice. My younger sister doesn't eat chicken; she eats fish and vegetables.

def_en: how many, how much (for a small number)?
quote_en: 你有几个弟弟？ Nǐ yǒu jǐ ge dìdi?
quote_zh: How many younger brothers do you have?
ex_en: 妈妈买了几个苹果？她买了三个。你几岁？我十岁。今天星期几？今天星期三。 Māma mǎi le jǐ ge píngguǒ? Tā mǎi le sān ge. Nǐ jǐ suì? Wǒ shí suì. Jīntiān xīngqī jǐ? Jīntiān xīngqīsān.
ex_zh: How many apples did Mum buy? She bought three. How old are you? I am ten. What day of the week is it today? Today is Wednesday.

quote_en: 现在几点？ Xiànzài jǐ diǎn?
ex_en: 你每天早上几点起床？我六点起床。我们几点去学校？我们七点半从家走，八点到学校。 Nǐ měitiān zǎoshang jǐ diǎn qǐchuáng? Wǒ liù diǎn qǐchuáng. Wǒmen jǐ diǎn qù xuéxiào? Wǒmen qī diǎn bàn cóng jiā zǒu, bā diǎn dào xuéxiào.
ex_zh: What time do you get up every morning? I get up at six. What time do we go to school? We leave home at 7:30 and arrive at school at 8:00.

quote_en: 今天几号？ Jīntiān jǐ hào?
ex_en: 你的生日是几号？我的生日是五月十五号。妈妈的生日是几号？妈妈的生日是八月二号。 Nǐ de shēngrì shì jǐ hào? Wǒ de shēngrì shì wǔ yuè shíwǔ hào. Māma de shēngrì shì jǐ hào? Māma de shēngrì shì bā yuè èr hào.
ex_zh: What date is your birthday? My birthday is May 15th. What date is Mum's birthday? Mum's birthday is August 2nd.

quote_en: 你几岁？ Nǐ jǐ suì?
ex_en: 弟弟今年五岁，他问我几岁，我说我十岁，他比我小五岁。妹妹三岁，她还不会写字。 Dìdi jīnnián wǔ suì, tā wèn wǒ jǐ suì, wǒ shuō wǒ shí suì, tā bǐ wǒ xiǎo wǔ suì. Mèimei sān suì, tā hái bù huì xiě zì.
ex_zh: My younger brother is five this year. He asked me how old I am. I said I am ten. He is five years younger than me. My younger sister is three; she can't write yet.

quote_en: 我家在北京。 Wǒ jiā zài Běijīng.
ex_en: 我家有五口人：爸爸、妈妈、哥哥、妹妹和我。我们的家不大，但是很干净、很舒服。我很爱我的家。 Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén: bàba, māma, gēge, mèimei hé wǒ. Wǒmen de jiā bù dà, dànshì hěn gānjìng, hěn shūfu. Wǒ hěn ài wǒ de jiā.
ex_zh: My family has five people: Dad, Mum, older brother, younger sister, and me. Our home is not big, but it is very clean and very comfortable. I love my family very much.

quote_en: 我爱我的家人。 Wǒ ài wǒ de jiā rén.
ex_en: 每个周末我和家人一起吃饭、看电视。有时候我们去公园走路。我的家人都很友好，我很高兴有他们。 Měi ge zhōumò wǒ hé jiā rén yìqǐ chī fàn, kàn diànshì. Yǒu shíhou wǒmen qù gōngyuán zǒulù. Wǒ de jiā rén dōu hěn yǒuhǎo, wǒ hěn gāoxìng yǒu tāmen.
ex_zh: Every weekend I eat and watch TV with my family members. Sometimes we go for a walk in the park. All my family members are very friendly, and I am very happy to have them.

def_en: measure word for items such as clothes
quote_en: 我买了一件新衣服。 Wǒ mǎi le yī jiàn xīn yīfu.
quote_zh: I bought a new piece of clothing.
ex_en: 妈妈给我买了两件上衣和一条裤子。有一件是白色的，很好看。还有一件事：明天有考试，我要好好复习。 Māma gěi wǒ mǎi le liǎng jiàn shàngyī hé yī tiáo kùzi. Yǒu yī jiàn shì bái sè de, hěn hǎo kàn. Hái yǒu yī jiàn shì: míngtiān yǒu kǎoshì, wǒ yào hǎohǎo fùxí.
ex_zh: Mum bought me two tops and one pair of trousers. One top is white and very good-looking. Also, one more thing: there is an exam tomorrow, and I need to review well.

quote_en: 爷爷身体很健康。 Yéye shēntǐ hěn jiànkāng.
ex_en: 每天运动对身体好，可以让我们更健康。我早上跑步，下午打球，晚上早点睡觉。妈妈说我越来越健康了。 Měitiān yùndòng duì shēntǐ hǎo, kěyǐ ràng wǒmen gèng jiànkāng. Wǒ zǎoshang pǎobù, xiàwǔ dǎ qiú, wǎnshang zǎo diǎn shuìjiào. Māma shuō wǒ yuè lái yuè jiànkāng le.
ex_zh: Exercising every day is good for the body and can make us healthier. I run in the morning, play ball games in the afternoon, and go to bed early at night. Mum says I am getting healthier and healthier.

quote_en: 我们星期天见面吧。 Wǒmen xīngqītiān jiànmiàn ba.
quote_zh: Let's meet in person on Sunday.
ex_en: 我和好朋友很久没见面了，因为他在北岛上学。下个月他要来我家，我们可以见面一起玩、一起吃饭。 Wǒ hé hǎo péngyou hěn jiǔ méi jiànmiàn le, yīnwèi tā zài Běi Dǎo shàngxué. Xià ge yuè tā yào lái wǒ jiā, wǒmen kěyǐ jiànmiàn yìqǐ wán, yìqǐ chī fàn.
ex_zh: My good friend and I haven't met in person for a long time because he goes to school in the North Island. Next month he will come to my home, and we can meet, play together, and eat together.

quote_en: 你叫什么名字？ Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?
ex_en: 我的中文老师叫王老师，他来自北京。我的好朋友叫小明，他今年十二岁。我们家的小狗叫白白，因为它是白色的。 Wǒ de Zhōngwén lǎoshī jiào Wáng lǎoshī, tā láizì Běijīng. Wǒ de hǎo péngyou jiào Xiǎo Míng, tā jīnnián shí'èr suì. Wǒmen jiā de xiǎo gǒu jiào Bái Bái, yīnwèi tā shì bái sè de.
ex_zh: My Chinese teacher's name is Teacher Wang. He comes from Beijing. My good friend's name is Xiao Ming; he is twelve this year. Our family's little dog is called Bai Bai because it is white.

quote_en: 教室很干净。 Jiàoshì hěn gānjìng.
ex_en: 我们的教室在教学楼三层，里面有三十张桌子、三十把椅子、一块黑板和一台电脑。每天我们在教室上课、写字、听老师说话。 Wǒmen de jiàoshì zài jiàoxué lóu sān céng, lǐmiàn yǒu sānshí zhāng zhuōzi, sānshí bǎ yǐzi, yī kuài hēibǎn hé yī tái diànnǎo. Měitiān wǒmen zài jiàoshì shàngkè, xiě zì, tīng lǎoshī shuōhuà.
ex_zh: Our classroom is on the third floor of the teaching building. Inside there are thirty desks, thirty chairs, a blackboard, and a computer. Every day we have class, write, and listen to the teacher talk in the classroom.

quote_en: 我爱吃饺子。 Wǒ ài chī jiǎo zi.
ex_en: 春节的时候我们家包饺子。妈妈做皮，爸爸做馅，我和妹妹一起包。饺子很好吃，我们做了很多，大家都很开心。 Chūnjié de shíhou wǒmen jiā bāo jiǎo zi. Māma zuò pí, bàba zuò xiàn, wǒ hé mèimei yìqǐ bāo. Jiǎo zi hěn hǎo chī, wǒmen zuò le hěn duō, dàjiā dōu hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: During Spring Festival our family makes dumplings. Mum makes the wrappers, Dad makes the filling, and my younger sister and I make the dumplings together. The dumplings are very delicious; we made many, and everyone was very happy.

def_en: measure word for number of classes
quote_en: 今天有三节课。 Jīntiān yǒu sān jié kè.
ex_en: 上午我们有四节课：第一节是中文，第二节是数学，第三节是体育，第四节是科学。每节课四十分钟。 Shàngwǔ wǒmen yǒu sì jié kè: dì yī jié shì Zhōngwén, dì èr jié shì shùxué, dì sān jié shì tǐyù, dì sì jié shì kēxué. Měi jié kè sìshí fēn zhōng.
ex_zh: In the morning we have four lessons: the first is Chinese, the second is maths, the third is PE, and the fourth is science. Each lesson is forty minutes long.

quote_en: 春节是一个重要的节日。 Chūnjié shì yī ge zhòngyào de jiérì.
quote_zh: Spring Festival is an important festival.
ex_en: 中国有很多节日，比如春节、中秋节。新西兰也有节日，比如圣诞节。节日的时候家人一起吃饭、送礼物，大家都很开心。 Zhōngguó yǒu hěn duō jiérì, bǐrú Chūnjié, Zhōngqiū Jié. Xīn Xīlán yě yǒu jiérì, bǐrú Shèngdàn Jié. Jiérì de shíhou jiā rén yìqǐ chī fàn, sòng lǐwù, dàjiā dōu hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: China has many festivals, such as Spring Festival and Mid-Autumn Festival. New Zealand also has festivals, such as Christmas. During festivals, family members eat together and give gifts; everyone is very happy.

quote_en: 姐姐在大学学习。 Jiějie zài dàxué xuéxí.
quote_zh: My older sister is studying at university.
ex_en: 姐姐比我大三岁，她常常教我数学和中文。我很喜欢和姐姐一起看电视、吃饭。姐姐对我很好。 Jiějie bǐ wǒ dà sān suì, tā chángcháng jiāo wǒ shùxué hé Zhōngwén. Wǒ hěn xǐhuan hé jiějie yìqǐ kàn diànshì, chī fàn. Jiějie duì wǒ hěn hǎo.
ex_zh: My older sister is three years older than me. She often teaches me maths and Chinese. I really like watching TV and eating with my older sister. My older sister is very good to me.

quote_en: 今年我十岁。 Jīnnián wǒ shí suì.
quote_zh: This year I am ten years old.
ex_en: 今年夏天我们全家去南岛玩。南岛的山很高，湖很蓝，很好玩。明年我还要去。 Jīnnián xiàtiān wǒmen quánjiā qù Nán Dǎo wán. Nán Dǎo de shān hěn gāo, hú hěn lán, hěn hǎo wán. Míngnián wǒ hái yào qù.
ex_zh: This summer our whole family went to the South Island to play. The South Island's mountains are very high, the lakes are very blue, and it was very fun. Next year I want to go again.

quote_en: 今天很冷。 Jīntiān hěn lěng.
ex_en: 今天早上我七点起床，吃了面包和鸡蛋，然后去学校。今天下午有中文课，我要好好学习。今天晚上爸爸要回家吃饭。 Jīntiān zǎoshang wǒ qī diǎn qǐchuáng, chī le miànbāo hé jīdàn, ránhòu qù xuéxiào. Jīntiān xiàwǔ yǒu Zhōngwén kè, wǒ yào hǎohǎo xuéxí. Jīntiān wǎnshang bàba yào huíjiā chī fàn.
ex_zh: This morning I got up at seven, ate bread and eggs, and then went to school. This afternoon there is Chinese class; I will study hard. Tonight Dad will come home for dinner.

quote_en: 我家离学校很近。 Wǒ jiā lí xuéxiào hěn jìn.
quote_zh: My home is very close to the school.
ex_en: 从我家到车站很近，走路只要五分钟。但是到飞机场很远，开车要一个小时。我喜欢住在近的地方，很方便。 Cóng wǒ jiā dào chēzhàn hěn jìn, zǒulù zhǐ yào wǔ fēn zhōng. Dànshì dào fēijīchǎng hěn yuǎn, kāi chē yào yī ge xiǎoshí. Wǒ xǐhuan zhù zài jìn de dìfang, hěn fāngbiàn.
ex_zh: From my home to the bus stop is very close, only a five-minute walk. But to the airport is very far, a one-hour drive. I like living in a close place – it's very convenient.

quote_en: 你的中文有进步。 Nǐ de Zhōngwén yǒu jìnbù.
ex_en: 老师说我这学期进步很大，因为每天写汉字、复习功课。妈妈也很高兴，说我要继续努力，不要停下来。 Lǎoshī shuō wǒ zhè xuéqī jìnbù hěn dà, yīnwèi měitiān xiě Hànzì, fùxí gōngkè. Māma yě hěn gāoxìng, shuō wǒ yào jìxù nǔlì, bùyào tíng xiàlái.
ex_zh: The teacher said I have made great progress this semester because I write Chinese characters and review homework every day. Mum is also very happy and says I need to continue working hard and not stop.

quote_en: 现在九点。 Xiànzài jiǔ diǎn.
ex_en: 我有九个苹果，给弟弟三个，给妹妹两个，我自己吃一个，还有三个留给妈妈。 Wǒ yǒu jiǔ ge píngguǒ, gěi dìdi sān ge, gěi mèimei liǎng ge, wǒ zìjǐ chī yī ge, hái yǒu sān ge liú gěi māma.
ex_zh: I have nine apples. I give three to my younger brother, two to my younger sister, I eat one myself, and there are three left for Mum.

quote_en: 我觉得今天很冷。 Wǒ juéde jīntiān hěn lěng.
quote_zh: I feel that today is very cold.
ex_en: 你觉得这部电影怎么样？我觉得很有意思。弟弟觉得有点害怕，因为他太小了。 Nǐ juéde zhè bù diànyǐng zěnme yàng? Wǒ juéde hěn yǒu yìsi. Dìdi juéde yǒudiǎn hàipà, yīnwèi tā tài xiǎo le.
ex_zh: What do you think of this movie? I think it's very interesting. My younger brother thinks it's a bit scary because he is too young.

quote_en: 爸爸每天开车上班。 Bàba měitiān kāi chē shàngbān.
quote_zh: Dad drives to work every day.
ex_en: 我不会开车，因为我还小。但是我会骑自行车。妈妈说等我长大了可以学开车，但是要先考驾照。 Wǒ bù huì kāi chē, yīnwèi wǒ hái xiǎo. Dànshì wǒ huì qí zìxíngchē. Māma shuō děng wǒ zhǎng dà le kěyǐ xué kāi chē, dànshì yào xiān kǎo jiàzhào.
ex_zh: I don't know how to drive because I am still young. But I can ride a bicycle. Mum says when I grow up I can learn to drive, but first I need to get a driver's license.

quote_en: 老师正在开会。 Lǎoshī zhèngzài kāi huì.
quote_zh: The teacher is having a meeting.
ex_en: 明天下午学校要开会，所有的老师都要去。学生不用去，可以在教室看书或者画画。 Xiàwǔ xuéxiào yào kāi huì, suǒyǒu de lǎoshī dōu yào qù. Xuésheng bùyòng qù, kěyǐ zài jiàoshì kàn shū huòzhě huà huà.
ex_zh: Tomorrow afternoon the school will have a meeting, and all the teachers must go. Students don't need to go; they can read books or draw in the classroom.

quote_en: 电影开始了。 Diànyǐng kāishǐ le.
ex_en: 每天早上八点开始上课。我们先读课文，然后写汉字。下午两点开始做功课，四点开始打球。 Wǒmen xiān dú kèwén, ránhòu xiě Hànzì. Xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn kāishǐ zuò gōngkè, sì diǎn kāishǐ dǎ qiú.
ex_zh: Every morning class starts at eight. We first read the text, then write Chinese characters. At two in the afternoon we start doing homework, and at four we start playing ball games.

quote_en: 我今天很开心。 Wǒ jīntiān hěn kāixīn.
ex_en: 妈妈收到我送的礼物，她很开心，抱了抱我。爸爸看到我们开心，他也笑了。我们一家人在一起真开心。 Māma shōudào wǒ sòng de lǐwù, tā hěn kāixīn, bào le bào wǒ. Bàba kàndào wǒmen kāixīn, tā yě xiào le. Wǒmen yī jiā rén zài yìqǐ zhēn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Mum received the gift I gave her. She was very happy and hugged me. Dad saw us happy, and he also smiled. Our whole family being together is truly happy.

def_en: to look at, to read, to visit, to watch
quote_en: 我爱看书。 Wǒ ài kàn shū.
ex_en: 每天晚上我看电视新闻，然后看半小时中文书。星期天我去看爷爷奶奶，他们很高兴。 Měitiān wǎnshang wǒ kàn diànshì xīnwén, ránhòu kàn bàn xiǎoshí Zhōngwén shū. Xīngqītiān wǒ qù kàn yéye nǎinai, tāmen hěn gāoxìng.
ex_zh: Every evening I watch TV news, then read Chinese books for half an hour. On Sunday I go to visit my grandparents, and they are very happy.

quote_en: 明天有考试。 Míngtiān yǒu kǎoshì.
ex_en: 我昨天考了中文考试，题目不难。我觉得考得不错，应该能得九十分。妈妈说我考得好就给我买礼物。 Wǒ zuótiān kǎo le Zhōngwén kǎoshì, tímù bù nán. Wǒ juéde kǎo de bùcuò, yīnggāi néng dé jiǔshí fēn. Māma shuō wǒ kǎo de hǎo jiù gěi wǒ mǎi lǐwù.
ex_zh: Yesterday I took the Chinese exam. The questions were not hard. I think I did well and should get ninety points. Mum said if I do well she will buy me a gift.

quote_en: 我喜欢科学。 Wǒ xǐhuan kēxué.
ex_en: 今天下午有科学课，老师教我们认识动物和植物。我觉得科学很有意思，可以知道很多为什么。 Jīntiān xiàwǔ yǒu kēxué kè, lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen rènshi dòngwù hé zhíwù. Wǒ juéde kēxué hěn yǒu yìsi, kěyǐ zhīdào hěn duō wèishénme.
ex_zh: This afternoon there is a science lesson. The teacher teaches us to recognize animals and plants. I think science is very interesting; it lets me know a lot about why things happen.

quote_en: 我渴了，想喝水。 Wǒ kě le, xiǎng hē shuǐ.
quote_zh: I am thirsty and want to drink water.
ex_en: 今天打球以后我很渴，喝了一大杯水。妹妹也很渴，她喝了果汁。妈妈说运动以后要多喝水。 Jīntiān dǎ qiú yǐhòu wǒ hěn kě, hē le yī dà bēi shuǐ. Mèimei yě hěn kě, tā hē le guǒzhī. Māma shuō yùndòng yǐhòu yào duō hē shuǐ.
ex_zh: After playing ball games today I was very thirsty and drank a big glass of water. My younger sister was also thirsty; she drank juice. Mum says after exercising you need to drink more water.

quote_en: 小狗很可爱。 Xiǎo gǒu hěn kě'ài.
quote_zh: The little dog is very cute.
ex_en: 妹妹有一个可爱的玩具熊，是白色的，眼睛大大的。她每天晚上抱着它睡觉。我觉得妹妹也很可爱。 Mèimei yǒu yī ge kě'ài de wánjù xióng, shì bái sè de, yǎnjing dà dà de. Tā měitiān wǎnshang bào zhe tā shuìjiào. Wǒ juéde mèimei yě hěn kě'ài.
ex_zh: My younger sister has a cute toy bear. It is white with big eyes. She hugs it every night when she sleeps. I think my younger sister is also very cute.

quote_en: 我想喝可乐。 Wǒ xiǎng hē kělè.
ex_en: 星期天我和朋友去看电影，我们买了可乐和爆米花。妈妈说不可以喝太多可乐，因为对身体不好。 Xīngqītiān wǒ hé péngyou qù kàn diànyǐng, wǒmen mǎi le kělè hé bàomǐhuā. Māma shuō bù kěyǐ hē tài duō kělè, yīnwèi duì shēntǐ bù hǎo.
ex_zh: On Sunday my friend and I went to watch a movie. We bought Coke and popcorn. Mum says you can't drink too much Coke because it's bad for your health.

quote_en: 第一节是中文课。 Dì yī jié shì Zhōngwén kè.
ex_en: 今天我们有四节课：中文、数学、科学和体育。我最喜欢体育课，因为可以打球和跑步。 Jīntiān wǒmen yǒu sì jié kè: Zhōngwén, shùxué, kēxué hé tǐyù. Wǒ zuì xǐhuan tǐyù kè, yīnwèi kěyǐ dǎ qiú hé pǎobù.
ex_zh: Today we have four lessons: Chinese, maths, science, and PE. I like PE class the most because I can play ball games and run.

quote_en: 我家有五口人。 Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
ex_en: 奶奶家只有两口人：奶奶和爷爷。我家有五口人。朋友家有三口人：爸爸、妈妈和他。 Nǎinai jiā zhǐyǒu liǎng kǒu rén: nǎinai hé yéye. Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén. Péngyou jiā yǒu sān kǒu rén: bàba, māma hé tā.
ex_zh: Grandmother's home has only two people: Grandmother and Grandfather. My home has five people. My friend's home has three people: Dad, Mum, and him.

quote_en: 他穿黑色裤子。 Tā chuān hēi sè kùzi.
ex_en: 妈妈给我买了一条新裤子，是蓝色的。我穿上以后觉得很好看。弟弟也想要一条，妈妈说下个月给他买。 Māma gěi wǒ mǎi le yī tiáo xīn kùzi, shì lán sè de. Wǒ chuān shàng yǐhòu juéde hěn hǎo kàn. Dìdi yě xiǎng yào yī tiáo, māma shuō xià ge yuè gěi tā mǎi.
ex_zh: Mum bought me a new pair of trousers. They are blue. After I put them on, I thought they look very good. My younger brother also wants a pair; Mum says she will buy them for him next month.

quote_en: 我吃了一块蛋糕。 Wǒ chī le yī kuài dàngāo.
quote_zh: I ate a piece of cake.
ex_en: 这个苹果一块钱一个，我买了三个，花了三块钱。妈妈买了一块蛋糕，花了二十块钱。蛋糕很好吃。 Zhè ge píngguǒ yī kuài qián yī ge, wǒ mǎi le sān ge, huā le sān kuài qián. Māma mǎi le yī kuài dàngāo, huā le èrshí kuài qián. Dàngāo hěn hǎo chī.
ex_zh: This apple is one yuan each. I bought three and spent three yuan. Mum bought a piece of cake and spent twenty yuan. The cake was very delicious.

quote_en: 火车很快。 Huǒchē hěn kuài.
ex_en: 弟弟跑得很快，我追不上他。但是爸爸开车更快。我们要快一点，不然要迟到了。 Dìdi pǎo de hěn kuài, wǒ zhuī bù shàng tā. Dànshì bàba kāi chē gèng kuài. Wǒmen yào kuài yī diǎn, bùrán yào chídào le.
ex_zh: My younger brother runs very fast; I can't catch him. But Dad drives even faster. We need to be a bit faster, otherwise we will be late.

quote_en: 祝你生日快乐！ Zhù nǐ shēngrì kuàilè!
ex_en: 和家人一起吃饭、看电视、聊天，我觉得很快乐。朋友也说我是一个快乐的人。新年快乐！ Hé jiā rén yìqǐ chī fàn, kàn diànshì, liáo tiān, wǒ juéde hěn kuàilè. Péngyou yě shuō wǒ shì yī ge kuàilè de rén. Xīnnián kuàilè!
ex_zh: Eating, watching TV, and chatting with family members makes me feel very happy. My friends also say I am a happy person. Happy New Year!

quote_en: 请来我家玩。 Qǐng lái wǒ jiā wán.
quote_zh: Please come to my home to play.
ex_en: 明天我的朋友要来我家，我们一起做功课，然后打球。妈妈很高兴，说要做好吃的给我们吃。 Míngtiān wǒ de péngyou yào lái wǒ jiā, wǒmen yìqǐ zuò gōngkè, ránhòu dǎ qiú. Māma hěn gāoxìng, shuō yào zuò hǎo chī de gěi wǒmen chī.
ex_zh: Tomorrow my friend is coming to my home. We will do homework together, then play ball games. Mum is very happy and says she will make something delicious for us to eat.

quote_en: 我喜欢打篮球。 Wǒ xǐhuan dǎ lánqiú.
ex_en: 每天下午我和同学在体育馆打篮球。哥哥比我打得好，因为他个子高。下个星期我们有篮球比赛，我很开心。 Měitiān xiàwǔ wǒ hé tóngxué zài tǐyùguǎn dǎ lánqiú. Gēge bǐ wǒ dǎ de hǎo, yīnwèi tā gèzi gāo. Xià ge xīngqī wǒmen yǒu lánqiú bǐsài, wǒ hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Every afternoon my classmates and I play basketball in the gym. My older brother plays better than me because he is tall. Next week we have a basketball game, and I am very happy.

quote_en: 天空是蓝色的。 Tiānkōng shì lán sè de.
ex_en: 我喜欢蓝色，我的书包是蓝色的，裤子也是蓝色的。妹妹喜欢粉色，她说蓝色不好看。 Wǒ xǐhuan lán sè, wǒ de shūbāo shì lán sè de, kùzi yě shì lán sè de. Mèimei xǐhuan fěn sè, tā shuō lán sè bù hǎo kàn.
ex_zh: I like blue. My schoolbag is blue, and my trousers are also blue. My younger sister likes pink; she says blue is not good-looking.

quote_en: 爷爷老了。 Yéye lǎo le.
ex_en: 奶奶是一个老人，她八十岁了。她走路很慢，但是身体很健康。我常常去看她，陪她说话。 Nǎinai shì yī ge lǎo rén, tā bāshí suì le. Tā zǒulù hěn màn, dànshì shēntǐ hěn jiànkāng. Wǒ chángcháng qù kàn tā, péi tā shuōhuà.
ex_zh: Grandmother is an old person; she is eighty years old. She walks very slowly, but her body is very healthy. I often go to visit her and keep her company.

quote_en: 老师好！ Lǎoshī hǎo!
ex_en: 我的中文老师姓王，她来自北京。她教我们写汉字、说汉语。老师很友好，我们都很喜欢她。 Wǒ de Zhōngwén lǎoshī xìng Wáng, tā láizì Běijīng. Tā jiāo wǒmen xiě Hànzì, shuō Hànyǔ. Lǎoshī hěn yǒuhǎo, wǒmen dōu hěn xǐhuan tā.
ex_zh: My Chinese teacher's surname is Wang. She comes from Beijing. She teaches us to write Chinese characters and speak Chinese. The teacher is very friendly, and we all like her very much.

quote_en: 我今天很累。 Wǒ jīntiān hěn lèi.
ex_en: 放学以后我打了一个小时篮球，回家的时候很累。妈妈让我先休息，再吃饭。我喝了一杯水，坐了一会儿，就不累了。 Fàngxué yǐhòu wǒ dǎ le yī ge xiǎoshí lánqiú, huíjiā de shíhou hěn lèi. Māma ràng wǒ xiān xiūxi, zài chī fàn. Wǒ hē le yī bēi shuǐ, zuò le yī huìr, jiù bù lèi le.
ex_zh: After school I played basketball for an hour. When I got home I was very tired. Mum told me to rest first, then eat. I drank a glass of water and sat for a while, then I wasn't tired anymore.

def_en: a family name, also means plum
quote_en: 李老师教我们数学。 Lǐ lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen shùxué.
ex_en: 我的同学叫李小明，他今年十一岁。他家在学校的北边。李小明很聪明，数学考得很好。 Wǒ de tóngxué jiào Lǐ Xiǎo Míng, tā jīnnián shíyī suì. Tā jiā zài xuéxiào de běi bian. Lǐ Xiǎo Míng hěn cōngming, shùxué kǎo de hěn hǎo.
ex_zh: My classmate's name is Li Xiaoming. He is eleven years old this year. His home is north of the school. Li Xiaoming is very smart and does very well on maths exams.

quote_en: 我有两个弟弟。 Wǒ yǒu liǎng ge dìdi.
ex_en: 妈妈买了两个苹果和两个包子。我吃了一个苹果，弟弟吃了一个包子和一个苹果。还有两个包子留给爸爸。 Māma mǎi le liǎng ge píngguǒ hé liǎng ge bāo zi. Wǒ chī le yī ge píngguǒ, dìdi chī le yī ge bāo zi hé yī ge píngguǒ. Hái yǒu liǎng ge bāo zi liú gěi bàba.
ex_zh: Mum bought two apples and two steamed buns. I ate one apple; my younger brother ate one bun and one apple. There are two buns left for Dad.

quote_en: 现在六点。 Xiànzài liù diǎn.
ex_en: 我们班有六个女生和六个男生，一共十二个学生。老师给我们六个苹果，每人半个。 Wǒmen bān yǒu liù ge nǚshēng hé liù ge nánshēng, yīgòng shí'èr ge xuésheng. Lǎoshī gěi wǒmen liù ge píngguǒ, měi rén bàn ge.
ex_zh: Our class has six girls and six boys, twelve students in total. The teacher gave us six apples, half an apple per person.

quote_en: 考试我得了零分。 Kǎoshì wǒ dé le líng fēn.
quote_zh: I got zero points on the exam.
ex_en: 今天早上温度零下二度，很冷。我穿了毛衣和外套。弟弟生病了，没有去学校。 Jīntiān zǎoshang wēndù líng xià èr dù, hěn lěng. Wǒ chuān le máo yī hé wàitào. Dìdi shēngbìng le, méiyǒu qù xuéxiào.
ex_zh: This morning the temperature was minus two degrees, very cold. I wore a wool jumper and a coat. My younger brother got sick and didn't go to school.

quote_en: 今天很冷。 Jīntiān hěn lěng.
ex_en: 冬天的时候天气很冷，常常刮风。我穿很多衣服，喝热水。我不喜欢冷天，我喜欢春天和夏天。 Dōngtiān de shíhou tiānqì hěn lěng, chángcháng guā fēng. Wǒ chuān hěn duō yīfu, hē rè shuǐ. Wǒ bù xǐhuan lěng tiān, wǒ xǐhuan chūntiān hé xiàtiān.
ex_zh: In winter the weather is very cold and often windy. I wear many clothes and drink hot water. I don't like cold days; I like spring and summer.

quote_en: 书包里边有什么？ Shūbāo lǐbian yǒu shénme?
ex_en: 教室里边有桌子、椅子和黑板。我的座位在里边，靠窗户。老师让我们把书放到书包里边。 Jiàoshì lǐbian yǒu zhuōzi, yǐzi hé hēibǎn. Wǒ de zuòwèi zài lǐbian, kào chuānghu. Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen bǎ shū fàng dào shūbāo lǐbian.
ex_zh: Inside the classroom there are desks, chairs, and a blackboard. My seat is inside, by the window. The teacher told us to put the books inside our schoolbags.

quote_en: 妈妈送给我一个礼物。 Māma sòng gěi wǒ yī ge lǐwù.
ex_en: 昨天是我的生日，我收到很多礼物：爸爸送的书，妈妈送的蛋糕，朋友送的笔。我很开心，谢谢大家。 Zuótiān shì wǒ de shēngrì, wǒ shōudào hěn duō lǐwù: bàba sòng de shū, māma sòng de dàngāo, péngyou sòng de bǐ. Wǒ hěn kāixīn, xièxie dàjiā.
ex_zh: Yesterday was my birthday. I received many gifts: a book from Dad, a cake from Mum, a pen from my friend. I was very happy. Thank you, everyone.

quote_en: 我要练习写汉字。 Wǒ yào liànxí xiě Hànzì.
quote_zh: I need to practise writing Chinese characters.
ex_en: 老师给我们很多练习，有数学的，也有中文的。我每天做练习，进步很快。 Lǎoshī gěi wǒmen hěn duō liànxí, yǒu shùxué de, yě yǒu Zhōngwén de. Wǒ měitiān zuò liànxí, jìnbù hěn kuài.
ex_zh: The teacher gives us many exercises – maths and Chinese. I do exercises every day and make progress very quickly.

quote_en: 树叶是绿色的。 Shùyè shì lǜ sè de.
ex_en: 春天公园里的草地是绿色的，很好看。妈妈穿绿色的衣服，我觉得很漂亮。我喜欢绿色，因为很干净。 Chūntiān gōngyuán lǐ de cǎodì shì lǜ sè de, hěn hǎo kàn. Māma chuān lǜ sè de yīfu, wǒ juéde hěn piàoliang. Wǒ xǐhuan lǜ sè, yīnwèi hěn gānjìng.
ex_zh: In spring the grass in the park is green and very beautiful. Mum wears green clothes, and I think she looks very pretty. I like green because it looks very clean.

quote_en: 你好吗？ Nǐ hǎo ma?
ex_en: 你喜欢吃包子吗？我喜欢。你明天去学校吗？我去。你累了吗？我有一点累。 Nǐ xǐhuan chī bāo zi ma? Wǒ xǐhuan. Nǐ míngtiān qù xuéxiào ma? Wǒ qù. Nǐ lèi le ma? Wǒ yǒu yī diǎn lèi.
ex_zh: Do you like eating steamed buns? I do. Are you going to school tomorrow? I am. Are you tired? I am a little tired.

quote_en: 妈妈在做饭。 Māma zài zuò fàn.
ex_en: 妈妈每天早上六点起床，给我做早饭。妈妈很辛苦，我爱我的妈妈。今天是妈妈生日，我要送她一个礼物。 Māma měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn qǐchuáng, gěi wǒ zuò zǎofàn. Māma hěn xīnkǔ, wǒ ài wǒ de māma. Jīntiān shì māma shēngrì, wǒ yào sòng tā yī ge lǐwù.
ex_zh: Mum gets up at six every morning and makes breakfast for me. Mum works very hard. I love my mum. Today is Mum's birthday, and I will give her a gift.

quote_en: 我喜欢马。 Wǒ xǐhuan mǎ.
ex_en: 去年我去南岛玩，看到很多马。马很高，跑得很快。我想骑马，但是妈妈说我还太小。 Qùnián wǒ qù Nán Dǎo wán, kàndào hěn duō mǎ. Mǎ hěn gāo, pǎo de hěn kuài. Wǒ xiǎng qí mǎ, dànshì māma shuō wǒ hái tài xiǎo.
ex_zh: Last year I went to the South Island to play and saw many horses. Horses are tall and run very fast. I want to ride a horse, but Mum says I am still too young.

quote_en: 马路上有很多车。 Mǎlù shang yǒu hěn duō chē.
quote_zh: There are many cars on the road.
ex_en: 过马路的时候要小心，先看左边，再看右边，没有车了再走。学校门口的马路很宽，每天有老师帮我们过马路。 Guò mǎlù de shíhou yào xiǎoxīn, xiān kàn zuǒbian, zài kàn yòubian, méiyǒu chē le zài zǒu. Xuéxiào ménkǒu de mǎlù hěn kuān, měitiān yǒu lǎoshī bāng wǒmen guò mǎlù.
ex_zh: When crossing the road, you need to be careful: first look left, then look right, and only walk when there are no cars. The road at the school gate is very wide, and every day a teacher helps us cross the road.

quote_en: 我马上就到。 Wǒ mǎshàng jiù dào.
ex_en: 老师叫我的名字，我马上站起来。放学了，我马上收拾书包回家。爸爸说马上要下雨了，让我快一点。 Lǎoshī jiào wǒ de míngzi, wǒ mǎshàng zhàn qǐlái. Fàngxué le, wǒ mǎshàng shōushi shūbāo huíjiā. Bàba shuō mǎshàng yào xià yǔ le, ràng wǒ kuài yī diǎn.
ex_zh: The teacher called my name, and I stood up immediately. School finished, and I immediately packed my schoolbag and went home. Dad said it was about to rain immediately and told me to hurry up.

quote_en: 我要买一个苹果。 Wǒ yào mǎi yī ge píngguǒ.
quote_zh: I want to buy an apple.
ex_en: 昨天妈妈去商店买了很多东西：牛奶、鸡蛋、面包和水果。我也买了一个新书包，是蓝色的，花了五十块钱。 Zuótiān māma qù shāngdiàn mǎi le hěn duō dōng xi: niúnǎi, jīdàn, miànbāo hé shuǐguǒ. Wǒ yě mǎi le yī ge xīn shūbāo, shì lán sè de, huā le wǔshí kuài qián.
ex_zh: Yesterday Mum went to the shop and bought many things: milk, eggs, bread, and fruit. I also bought a new schoolbag. It is blue and cost fifty yuan.

quote_en: 这个商店卖什么？ Zhè ge shāngdiàn mài shénme?
ex_en: 学校门口有一个老人在卖包子，一个一块钱。公园旁边有人卖花和果汁。妈妈说不可以在路边乱买东西。 Xuéxiào ménkǒu yǒu yī ge lǎo rén zài mài bāo zi, yī ge yī kuài qián. Gōngyuán pángbiān yǒu rén mài huā hé guǒzhī. Māma shuō bù kěyǐ zài lù biān luàn mǎi dōng xi.
ex_zh: At the school gate there is an old person selling steamed buns, one yuan each. Next to the park someone sells flowers and juice. Mum says you shouldn't buy things randomly by the roadside.

quote_en: 火车很慢。 Huǒchē hěn màn.
ex_en: 爷爷走路很慢，因为他年纪大了。我陪他慢慢走，不着急。弟弟跑得快，我跑得慢，他总在前面等我。 Yéye zǒulù hěn màn, yīnwèi tā niánjì dà le. Wǒ péi tā màn man zǒu, bù zhāojí. Dìdi pǎo de kuài, wǒ pǎo de màn, tā zǒng zài qiánmian děng wǒ.
ex_zh: Grandfather walks very slowly because he is old. I walk slowly with him and don't rush. My younger brother runs fast; I run slowly. He always waits for me up ahead.

quote_en: 妈妈今天很忙。 Māma jīntiān hěn máng.
ex_en: 爸爸每天工作很忙，早上七点出门，晚上八点才回家。妈妈也很忙，要上班还要做家务。我放学以后帮妈妈做一点事情。 Bàba měitiān gōngzuò hěn máng, zǎoshang qī diǎn chūmén, wǎnshang bā diǎn cái huíjiā. Māma yě hěn máng, yào shàngbān hái yào zuò jiāwù. Wǒ fàngxué yǐhòu bāng māma zuò yī diǎn shìqing.
ex_zh: Dad is very busy at work every day, leaving home at seven in the morning and not coming home until eight in the evening. Mum is also very busy, having to work and do housework. After school I help Mum with a few things.

quote_en: 我家有一只猫。 Wǒ jiā yǒu yī zhī māo.
ex_en: 奶奶家的猫是白色的，很可爱。它喜欢吃鱼和喝牛奶。每天下午它在门口等我放学，看到我就跑过来。 Nǎinai jiā de māo shì bái sè de, hěn kě'ài. Tā xǐhuan chī yú hé hē niúnǎi. Měitiān xiàwǔ tā zài ménkǒu děng wǒ fàngxué, kàndào wǒ jiù pǎo guòlái.
ex_zh: Grandmother's cat is white and very cute. It likes to eat fish and drink milk. Every afternoon it waits for me at the door after school, and when it sees me it runs over.

quote_en: 哥哥在写毛笔字。 Gēge zài xiě máo bǐ zì.
quote_zh: Older brother is writing brush pen characters.
ex_en: 爷爷送给我一支毛笔，他说写毛笔字可以让人安静。我每天练习写半个小时，虽然很难，但是很有意思。 Yéye sòng gěi wǒ yī zhī máo bǐ, tā shuō xiě máo bǐ zì kěyǐ ràng rén ānjìng. Wǒ měitiān liànxí xiě bàn ge xiǎoshí, suīrán hěn nán, dànshì hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Grandfather gave me a brush pen. He says writing brush pen characters can make people calm. I practise writing for half an hour every day. Although it's very hard, it's very interesting.

def_zh: 新西兰毛利人；毛利人文化
quote_en: 新西兰有毛利人。 Xīn Xīlán yǒu Máo lì rén.
ex_en: 毛利人是新西兰的本地人。他们会说毛利语，有自己的文化和节日。我在学校学过毛利文，觉得很有意思。 Máo lì rén shì Xīn Xīlán de běndì rén. Tāmen huì shuō Máo lì yǔ, yǒu zìjǐ de wénhuà hé jiérì. Wǒ zài xuéxiào xué guò Máo lì wén, juéde hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Māori people are the native people of New Zealand. They can speak the Māori language and have their own culture and festivals. I have studied written Māori at school and find it very interesting.

quote_en: 我在学毛利文。 Wǒ zài xué Máo lì wén.
ex_en: 毛利文用的是英文字母，但是发音不一样。老师教我们写毛利文单词，比如“Kia ora”是“你好”的意思。 Máo lì wén yòng de shì Yīngwén zìmǔ, dànshì fāyīn bù yīyàng. Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen xiě Máo lì wén dāncí, bǐrú “Kia ora” shì “nǐ hǎo” de yìsi.
ex_zh: Written Māori uses English letters, but the pronunciation is different. The teacher teaches us to write Māori words, for example "Kia ora" means "hello."

quote_en: 他会说毛利语。 Tā huì shuō Máo lì yǔ.
ex_en: 在新西兰，很多人会说一点毛利语。我每天在学校说“Kia ora”跟老师问好。妈妈说学毛利语很重要，因为这是新西兰的文化。 Zài Xīn Xīlán, hěn duō rén huì shuō yī diǎn Máo lì yǔ. Wǒ měitiān zài xuéxiào shuō “Kia ora” gēn lǎoshī wèn hǎo. Māma shuō xué Máo lì yǔ hěn zhòngyào, yīnwèi zhè shì Xīn Xīlán de wénhuà.
ex_zh: In New Zealand, many people can speak a little Māori. Every day at school I say "Kia ora" to greet the teacher. Mum says learning to speak Māori is very important because it is New Zealand's culture.

quote_en: 冬天我穿毛衣。 Dōngtiān wǒ chuān máo yī.
quote_zh: In winter I wear a wool jumper.
ex_en: 奶奶给我织了一件蓝色的毛衣，很暖和。我穿上以后觉得舒服。弟弟也想要一件，奶奶说下个月给他织。 Nǎinai gěi wǒ zhī le yī jiàn lán sè de máo yī, hěn nuǎnhuo. Wǒ chuān shàng yǐhòu juéde shūfu. Dìdi yě xiǎng yào yī jiàn, nǎinai shuō xià ge yuè gěi tā zhī.
ex_zh: Grandmother knitted me a blue wool jumper. It is very warm. After I put it on, I felt comfortable. My younger brother also wants one; Grandmother says she will knit him one next month.

quote_en: 对不起！——没关系。 Duìbuqǐ! — Méi guānxi.
