ex_en: 我不小心把弟弟的笔弄丢了，我说对不起，他说没关系，他还有一支。朋友迟到了，我说没关系，我们等他一下。 Wǒ bù xiǎoxīn bǎ dìdi de bǐ nòng diū le, wǒ shuō duìbuqǐ, tā shuō méi guānxi, tā hái yǒu yī zhī. Péngyou chídào le, wǒ shuō méi guānxi, wǒmen děng tā yīxià.
ex_zh: I accidentally lost my younger brother's pen. I said sorry, and he said never mind – he has another one. My friend was late. I said never mind, we'll wait for him a bit.

quote_en: 这本书没有意思。 Zhè běn shū méi yǒu yì si.
ex_en: 今天的电影没有意思，我看了十分钟就想睡觉。朋友也觉得没意思，我们就回家了。下次我们看别的。 Jīntiān de diànyǐng méi yǒu yì si, wǒ kàn le shí fēn zhōng jiù xiǎng shuìjiào. Péngyou yě juéde méi yì si, wǒmen jiù huíjiā le. Xià cì wǒmen kàn bié de.
ex_zh: Today's movie was not interesting. After watching for ten minutes I wanted to sleep. My friend also thought it was boring, so we went home. Next time we'll watch something else.

def_en: the United States of America, USA
quote_en: 美国很大。 Měiguó hěn dà.
ex_en: 我叔叔在美国工作，他去年回来过春节。他说美国有很多中国人，也有中文学校。我以后想去美国看看。 Wǒ shūshu zài Měiguó gōngzuò, tā qùnián huílái guò Chūnjié. Tā shuō Měiguó yǒu hěn duō Zhōngguó rén, yě yǒu Zhōngwén xuéxiào. Wǒ yǐhòu xiǎng qù Měiguó kàn kan.
ex_zh: My uncle works in the USA. He came back last year to celebrate Spring Festival. He said the USA has many Chinese people and also Chinese language schools. In the future I want to go see the USA.

quote_en: 这个公园很美丽。 Zhè ge gōngyuán hěn měilì.
ex_en: 新西兰的南岛很美丽，有高高的山、蓝蓝的湖和绿绿的草地。我和家人去过那里，拍了很多照片。 Xīn Xīlán de Nán Dǎo hěn měilì, yǒu gāo gāo de shān, lán lán de hú hé lǜ lǜ de cǎodì. Wǒ hé jiā rén qù guò nàlǐ, pāi le hěn duō zhàopiàn.
ex_zh: The South Island of New Zealand is very beautiful, with tall mountains, blue lakes, and green grass. My family and I have been there and took many photos.

quote_en: 我喜欢美术。 Wǒ xǐhuan měishù.
ex_en: 每星期我们有两节美术课。老师教我们画画、用颜色。我画了一幅画，上面有花和太阳，老师说我画得很好。 Měi xīngqī wǒmen yǒu liǎng jié měishù kè. Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen huà huà, yòng yánsè. Wǒ huà le yī fú huà, shàngmian yǒu huā hé tàiyáng, lǎoshī shuō wǒ huà de hěn hǎo.
ex_zh: Every week we have two Art lessons. The teacher teaches us to draw and use colours. I drew a picture with flowers and the sun. The teacher said I drew very well.

quote_en: 我每天去学校。 Wǒ měitiān qù xuéxiào.
quote_zh: I go to school every day.
ex_en: 我每天早上六点起床，吃早饭，然后去学校。每天下午放学后我打篮球，晚上做功课。每天都很忙，但是很开心。 Wǒ měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn qǐchuáng, chī zǎofàn, ránhòu qù xuéxiào. Měitiān xiàwǔ fàngxué hòu wǒ dǎ lánqiú, wǎnshang zuò gōngkè. Měitiān dōu hěn máng, dànshì hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Every morning I get up at six, eat breakfast, and then go to school. Every afternoon after school I play basketball, and in the evening I do homework. Every day is very busy, but I am very happy.

quote_en: 妹妹很小。 Mèimei hěn xiǎo.
quote_zh: My younger sister is very small.
ex_en: 妹妹今年五岁，她很可爱。她喜欢画画和唱歌。每天早上她叫我起床，我们一起吃早饭。我爱我的妹妹。 Mèimei jīnnián wǔ suì, tā hěn kě'ài. Tā xǐhuan huà huà hé chàng gē. Měitiān zǎoshang tā jiào wǒ qǐchuáng, wǒmen yìqǐ chī zǎofàn. Wǒ ài wǒ de mèimei.
ex_zh: My younger sister is five years old this year. She is very cute. She likes to draw and sing. Every morning she calls me to get up, and we have breakfast together. I love my younger sister.

quote_en: 请开门。 Qǐng kāi mén.
ex_en: 教室的门是蓝色的。下课以后，同学们从门走出去。老师让我们把门关上，因为外面很冷。 Jiàoshì de mén shì lán sè de. Xiàkè yǐhòu, tóngxué men cóng mén zǒu chū qù. Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen bǎ mén guān shàng, yīnwèi wàimian hěn lěng.
ex_zh: The classroom door is blue. After class, the students walk out through the door. The teacher told us to close the door because outside is very cold.

quote_en: 同学们好！ Tóngxué men hǎo!
ex_en: 我们全家都喜欢运动。爸爸们和妈妈们在学校门口等孩子。朋友们常常一起吃饭、看电影。 Wǒmen quánjiā dōu xǐhuan yùndòng. Bàba men hé māma men zài xuéxiào ménkǒu děng háizi. Péngyou men chángcháng yìqǐ chī fàn, kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: All of us in the family like sports. The dads and mums wait for the children at the school gate. Friends often eat and watch movies together.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃米饭。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī mǐfàn.
ex_en: 每天中午我在学校吃米饭和菜。有时候吃炒饭。晚饭妈妈也做米饭，爸爸吃两碗，我吃一碗。 Měitiān zhōngwǔ wǒ zài xuéxiào chī mǐfàn hé cài. Yǒu shíhou chī chǎo fàn. Wǎnfàn māma yě zuò mǐfàn, bàba chī liǎng wǎn, wǒ chī yī wǎn.
ex_zh: Every day at noon I eat rice and vegetables at school. Sometimes I eat fried rice. For dinner Mum also makes rice; Dad eats two bowls, and I eat one bowl.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃面条。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī miàntiáo.
ex_en: 中午妈妈做了牛肉面，面条很长，很好吃。我吃了一大碗，弟弟吃了一碗半。爸爸说面条对身体好，让我们多吃。 Zhōngwǔ māma zuò le niúròu miàn, miàntiáo hěn cháng, hěn hǎo chī. Wǒ chī le yī dà wǎn, dìdi chī le yī wǎn bàn. Bàba shuō miàntiáo duì shēntǐ hǎo, ràng wǒmen duō chī.
ex_zh: At noon Mum made beef noodles. The noodles were very long and very delicious. I ate one big bowl, and my younger brother ate one and a half bowls. Dad says noodles are good for the body and tells us to eat more.

quote_en: 我早上吃面包。 Wǒ zǎoshang chī miànbāo.
quote_zh: I eat bread in the morning.
ex_en: 妈妈每天给我做面包和牛奶当早饭。有时候面包里加鸡蛋和青菜。我不喜欢吃白面包，我喜欢吃全麦面包。 Māma měitiān gěi wǒ zuò miànbāo hé niúnǎi dāng zǎofàn. Yǒu shíhou miànbāo li jiā jīdàn hé qīngcài. Wǒ bù xǐhuan chī bái miànbāo, wǒ xǐhuan chī quán mài miànbāo.
ex_zh: Mum makes me bread and milk for breakfast every day. Sometimes she adds eggs and green vegetables to the bread. I don't like eating white bread; I like eating whole wheat bread.

quote_en: 明年我上中学。 Míngnián wǒ shàng zhōngxué.
quote_zh: Next year I will go to secondary school.
ex_en: 明年夏天我们全家要去中国看长城和北京。妈妈说我们要提前买飞机票。我很高兴，因为可以吃北京烤鸭。 Míngnián xiàtiān wǒmen quánjiā yào qù Zhōngguó kàn Chángchéng hé Běijīng. Māma shuō wǒmen yào tíqián mǎi fēijī piào. Wǒ hěn gāoxìng, yīnwèi kěyǐ chī Běijīng kǎo yā.
ex_zh: Next summer our whole family will go to China to see the Great Wall and Beijing. Mum says we need to buy plane tickets in advance. I am very happy because I can eat Beijing roast duck.

quote_en: 明天是星期六。 Míngtiān shì xīngqīliù.
ex_en: 明天早上我要和朋友去公园打球，下午在家做功课，晚上和妈妈一起看电影。明天见！ Míngtiān zǎoshang wǒ yào hé péngyou qù gōngyuán dǎ qiú, xiàwǔ zài jiā zuò gōngkè, wǎnshang hé māma yìqǐ kàn diànyǐng. Míngtiān jiàn!
ex_zh: Tomorrow morning I will go to the park to play ball games with my friend. In the afternoon I will do homework at home, and in the evening I will watch a movie with Mum. See you tomorrow!

quote_en: 放学了，明天见！ Fàngxué le, míngtiān jiàn!
quote_zh: School is over, see you tomorrow!
ex_en: 我和朋友在车站说再见。我说“明天见”，他说“好的，明天一起打球”。我们都很开心。 Wǒ hé péngyou zài chēzhàn shuō zàijiàn. Wǒ shuō “míngtiān jiàn”, tā shuō “hǎo de, míngtiān yìqǐ dǎ qiú”. Wǒmen dōu hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: My friend and I said goodbye at the bus stop. I said "see you tomorrow," and he said "okay, let's play ball together tomorrow." We were both very happy.

quote_en: 你叫什么名字？ Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?
ex_en: 我的中文名字叫王小明，老师叫我小明。我朋友的名字叫李大山，他来自北京。每个人的名字都有意思。 Wǒ de Zhōngwén míngzi jiào Wáng Xiǎo Míng, lǎoshī jiào wǒ Xiǎo Míng. Wǒ péngyou de míngzi jiào Lǐ Dà Shān, tā láizì Běijīng. Měi ge rén de míngzi dōu yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: My Chinese name is Wang Xiaoming. The teacher calls me Xiaoming. My friend's name is Li Dashan. He comes from Beijing. Everyone's name has meaning.

quote_en: 你要哪本书？ Nǐ yào nǎ běn shū?
ex_en: 哪条路去学校最近？从东边走最近。哪个人是你的老师？那个穿红衣服的是王老师。 Nǎ tiáo lù qù xuéxiào zuì jìn? Cóng dōng bian zǒu zuì jìn. Nǎ ge rén shì nǐ de lǎoshī? Nà ge chuān hóng yīfu de shì Wáng lǎoshī.
ex_zh: Which road goes to school the closest? Walking from the east is closest. Which person is your teacher? The one wearing red clothes is Teacher Wang.

quote_en: 你喜欢哪个颜色？ Nǐ xǐhuan nǎ ge yánsè?
ex_en: 这两个苹果，哪个大？左边那个大。哪个学生考试得了第一名？李小明得了第一名。 Nǎ ge xuésheng kǎoshì dé le dì yī míng? Lǐ Xiǎo Míng dé le dì yī míng.
ex_zh: These two apples, which one is bigger? The one on the left is bigger. Which student got first place on the exam? Li Xiaoming got first place.

quote_en: 你住在哪里？ Nǐ zhù zài nǎlǐ?
ex_en: 哪里可以买包子？学校门口有卖的。哪里是图书馆？图书馆在北边。妈妈问我钥匙在哪里，我说在桌子上。 Nǎlǐ kěyǐ mǎi bāo zi? Xuéxiào ménkǒu yǒu mài de. Nǎlǐ shì túshūguǎn? Túshūguǎn zài běi bian. Māma wèn wǒ yàoshi zài nǎlǐ, wǒ shuō zài zhuōzi shang.
ex_zh: Where can you buy steamed buns? There's a seller at the school gate. Where is the library? The library is in the north. Mum asked me where the keys are, and I said they are on the table.

quote_en: 学校在那里。 Xuéxiào zài nàlǐ.
ex_en: 你看，那里有一座山，很高。我们去年去过那里，爬了山，看了湖。那里很美，我还想再去。 Nǐ kàn, nàlǐ yǒu yī zuò shān, hěn gāo. Wǒmen qùnián qù guò nàlǐ, pá le shān, kàn le hú. Nàlǐ hěn měi, wǒ hái xiǎng zài qù.
ex_zh: Look, there is a mountain over there, very high. We went there last year, climbed the mountain, and saw the lake. It's very beautiful there, and I want to go again.

quote_en: 奶奶很健康。 Nǎinai hěn jiànkāng.
ex_en: 奶奶今年七十岁了，她每天早上走路去公园，下午在家看电视、听音乐。我很爱我的奶奶，常常去看她。 Nǎinai jīnnián qīshí suì le, tā měitiān zǎoshang zǒulù qù gōngyuán, xiàwǔ zài jiā kàn diànshì, tīng yīnyuè. Wǒ hěn ài wǒ de nǎinai, chángcháng qù kàn tā.
ex_zh: Grandmother is seventy years old this year. She walks to the park every morning, and in the afternoon she watches TV and listens to music at home. I love my grandmother very much and often go to see her.

quote_en: 他是男的。 Tā shì nán de.
ex_en: 我们班有十个男学生和十五个女学生。男同学喜欢打球，女同学喜欢画画。男老师的课很有意思。 Wǒmen bān yǒu shí ge nán xuésheng hé shíwǔ ge nǚ xuésheng. Nán tóngxué xǐhuan dǎ qiú, nǚ tóngxué xǐhuan huà huà. Nán lǎoshī de kè hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Our class has ten male students and fifteen female students. The male students like playing ball games; the female students like drawing. The male teacher's lessons are very interesting.

quote_en: 男生在打球。 Nánshēng zài dǎ qiú.
quote_zh: The boys are playing ball games.
ex_en: 学校有男生也有女生。男生喜欢运动，女生喜欢唱歌。今天下午男生在运动场打篮球，女生在教室画画。 Xuéxiào yǒu nánshēng yě yǒu nǚshēng. Nánshēng xǐhuan yùndòng, nǚshēng xǐhuan chàng gē. Jīntiān xiàwǔ nánshēng zài yùndòngchǎng dǎ lánqiú, nǚshēng zài jiàoshì huà huà.
ex_zh: The school has both boys and girls. Boys like sports; girls like singing. This afternoon the boys are playing basketball on the sports field, and the girls are drawing in the classroom.

quote_en: 他上男校。 Tā shàng nán xiào.
quote_zh: He goes to a boys' school.
ex_en: 我哥哥在男校学习，学校里没有女生。男校的体育课很多，他每天打橄榄球。我觉得男校也不错。 Wǒ gēge zài nán xiào xuéxí, xuéxiào li méiyǒu nǚshēng. Nán xiào de tǐyù kè hěn duō, tā měitiān dǎ gǎnlǎnqiú. Wǒ juéde nán xiào yě bùcuò.
ex_zh: My older brother studies at a boys' school. There are no girls at the school. Boys' schools have a lot of PE classes; he plays rugby every day. I think boys' schools are not bad either.

quote_en: 车站在我家南边。 Chēzhàn zài wǒ jiā nán bian.
quote_zh: The bus stop is south of my home.
ex_en: 学校南边有一个大公园，公园南边有一条河。春天我们常常去南边玩。从南边走路回家要二十分钟。 Xuéxiào nán bian yǒu yī ge dà gōngyuán, gōngyuán nán bian yǒu yī tiáo hé. Chūntiān wǒmen chángcháng qù nán bian wán. Cóng nán bian zǒulù huíjiā yào èrshí fēn zhōng.
ex_zh: South of the school there is a big park. South of the park there is a river. In spring we often go to the south to play. Walking home from the south takes twenty minutes.

quote_en: 南岛很美。 Nán Dǎo hěn měi.
quote_zh: The South Island is very beautiful.
ex_en: 去年圣诞节我们全家去南岛玩。南岛有很高的山和很蓝的湖。我们在南岛住了五天，每天都很开心。明年还要去。 Qùnián Shèngdàn Jié wǒmen quánjiā qù Nán Dǎo wán. Nán Dǎo yǒu hěn gāo de shān hé hěn lán de hú. Wǒmen zài Nán Dǎo zhù le wǔ tiān, měitiān dōu hěn kāixīn. Míngnián hái yào qù.
ex_zh: Last Christmas our whole family went to the South Island to play. The South Island has very high mountains and very blue lakes. We stayed on the South Island for five days and were happy every day. Next year we will go again.

quote_en: 汉字很难写。 Hànzì hěn nán xiě.
quote_zh: Chinese characters are hard to write.
ex_en: 数学考试很难，我有很多题不会做。但是中文考试不难，我觉得很有意思。爸爸说难的事要多练习。 Shùxué kǎoshì hěn nán, wǒ yǒu hěn duō tí bù huì zuò. Dànshì Zhōngwén kǎoshì bù nán, wǒ juéde hěn yǒu yìsi. Bàba shuō nán de shì yào duō liànxí.
ex_zh: The maths exam was very difficult; there were many questions I couldn't do. But the Chinese exam was not difficult; I thought it was very interesting. Dad says for difficult things you need to practise more.

quote_en: 这件衣服很难看。 Zhè jiàn yīfu hěn nán kàn.
quote_zh: This piece of clothing is very ugly.
ex_en: 弟弟画了一幅画，他说画的是马，但是我觉得很难看，像狗。妈妈说不可以说难看，要多鼓励他。 Dìdi huà le yī fú huà, tā shuō huà de shì mǎ, dànshì wǒ juéde hěn nán kàn, xiàng gǒu. Māma shuō bù kěyǐ shuō nán kàn, yào duō gǔlì tā.
ex_zh: My younger brother drew a picture. He said it was a horse, but I thought it was very ugly, like a dog. Mum said you can't say it's ugly; you need to encourage him more.

quote_en: 我很好，你呢？ Wǒ hěn hǎo, nǐ ne?
ex_en: 妈妈在做饭，爸爸呢？爸爸在看书。弟弟在玩球，妹妹呢？妹妹在睡觉。我们去公园，你呢？我也去。 Māma zài zuò fàn, bàba ne? Bàba zài kàn shū. Dìdi zài wán qiú, mèimei ne? Mèimei zài shuìjiào. Wǒmen qù gōngyuán, nǐ ne? Wǒ yě qù.
ex_zh: Mum is cooking, and Dad? Dad is reading. Younger brother is playing with a ball, and younger sister? Younger sister is sleeping. We are going to the park, and you? I will go too.

quote_en: 你好吗？ Nǐ hǎo ma?
ex_en: 你叫什么名字？我叫小明。你家在哪里？我家在学校北边。你喜欢吃什么？我喜欢吃包子和面条。你呢？ Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi? Wǒ jiào Xiǎo Míng. Nǐ jiā zài nǎlǐ? Wǒ jiā zài xuéxiào běi bian. Nǐ xǐhuan chī shénme? Wǒ xǐhuan chī bāo zi hé miàntiáo. Nǐ ne?
ex_zh: What is your name? My name is Xiaoming. Where is your home? My home is north of the school. What do you like to eat? I like eating steamed buns and noodles. And you?

quote_en: 您好，老师。 Nín hǎo, lǎoshī.
ex_en: 您贵姓？我姓王。您请坐。谢谢您。您身体好吗？我身体很好。 Nín guì xìng? Wǒ xìng Wáng. Nín qǐng zuò. Xièxie nín. Nín shēntǐ hǎo ma? Wǒ shēntǐ hěn hǎo.
ex_zh: What is your honourable surname? My surname is Wang. Please sit down. Thank you. How is your health? My health is very good.

quote_en: 您好！欢迎来我家。 Nín hǎo! Huānyíng lái wǒ jiā.
ex_en: 您好，请问去火车站怎么走？往东边走，坐公共汽车十分钟。谢谢您！不客气。 Nín hǎo, qǐng wèn qù huǒchēzhàn zěnme zǒu? Wǎng dōng bian zǒu, zuò gōnggòng qìchē shí fēn zhōng. Xièxie nín! Bù kèqi.
ex_zh: Hello, may I ask how to get to the train station? Walk east, then take the bus for ten minutes. Thank you! You're welcome.

quote_en: 田里有一头牛。 Tián li yǒu yī tóu niú.
quote_zh: There is a cow in the field.
ex_en: 奶奶家在乡下，养了三头牛和五只羊。牛吃草，牛给我们牛奶和牛肉。我小时候喜欢看牛。 Nǎinai jiā zài xiāngxia, yǎng le sān tóu niú hé wǔ zhī yáng. Niú chī cǎo, niú gěi wǒmen niúnǎi hé niúròu. Wǒ xiǎoshíhou xǐhuan kàn niú.
ex_zh: Grandmother's home is in the countryside. She raises three cows and five sheep. Cows eat grass, and cows give us milk and beef. When I was little, I liked watching cows.

quote_en: 我每天喝牛奶。 Wǒ měitiān hē niúnǎi.
ex_en: 妈妈让我每天早上喝一杯牛奶，说牛奶对身体好。弟弟不爱喝牛奶，他喜欢喝果汁。爸爸在咖啡里加牛奶。 Māma ràng wǒ měitiān zǎoshang hē yī bēi niúnǎi, shuō niúnǎi duì shēntǐ hǎo. Dìdi bù ài hē niúnǎi, tā xǐhuan hē guǒzhī. Bàba zài kāfēi li jiā niúnǎi.
ex_zh: Mum makes me drink a glass of milk every morning. She says milk is good for the body. My younger brother doesn't like drinking milk; he likes drinking juice. Dad adds milk to his coffee.

quote_en: 她是女的。 Tā shì nǚ de.
ex_en: 我们班有十五个女学生和十个男学生。女老师教我们中文，男老师教我们体育。女同学喜欢唱歌和画画。 Wǒmen bān yǒu shíwǔ ge nǚ xuésheng hé shí ge nán xuésheng. Nǚ lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen Zhōngwén, nán lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen tǐyù. Nǚ tóngxué xǐhuan chàng gē hé huà huà.
ex_zh: Our class has fifteen female students and ten male students. The female teacher teaches us Chinese; the male teacher teaches us PE. The female students like singing and drawing.

quote_en: 女生在教室里。 Nǚshēng zài jiàoshì li.
quote_zh: The girls are in the classroom.
ex_en: 学校有女生也有男生。女生喜欢上美术课和音乐课，男生喜欢上体育课。今天下午女生在画画，男生在打球。 Xuéxiào yǒu nǚshēng yě yǒu nánshēng. Nǚshēng xǐhuan shàng měishù kè hé yīnyuè kè, nánshēng xǐhuan shàng tǐyù kè. Jīntiān xiàwǔ nǚshēng zài huà huà, nánshēng zài dǎ qiú.
ex_zh: The school has both girls and boys. Girls like taking art and music lessons; boys like taking PE lessons. This afternoon the girls are drawing, and the boys are playing ball games.

quote_en: 她在女校学习。 Tā zài nǚ xiào xuéxí.
quote_zh: She studies at a girls' school.
ex_en: 姐姐在女校上中学，学校里没有男生。女校的老师都是女的。姐姐说女校很好，可以专心学习。 Jiějie zài nǚ xiào shàng zhōngxué, xuéxiào li méiyǒu nánshēng. Nǚ xiào de lǎoshī dōu shì nǚ de. Jiějie shuō nǚ xiào hěn hǎo, kěyǐ zhuānxīn xuéxí.
ex_zh: My older sister goes to a girls' school for secondary school. There are no boys at the school. All the teachers at the girls' school are female. My sister says girls' school is very good because you can focus on studying.

quote_en: 我坐在他旁边。 Wǒ zuò zài tā pángbiān.
ex_en: 我家旁边有一个公园，公园旁边有一个商店。商店旁边是车站。我每天走路经过公园去学校。 Wǒ jiā pángbiān yǒu yī ge gōngyuán, gōngyuán pángbiān yǒu yī ge shāngdiàn. Shāngdiàn pángbiān shì chēzhàn. Wǒ měitiān zǒulù jīngguò gōngyuán qù xuéxiào.
ex_zh: Next to my home there is a park. Next to the park there is a shop. Next to the shop is the bus stop. Every day I walk past the park to go to school.

quote_en: 我喜欢跑步。 Wǒ xǐhuan pǎobù.
ex_en: 每天早上六点我起床去公园跑步。跑半个小时，然后回家吃早饭。跑步对身体很好，让我一天都有精神。 Měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn wǒ qǐchuáng qù gōngyuán pǎobù. Pǎo bàn ge xiǎoshí, ránhòu huíjiā chī zǎofàn. Pǎobù duì shēntǐ hěn hǎo, ràng wǒ yī tiān dōu yǒu jīngshén.
ex_zh: Every morning at six I get up and go to the park to run. I run for half an hour, then go home for breakfast. Running is very good for the body and gives me energy for the whole day.

quote_en: 他是我的朋友。 Tā shì wǒ de péngyou.
ex_en: 我有一个好朋友，他叫小明。我们常常一起打球、吃饭、做功课。朋友之间要互相帮助，我很高兴有他这个朋友。 Wǒ yǒu yī ge hǎo péngyou, tā jiào Xiǎo Míng. Wǒmen chángcháng yìqǐ dǎ qiú, chī fàn, zuò gōngkè. Péngyou zhī jiān yào hùxiāng bāngzhù, wǒ hěn gāoxìng yǒu tā zhè ge péngyou.
ex_zh: I have a good friend. His name is Xiaoming. We often play ball games, eat, and do homework together. Friends should help each other. I am very happy to have him as a friend.

quote_en: 这个苹果很便宜。 Zhè ge píngguǒ hěn piányi.
ex_en: 超市里的东西有的便宜有的贵。面包很便宜，两块钱一个。肉比较贵。妈妈买便宜的东西，也买贵的东西，只要需要就买。 Chāoshì li de dōng xi yǒu de piányi yǒu de guì. Miànbāo hěn piányi, liǎng kuài qián yī ge. Ròu bǐjiào guì. Māma mǎi piányi de dōng xi, yě mǎi guì de dōng xi, zhǐ yào xūyào jiù mǎi.
ex_zh: In the supermarket, some things are cheap and some are expensive. Bread is very cheap, two yuan each. Meat is more expensive. Mum buys cheap things and also expensive things, as long as she needs them.

quote_en: 我要买一张票。 Wǒ yào mǎi yī zhāng piào.
quote_zh: I want to buy one ticket.
ex_en: 去北京的火车票很贵，一张要五百块钱。飞机票更贵。爸爸提前买了票，我们下个月出发。车票要收好，不能丢了。 Qù Běijīng de huǒchē piào hěn guì, yī zhāng yào wǔ bǎi kuài qián. Fēijī piào gèng guì. Bàba tíqián mǎi le piào, wǒmen xià ge yuè chūfā. Chē piào yào shōu hǎo, bù néng diū le.
ex_zh: Train tickets to Beijing are very expensive, five hundred yuan each. Plane tickets are even more expensive. Dad bought the tickets in advance; we will leave next month. You need to keep tickets safe and not lose them.

quote_en: 她长得很漂亮。 Tā zhǎng de hěn piàoliang.
ex_en: 妈妈今天穿了一条红色的裙子，很漂亮。爸爸说妈妈像花一样漂亮。我也觉得妈妈漂亮，我爱妈妈。 Māma jīntiān chuān le yī tiáo hóng sè de qúnzi, hěn piàoliang. Bàba shuō māma xiàng huā yīyàng piàoliang. Wǒ yě juéde māma piàoliang, wǒ ài māma.
ex_zh: Mum wore a red dress today. She looks very pretty. Dad says Mum is as pretty as a flower. I also think Mum is pretty. I love Mum.

quote_en: 我喜欢打乒乓球。 Wǒ xǐhuan dǎ pīngpāng qiú.
ex_en: 乒乓球是中国的国球，很多人喜欢打。我和爸爸每个星期天下午打乒乓球。乒乓球很快，需要眼睛看好。 Pīngpāng qiú shì Zhōngguó de guó qiú, hěn duō rén xǐhuan dǎ. Wǒ hé bàba měi ge xīngqītiān xiàwǔ dǎ pīngpāng qiú. Pīngpāng qiú hěn kuài, xūyào yǎnjing kàn hǎo.
ex_zh: Table tennis is China's national sport; many people like playing it. My dad and I play table tennis every Sunday afternoon. Table tennis is very fast; you need to watch the ball well.

quote_en: 苹果很好吃。 Píngguǒ hěn hǎo chī.
ex_en: 妈妈每天给我一个苹果，她说“一天一苹果，医生远离我”。苹果有红的也有绿的，我喜欢吃红苹果。 Māma měitiān gěi wǒ yī ge píngguǒ, tā shuō “yī tiān yī píngguǒ, yīshēng yuǎn lí wǒ”. Píngguǒ yǒu hóng de yě yǒu lǜ de, wǒ xǐhuan chī hóng píngguǒ.
ex_zh: Mum gives me an apple every day. She says "an apple a day keeps the doctor away." Apples can be red or green. I like eating red apples.

quote_en: 现在七点。 Xiànzài qī diǎn.
ex_en: 我家有七个人：爷爷、奶奶、爸爸、妈妈、哥哥、妹妹和我。七点我们吃晚饭。一个星期有七天，星期天我们休息。 Wǒ jiā yǒu qī ge rén: yéye, nǎinai, bàba, māma, gēge, mèimei hé wǒ. Qī diǎn wǒmen chī wǎnfàn. Yī ge xīngqī yǒu qī tiān, xīngqītiān wǒmen xiūxi.
ex_zh: My family has seven people: grandfather, grandmother, dad, mum, older brother, younger sister, and me. At seven we eat dinner. A week has seven days; on Sunday we rest.

quote_en: 我会骑自行车。 Wǒ huì qí zìxíngchē.
ex_en: 每天早上我骑自行车去学校，只要十分钟。弟弟不会骑，他走路。爸爸会骑马，但是马很贵。 Wǒ qí zìxíngchē qù xuéxiào, zhǐ yào shí fēn zhōng. Dìdi bù huì qí, tā zǒulù. Bàba huì qí mǎ, dànshì mǎ hěn guì.
ex_zh: Every morning I ride my bicycle to school; it only takes ten minutes. My younger brother can't ride; he walks. Dad can ride a horse, but horses are very expensive.

quote_en: 我每天六点起床。 Wǒ měitiān liù diǎn qǐchuáng.
quote_zh: I wake up at six every day.
ex_en: 早上妈妈叫我起床，我不想起，但是要上学。起床以后我洗脸、刷牙、吃早饭。周末我可以晚点起床。 Zǎoshang māma jiào wǒ qǐchuáng, wǒ bù xiǎng qǐ, dànshì yào shàngxué. Qǐchuáng yǐhòu wǒ xǐ liǎn, shuā yá, chī zǎofàn. Zhōumò wǒ kěyǐ wǎn diǎn qǐchuáng.
ex_zh: In the morning Mum calls me to wake up. I don't want to get up, but I have to go to school. After waking up, I wash my face, brush my teeth, and eat breakfast. On weekends I can get up a bit later.

quote_en: 这本书一千页。 Zhè běn shū yī qiān yè.
quote_zh: This book has one thousand pages.
ex_en: 我们学校有一千个学生，五百个男生，五百个女生。一千很大，我数不到一千。爸爸一个月挣五千块钱。 Wǒmen xuéxiào yǒu yī qiān ge xuésheng, wǔ bǎi ge nánshēng, wǔ bǎi ge nǚshēng. Yī qiān hěn dà, wǒ shǔ bù dào yī qiān. Bàba yī ge yuè zhèng wǔ qiān kuài qián.
ex_zh: Our school has one thousand students: five hundred boys and five hundred girls. One thousand is very big; I can't count to one thousand. Dad earns five thousand yuan a month.

quote_en: 这个多少钱？ Zhè ge duō shǎo qián?
ex_en: 我没有钱买那个玩具，太贵了。妈妈给我十块钱，我买了一本书花了八块钱，还剩两块钱。钱要省着花。 Wǒ méiyǒu qián mǎi nà ge wánjù, tài guì le. Māma gěi wǒ shí kuài qián, wǒ mǎi le yī běn shū huā le bā kuài qián, hái shèng liǎng kuài qián. Qián yào shěng zhe huā.
ex_zh: I don't have the money to buy that toy; it's too expensive. Mum gave me ten yuan. I bought a book and spent eight yuan, with two yuan left. You need to spend money carefully.

quote_en: 我的钱包是黑色的。 Wǒ de qiánbāo shì hēi sè de.
ex_en: 妈妈的钱包是红色的，里面有钱和信用卡。昨天我丢了钱包，很着急，后来在学校找到了，钱还在。 Māma de qiánbāo shì hóng sè de, lǐmiàn yǒu qián hé xìnyòngkǎ. Zuótiān wǒ diū le qiánbāo, hěn zhāojí, hòulái zài xuéxiào zhǎo dào le, qián hái zài.
ex_zh: Mum's wallet is red, with money and credit cards inside. Yesterday I lost my wallet and was very worried. Later I found it at school, and the money was still there.

quote_en: 学校在我家前边。 Xuéxiào zài wǒ jiā qián bian.
quote_zh: The school is in front of my home.
ex_en: 我坐在教室的前边，后边是妹妹。老师写字的时候我看得很清楚。走路的时候前边有一个人，我走慢一点。 Wǒ zuò zài jiàoshì de qián bian, hòu bian shì mèimei. Lǎoshī xiě zì de shíhou wǒ kàn de hěn qīngchu. Zǒulù de shíhou qián bian yǒu yī ge rén, wǒ zǒu màn yī diǎn.
ex_zh: I sit at the front of the classroom. Behind me is my younger sister. When the teacher writes, I can see very clearly. When walking, there is a person in front, so I walk a bit slower.

quote_en: 请进！ Qǐng jìn!
ex_en: 请给我一杯水，谢谢。朋友请我吃饭，我吃了很多。老师请我们回答问题，我站起来说答案。 Qǐng gěi wǒ yī bēi shuǐ, xièxie. Péngyou qǐng wǒ chī fàn, wǒ chī le hěn duō. Lǎoshī qǐng wǒmen huídá wèntí, wǒ zhàn qǐlái shuō dá'àn.
ex_zh: Please give me a glass of water, thank you. My friend treated me to a meal, and I ate a lot. The teacher asked us to answer a question; I stood up and gave the answer.

quote_en: 秋天很凉快。 Qiūtiān hěn liángkuai.
ex_en: 秋天树叶变成红色和黄色，很漂亮。我和弟弟去公园捡树叶做书签。秋天不冷也不热，适合走路和跑步。 Qiūtiān shùyè biàn chéng hóng sè hé huáng sè, hěn piàoliang. Wǒ hé dìdi qù gōngyuán jiǎn shùyè zuò shūqiān. Qiūtiān bù lěng yě bù rè, shìhé zǒulù hé pǎobù.
ex_zh: In autumn, leaves turn red and yellow, very beautiful. My younger brother and I go to the park to pick up leaves to make bookmarks. Autumn is neither cold nor hot; it's good for walking and running.

quote_en: 我去学校。 Wǒ qù xuéxiào.
ex_en: 明天我要去北京看长城。爸爸开车送我去飞机场。你去不去？我也去。我们一起去。妈妈不去，她要在家工作。 Míngtiān wǒ yào qù Běijīng kàn Chángchéng. Bàba kāi chē sòng wǒ qù fēijīchǎng. Nǐ qù bu qù? Wǒ yě qù. Wǒmen yìqǐ qù. Māma bù qù, tā yào zài jiā gōngzuò.
ex_zh: Tomorrow I am going to Beijing to see the Great Wall. Dad will drive me to the airport. Are you going? I'm going too. Let's go together. Mum is not going; she has to work at home.

quote_en: 去年我去了上海。 Qùnián wǒ qù le Shànghǎi.
quote_zh: Last year I went to Shanghai.
ex_en: 去年我和家人去南岛玩，住了五天。南岛很美，有高山和蓝湖。去年我还学了中文，现在会说一点了。 Qùnián wǒ hé jiā rén qù Nán Dǎo wán, zhù le wǔ tiān. Nán Dǎo hěn měi, yǒu gāo shān hé lán hú. Qùnián wǒ hái xué le Zhōngwén, xiànzài huì shuō yī diǎn le.
ex_zh: Last year my family and I went to the South Island to play and stayed for five days. The South Island is very beautiful, with high mountains and blue lakes. Last year I also started learning Chinese, and now I can speak a little.

quote_en: 妹妹穿了一条红裙子。 Mèimei chuān le yī tiáo hóng qúnzi.
quote_zh: My younger sister wore a red dress.
ex_en: 妈妈给我买了一条新裙子，是蓝色的，上面有白色的花。我穿上以后大家都说好看。夏天穿裙子很凉快。 Māma gěi wǒ mǎi le yī tiáo xīn qúnzi, shì lán sè de, shàngmian yǒu bái sè de huā. Wǒ chuān shàng yǐhòu dàjiā dōu shuō hǎo kàn. Xiàtiān chuān qúnzi hěn liángkuai.
ex_zh: Mum bought me a new dress. It is blue with white flowers on it. After I put it on, everyone said it looks good. Wearing a dress in summer is very cool.

quote_en: 今天很热。 Jīntiān hěn rè.
ex_en: 夏天天气很热，我穿短袖衣服和裙子。我喝很多水，吃冰淇淋。爸爸说热天不要去外面玩，会生病。 Xiàtiān tiānqì hěn rè, wǒ chuān duǎn xiù yīfu hé qúnzi. Wǒ hē hěn duō shuǐ, chī bīngqílín. Bàba shuō rè tiān bù yào qù wàimian wán, huì shēngbìng.
ex_zh: In summer the weather is very hot. I wear short-sleeve clothes and dresses. I drink a lot of water and eat ice cream. Dad says don't play outside on hot days, or you might get sick.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃热狗。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī rè gǒu.
ex_en: 昨天在公园门口我买了一个热狗，里面有面包和香肠，很好吃。妈妈说不可以常吃热狗，因为不健康。 Zuótiān zài gōngyuán ménkǒu wǒ mǎi le yī ge rè gǒu, lǐmiàn yǒu miànbāo hé xiāngcháng, hěn hǎo chī. Māma shuō bù kěyǐ cháng chī rè gǒu, yīnwèi bù jiànkāng.
ex_zh: Yesterday at the park gate I bought a hot dog. It had bread and a sausage inside, and it was very delicious. Mum says you can't eat hot dogs often because they are not healthy.

quote_en: 公园里有很多人。 Gōngyuán li yǒu hěn duō rén.
quote_zh: There are many people in the park.
ex_en: 中国有很多人，北京和上海是大城市。新西兰人不多，只有五百万人。每个人都有自己的家和家人。 Zhōngguó yǒu hěn duō rén, Běijīng hé Shànghǎi shì dà chéngshì. Xīn Xīlán rén bù duō, zhǐ yǒu wǔ bǎi wàn rén. Měi ge rén dōu yǒu zìjǐ de jiā hé jiā rén.
ex_zh: China has many people. Beijing and Shanghai are big cities. New Zealand does not have many people, only five million. Every person has their own home and family.

quote_en: 十月一日是国庆节。 Shí yuè yī rì shì guóqìng jié.
ex_en: 星期日我不去学校，在家休息。一日有二十四小时。妈妈每日早上六点起床，晚上十点睡觉。 Xīngqī rì wǒ bù qù xuéxiào, zài jiā xiūxi. Yī rì yǒu èrshí sì xiǎoshí. Māma měi rì zǎoshang liù diǎn qǐchuáng, wǎnshang shí diǎn shuìjiào.
ex_zh: On Sunday I don't go to school; I rest at home. One day has twenty-four hours. Mum gets up at six every morning and goes to sleep at ten every night.

quote_en: 这个题很容易。 Zhè ge tí hěn róngyì.
ex_en: 写汉字不容易，但是多练习就容易了。数学考试很难，中文考试容易一些。爸爸说做什么事都不容易，要努力。 Xiě Hànzì bù róngyì, dànshì duō liànxí jiù róngyì le. Shùxué kǎoshì hěn nán, Zhōngwén kǎoshì róngyì yī xiē. Bàba shuō zuò shénme shì dōu bù róngyì, yào nǔlì.
ex_zh: Writing Chinese characters is not easy, but with more practice it becomes easy. The maths exam was very hard; the Chinese exam was a bit easier. Dad says nothing is easy to do; you have to work hard.

quote_en: 我不吃肉。 Wǒ bù chī ròu.
ex_en: 爸爸喜欢吃肉，特别是牛肉和鸡肉。妈妈做肉的时候会加很多菜。妹妹只吃鱼肉，不吃别的肉。我吃肉很少。 Bàba xǐhuan chī ròu, tèbié shì niúròu hé jīròu. Māma zuò ròu de shíhou huì jiā hěn duō cài. Mèimei zhǐ chī yúròu, bù chī bié de ròu. Wǒ chī ròu hěn shǎo.
ex_zh: Dad likes eating meat, especially beef and chicken. When Mum cooks meat, she adds a lot of vegetables. My younger sister only eats fish, not other meats. I eat very little meat.

quote_en: 我有三个苹果。 Wǒ yǒu sān ge píngguǒ.
ex_en: 我家有三口人：爸爸、妈妈和我。弟弟不在我家。星期三下午我上三节课：中文、数学和体育。 Sān kǒu rén: bàba, māma hé wǒ. Dìdi bù zài wǒ jiā. Xīngqīsān xiàwǔ wǒ shàng sān jié kè: Zhōngwén, shùxué hé tǐyù.
ex_zh: My family has three people: Dad, Mum, and me. My younger brother is not in my home. On Wednesday afternoon I have three lessons: Chinese, maths, and PE.

quote_en: 山很高。 Shān hěn gāo.
ex_en: 南岛有很多高山，北岛也有山。去年我们爬了一座山，爬了两个小时才到山顶。山上有树、花和鸟。 Nán Dǎo yǒu hěn duō gāo shān, Běi Dǎo yě yǒu shān. Qùnián wǒmen pá le yī zuò shān, pá le liǎng ge xiǎoshí cái dào shāndǐng. Shān shang yǒu shù, huā hé niǎo.
ex_zh: The South Island has many high mountains. The North Island also has mountains. Last year we climbed a mountain; it took two hours to reach the top. On the mountain there are trees, flowers, and birds.

quote_en: 商场很大。 Shāngchǎng hěn dà.
quote_zh: The shopping mall is very big.
ex_en: 星期天妈妈带我去商场买衣服。商场里有商店、饭馆和电影院。我们先买衣服，然后吃饭，最后看电影。妈妈很开心。 Xīngqītiān māma dài wǒ qù shāngchǎng mǎi yīfu. Shāngchǎng li yǒu shāngdiàn, fànguǎn hé diànyǐngyuàn. Wǒmen xiān mǎi yīfu, ránhòu chī fàn, zuìhòu kàn diànyǐng. Māma hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: On Sunday Mum took me to the mall to buy clothes. The mall has shops, restaurants, and a cinema. We first bought clothes, then ate, and finally watched a movie. Mum was very happy.

quote_en: 商店在公园旁边。 Shāngdiàn zài gōngyuán pángbiān.
quote_zh: The shop is next to the park.
ex_en: 我家楼下有一个小商店，卖面包、牛奶、水果和文具。我常常去那里买笔和本子。商店的阿姨很友好。 Wǒ jiā lóu xià yǒu yī ge xiǎo shāngdiàn, mài miànbāo, niúnǎi, shuǐguǒ hé wénjù. Wǒ chángcháng qù nàlǐ mǎi bǐ hé běnzi. Shāngdiàn de āyí hěn yǒuhǎo.
ex_zh: There is a small shop downstairs from my home. It sells bread, milk, fruit, and stationery. I often go there to buy pens and notebooks. The shop auntie is very friendly.

quote_en: 我爸爸是商人。 Wǒ bàba shì shāng rén.
ex_en: 商人每天很忙，要开会、打电话、见朋友。叔叔也是商人，他常常去中国和美国。商人工作很辛苦。 Shāng rén měitiān hěn máng, yào kāi huì, dǎ diànhuà, jiàn péngyou. Shūshu yě shì shāng rén, tā chángcháng qù Zhōngguó hé Měiguó. Shāng rén gōngzuò hěn xīnkǔ.
ex_zh: Businesspeople are very busy every day. They have meetings, make phone calls, and meet friends. My uncle is also a businessperson. He often goes to China and the USA. Businesspeople work very hard.

def_en: to go to work, to attend work
quote_en: 爸爸每天上班。 Bàba měitiān shàngbān.
quote_zh: Dad goes to work every day.
ex_en: 妈妈早上八点上班，下午五点下班。她上班的地方离我家不远，走路二十分钟。上班很累，但是妈妈很努力。 Māma zǎoshang bā diǎn shàngbān, xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn xiàbān. Tā shàngbān de dìfang lí wǒ jiā bù yuǎn, zǒulù èrshí fēn zhōng. Shàngbān hěn lèi, dànshì māma hěn nǔlì.
ex_zh: Mum goes to work at eight in the morning and finishes at five in the afternoon. Her workplace is not far from home, a twenty-minute walk. Going to work is tiring, but Mum works very hard.

quote_en: 书在桌子上边。 Shū zài zhuōzi shàng bian.
quote_zh: The book is on top of the desk.
ex_en: 黑板的上边有一个钟。我坐在教室的上边？不，我坐在下边。上边的同学个子高。 Hēibǎn de shàng bian yǒu yī ge zhōng. Wǒ zuò zài jiàoshì de shàng bian? Bù, wǒ zuò zài xià bian. Shàng bian de tóngxué gèzi gāo.
ex_zh: Above the blackboard there is a clock. Do I sit at the top of the classroom? No, I sit at the bottom. The classmates at the top are tall.

quote_en: 上海很大。 Shànghǎi hěn dà.
ex_en: 去年我和妈妈去了上海，看了东方明珠塔，吃了小笼包。上海有很多高楼，人也很多。 Qùnián wǒ hé māma qù le Shànghǎi, kàn le Dōngfāng Míngzhū tǎ, chī le xiǎo lóng bāo. Shànghǎi yǒu hěn duō gāo lóu, rén yě hěn duō.
ex_zh: Last year Mum and I went to Shanghai, saw the Oriental Pearl Tower, and ate soup dumplings. Shanghai has many tall buildings and many people.

quote_en: 我们八点上课。 Wǒmen bā diǎn shàngkè.
ex_en: 上课的时候要认真听老师说话，不可以玩手机。今天上午我们上了中文课和数学课，老师教了新字。 Shàngkè de shíhou yào rènzhēn tīng lǎoshī shuōhuà, bù kěyǐ wán shǒujī. Jīntiān shàngwǔ wǒmen shàng le Zhōngwén kè hé shùxué kè, lǎoshī jiāo le xīn zì.
ex_zh: During lessons you need to listen carefully to the teacher and not play with your mobile phone. This morning we had Chinese and maths lessons; the teacher taught new characters.

def_en: to go online, browse the internet
quote_en: 我喜欢上网看新闻。 Wǒ xǐhuan shàngwǎng kàn xīnwén.
quote_zh: I like going online to read news.
ex_en: 每天晚上我做完工课后上网看一会儿视频。爸爸说上网太久对眼睛不好，所以我只上半小时。 Měitiān wǎnshang wǒ zuò wán gōngkè hòu shàngwǎng kàn yī huìr shìpín. Bàba shuō shàngwǎng tài jiǔ duì yǎnjing bù hǎo, suǒyǐ wǒ zhǐ shàng bàn xiǎoshí.
ex_zh: Every evening after finishing homework, I go online to watch videos for a while. Dad says going online too long is bad for your eyes, so I only go online for half an hour.

quote_en: 上午我去学校。 Shàngwǔ wǒ qù xuéxiào.
quote_zh: In the morning I go to school.
ex_en: 今天上午我们有四节课：中文、数学、科学和体育。上午很忙，但是下午就轻松一点。 Jīntiān shàngwǔ wǒmen yǒu sì jié kè: Zhōngwén, shùxué, kēxué hé tǐyù. Shàngwǔ hěn máng, dànshì xiàwǔ jiù qīngsōng yī diǎn.
ex_zh: This morning we had four lessons: Chinese, maths, science, and PE. The morning was very busy, but the afternoon was a bit more relaxed.

quote_en: 我每天早上七点上学。 Wǒ měitiān zǎoshang qī diǎn shàngxué.
quote_zh: I go to school at seven every morning.
ex_en: 星期一到星期五我要上学，星期六和星期日不上学。上学可以学到很多知识，还可以和朋友一起玩。 Xīngqīyī dào xīngqīwǔ wǒ yào shàngxué, xīngqīliù hé xīngqīrì bù shàngxué. Shàngxué kěyǐ xué dào hěn duō zhīshi, hái kěyǐ hé péngyou yìqǐ wán.
ex_zh: I go to school from Monday to Friday; I don't go on Saturday and Sunday. Attending school lets me learn a lot of knowledge and also play with friends.

quote_en: 我买了一件新上衣。 Wǒ mǎi le yī jiàn xīn shàngyī.
ex_en: 校服的上衣是白色的，裤子是黑色的。冬天我穿毛衣在上衣里面。妈妈给我买了一件蓝色的上衣，很好看。 Xiàofú de shàngyī shì bái sè de, kùzi shì hēi sè de. Dōngtiān wǒ chuān máo yī zài shàngyī lǐmiàn. Māma gěi wǒ mǎi le yī jiàn lán sè de shàngyī, hěn hǎo kàn.
ex_zh: The school uniform top is white and the trousers are black. In winter I wear a wool jumper under my top. Mum bought me a blue top; it looks very nice.

def_zh: 上个月的事；上个月去了
quote_en: 上个月我去了北京。 Shàng ge yuè wǒ qù le Běijīng.
quote_zh: Last month I went to Beijing.
ex_en: 上个月我过生日，妈妈给我买了一个大蛋糕，朋友送了我一本书。上个月还考了中文试，我考得不错。 Shàng ge yuè wǒ guò shēngrì, māma gěi wǒ mǎi le yī ge dà dàngāo, péngyou sòng le wǒ yī běn shū. Shàng ge yuè hái kǎo le Zhōngwén shì, wǒ kǎo de bùcuò.
ex_zh: Last month I celebrated my birthday. Mum bought me a big cake, and a friend gave me a book. Last month I also took a Chinese exam, and I did well.

def_zh: 上个星期天；上个星期的事
quote_en: 上个星期我感冒了。 Shàng ge xīngqī wǒ gǎnmào le.
quote_zh: Last week I caught a cold.
ex_en: 上个星期我们学校开了一个会，老师说下个月要考试。上个星期我还看了电影，是中文的，很有意思。 Shàng ge xīngqī wǒmen xuéxiào kāi le yī ge huì, lǎoshī shuō xià ge yuè yào kǎoshì. Shàng ge xīngqī wǒ hái kàn le diànyǐng, shì Zhōngwén de, hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Last week our school had a meeting, and the teacher said there would be an exam next month. Last week I also watched a movie – it was in Chinese and very interesting.

quote_en: 今天人很少。 Jīntiān rén hěn shǎo.
quote_zh: There are very few people today.
ex_en: 我每天少看电视，多看书。弟弟还小，吃的饭很少。妈妈让我少喝可乐，说对身体不好。 Wǒ měitiān shǎo kàn diànshì, duō kàn shū. Dìdi hái xiǎo, chī de fàn hěn shǎo. Māma ràng wǒ shǎo hē kělè, shuō duì shēntǐ bù hǎo.
ex_zh: I watch less TV and read more books every day. My younger brother is still small; he eats very little food. Mum tells me to drink less cola; she says it's bad for the body.

quote_en: 谁在门口？ Shéi zài ménkǒu?
ex_en: 谁拿了我的笔？是弟弟拿的吗？我不知道是谁。老师说谁考了第一名就奖励一本书。 Shéi ná le wǒ de bǐ? Shì dìdi ná de ma? Wǒ bù zhīdào shì shéi. Lǎoshī shuō shéi kǎo le dì yī míng jiù jiǎnglì yī běn shū.
ex_zh: Who took my pen? Was it my younger brother? I don't know who it was. The teacher said whoever gets first place on the exam will get a book as a reward.

quote_en: 这是谁的书？ Zhè shì shéi de shū?
ex_en: 谁的手机在响？是我的手机。谁的作业没交？小明没交。老师问这是谁的衣服，没有人回答。 Shéi de shǒujī zài xiǎng? Shì wǒ de shǒujī. Shéi de zuòyè méi jiāo? Xiǎo Míng méi jiāo. Lǎoshī wèn zhè shì shéi de yīfu, méiyǒu rén huídá.
ex_zh: Whose mobile phone is ringing? It's mine. Whose homework wasn't handed in? Xiaoming didn't hand it in. The teacher asked whose clothes these were, and no one answered.

quote_en: 我的身体很好。 Wǒ de shēntǐ hěn hǎo.
ex_en: 每天运动对身体好。我早上跑步，下午打球。妈妈说要好好照顾身体，多喝水，早睡觉。 Měitiān yùndòng duì shēntǐ hǎo. Wǒ zǎoshang pǎobù, xiàwǔ dǎ qiú. Māma shuō yào hǎohǎo zhàogù shēntǐ, duō hē shuǐ, zǎo shuìjiào.
ex_zh: Exercising every day is good for the body. I run in the morning and play ball games in the afternoon. Mum says you need to take good care of your body, drink more water, and sleep early.

quote_en: 你在看什么？ Nǐ zài kàn shénme?
ex_en: 你今天中午吃了什么？我吃了米饭和鸡蛋。你叫什么名字？我叫小明。爸爸买什么礼物给妈妈？他买了花。 Nǐ jīntiān zhōngwǔ chī le shénme? Wǒ chī le mǐfàn hé jīdàn. Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi? Wǒ jiào Xiǎo Míng. Bàba mǎi shénme lǐwù gěi māma? Tā mǎi le huā.
ex_zh: What did you eat for lunch today? I ate rice and eggs. What is your name? My name is Xiaoming. What gift did Dad buy for Mum? He bought flowers.

def_zh: 什么时候来；什么时候走
quote_en: 你什么时候回家？ Nǐ shénme shíhou huíjiā?
ex_en: 你们什么时候考试？下个星期三。我们什么时候吃饭？六点。你什么时候去北京？明年夏天。 Nǐmen shénme shíhou kǎoshì? Xià ge xīngqīsān. Wǒmen shénme shíhou chī fàn? Liù diǎn. Nǐ shénme shíhou qù Běijīng? Míngnián xiàtiān.
ex_zh: When do you have your exam? Next Wednesday. When do we eat? At six. When are you going to Beijing? Next summer.

def_en: to get sick, to be sick
quote_en: 我昨天生病了。 Wǒ zuótiān shēngbìng le.
ex_en: 弟弟生病了，没有去学校。妈妈带他去看医生。生病要吃药，多喝水，多休息。 Dìdi shēngbìng le, méiyǒu qù xuéxiào. Māma dài tā qù kàn yīshēng. Shēngbìng yào chī yào, duō hē shuǐ, duō xiūxi.
ex_zh: My younger brother got sick and didn't go to school. Mum took him to see a doctor. When you're sick, you need to take medicine, drink more water, and rest more.

quote_en: 妈妈很生气。 Māma hěn shēngqì.
ex_en: 弟弟把我的书撕坏了，我很生气。但是他说对不起，我就不生气了。爸爸生气的时候不说话。 Dìdi bǎ wǒ de shū sī huài le, wǒ hěn shēngqì. Dànshì tā shuō duìbuqǐ, wǒ jiù bù shēngqì le. Bàba shēngqì de shíhou bù shuōhuà.
ex_zh: My younger brother tore my book, and I was very angry. But he said sorry, so I stopped being angry. When Dad is angry, he doesn't talk.

quote_en: 今天是我的生日。 Jīntiān shì wǒ de shēngrì.
ex_en: 昨天妈妈给我过了生日，她买了一个大蛋糕，我吹了蜡烛。朋友送了我生日礼物，是一本书。我很开心。 Zuótiān māma gěi wǒ guò le shēngrì, tā mǎi le yī ge dà dàngāo, wǒ chuī le làzhú. Péngyou sòng le wǒ shēngrì lǐwù, shì yī běn shū. Wǒ hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Yesterday Mum celebrated my birthday. She bought a big cake, and I blew out the candles. A friend gave me a birthday present – a book. I was very happy.

quote_en: 明天有生日会。 Míngtiān yǒu shēngrì huì.
quote_zh: There is a birthday party tomorrow.
ex_en: 妹妹的生日会来了很多朋友，大家唱歌、吃蛋糕、送礼物。我也送了她一个可爱的玩具。生日会很好玩。 Mèimei de shēngrì huì lái le hěn duō péngyou, dàjiā chàng gē, chī dàngāo, sòng lǐwù. Wǒ yě sòng le tā yī ge kě'ài de wánjù. Shēngrì huì hěn hǎo wán.
ex_zh: Many friends came to my younger sister's birthday party. Everyone sang, ate cake, and gave gifts. I also gave her a cute toy. The birthday party was very fun.

quote_en: 我有十个苹果。 Wǒ yǒu shí ge píngguǒ.
ex_en: 十加十等于二十。我们班有十个男生和十个女生。十点我睡觉。一个星期有七天，不是十天。 Shí jiā shí děngyú èrshí. Wǒmen bān yǒu shí ge nánshēng hé shí ge nǚshēng. Shí diǎn wǒ shuìjiào. Yī ge xīngqī yǒu qī tiān, bù shì shí tiān.
ex_zh: Ten plus ten equals twenty. Our class has ten boys and ten girls. At ten I go to sleep. A week has seven days, not ten days.

quote_en: 现在没有时间了。 Xiànzài méiyǒu shíjiān le.
ex_en: 时间过得很快，一天很快就过去了。我没有时间看电视，因为要做功课。星期天有时间，可以和朋友玩。 Shíjiān guò de hěn kuài, yī tiān hěn kuài jiù guòqù le. Wǒ méiyǒu shíjiān kàn diànshì, yīnwèi yào zuò gōngkè. Xīngqītiān yǒu shíjiān, kěyǐ hé péngyou wán.
ex_zh: Time passes very quickly; a day goes by fast. I don't have time to watch TV because I have to do homework. On Sunday I have time and can play with friends.

quote_en: 我有很多事情要做。 Wǒ yǒu hěn duō shìqing yào zuò.
quote_zh: I have many things to do.
ex_en: 今天下午我有三件事情：先做功课，然后帮妈妈买菜，最后和朋友打球。事情不多，但是要安排好时间。 Jīntiān xiàwǔ wǒ yǒu sān jiàn shìqing: xiān zuò gōngkè, ránhòu bāng māma mǎi cài, zuìhòu hé péngyou dǎ qiú. Shìqing bù duō, dànshì yào ānpái hǎo shíjiān.
ex_zh: This afternoon I have three things to do: first do homework, then help Mum buy vegetables, and finally play ball games with friends. There aren't many things, but I need to arrange my time well.

quote_en: 我的手很干净。 Wǒ de shǒu hěn gānjìng.
ex_en: 吃饭前要洗手，用洗手液洗。妈妈的手很大，我的手还小。老师让我们举手回答问题。 Chī fàn qián yào xǐ shǒu, yòng xǐ shǒu yè xǐ. Māma de shǒu hěn dà, wǒ de shǒu hái xiǎo. Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen jǔ shǒu huídá wèntí.
ex_zh: Before eating, you need to wash your hands with hand soap. Mum's hands are big; my hands are still small. The teacher asks us to raise our hands to answer questions.

quote_en: 我有一部手机。 Wǒ yǒu yī bù shǒujī.
ex_en: 爸爸的手机是黑色的，妈妈的是白色的。我用手机给朋友打电话、发信息。但是上课不能玩手机。 Bàba de shǒujī shì hēi sè de, māma de shì bái sè de. Wǒ yòng shǒujī gěi péngyou dǎ diànhuà, fā xìnxī. Dànshì shàngkè bù néng wán shǒujī.
ex_zh: Dad's mobile phone is black, Mum's is white. I use my mobile phone to call friends and send messages. But you can't play with your phone during class.

quote_en: 我爱看书。 Wǒ ài kàn shū.
ex_en: 图书馆里有很多书，有中文书、英文书、数学书。我每个星期借两本书回家看。看书可以学到很多新东西。 Túshūguǎn li yǒu hěn duō shū, yǒu Zhōngwén shū, Yīngwén shū, shùxué shū. Wǒ měi ge xīngqī jiè liǎng běn shū huíjiā kàn. Kàn shū kěyǐ xué dào hěn duō xīn dōngxi.
ex_zh: There are many books in the library: Chinese books, English books, maths books. Every week I borrow two books to read at home. Reading books can teach you many new things.

quote_en: 我的书包很重。 Wǒ de shūbāo hěn zhòng.
quote_zh: My school bag is very heavy.
ex_en: 书包里有书、本子、笔、水杯和午饭。每天我背着书包走路去学校。妈妈给我买了一个新书包，是蓝色的。 Shūbāo li yǒu shū, běnzi, bǐ, shuǐ bēi hé wǔfàn. Měitiān wǒ bēi zhe shūbāo zǒulù qù xuéxiào. Māma gěi wǒ mǎi le yī ge xīn shūbāo, shì lán sè de.
ex_zh: Inside my school bag there are books, notebooks, pens, a water bottle, and lunch. Every day I carry my school bag and walk to school. Mum bought me a new school bag; it is blue.

quote_en: 书店在公园旁边。 Shūdiàn zài gōngyuán pángbiān.
quote_zh: The bookstore is next to the park.
ex_en: 星期天我和爸爸去书店买书。书店里有很多人，大家都在看书。我买了一本中文书，花了二十块钱。 Xīngqītiān wǒ hé bàba qù shūdiàn mǎi shū. Shūdiàn li yǒu hěn duō rén, dàjiā dōu zài kàn shū. Wǒ mǎi le yī běn Zhōngwén shū, huā le èrshí kuài qián.
ex_zh: On Sunday Dad and I went to the bookstore to buy books. There were many people in the bookstore, all reading books. I bought a Chinese book and spent twenty yuan.

quote_en: 今天天气很舒服。 Jīntiān tiānqì hěn shūfu.
ex_en: 我坐在沙发上看书，觉得很舒服。穿棉衣服很舒服，不冷也不热。妈妈生病了，身体不舒服，在家休息。 Wǒ zuò zài shāfā shang kàn shū, juéde hěn shūfu. Chuān mián yīfu hěn shūfu, bù lěng yě bù rè. Māma shēngbìng le, shēntǐ bù shūfu, zài jiā xiūxi.
ex_zh: Sitting on the sofa reading a book, I feel very comfortable. Wearing cotton clothes is comfortable, neither cold nor hot. Mum is sick; her body is uncomfortable, so she's resting at home.

quote_en: 我喜欢数学。 Wǒ xǐhuan shùxué.
ex_en: 今天上午有数学课，老师教我们加法。数学不难，多做练习就会了。我数学考了九十分，很高兴。 Jīntiān shàngwǔ yǒu shùxué kè, lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen jiāfǎ. Shùxué bù nán, duō zuò liànxí jiù huì le. Wǒ shùxué kǎo le jiǔshí fēn, hěn gāoxìng.
ex_zh: This morning there was a maths lesson. The teacher taught us addition. Maths is not hard; with more practice you'll get it. I got ninety points on the maths exam; I was very happy.

quote_en: 我想喝水。 Wǒ xiǎng hē shuǐ.
ex_en: 每天要喝八杯水，对身体好。运动以后更要喝水。弟弟不喜欢喝白水，他喜欢喝果汁。 Měitiān yào hē bā bēi shuǐ, duì shēntǐ hǎo. Yùndòng yǐhòu gèng yào hē shuǐ. Dìdi bù xǐhuan hē bái shuǐ, tā xǐhuan hē guǒzhī.
ex_zh: You should drink eight glasses of water every day; it's good for your body. After exercising, you need to drink even more water. My younger brother doesn't like drinking plain water; he likes drinking juice.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃水果。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī shuǐguǒ.
ex_en: 妈妈每天买新鲜水果给我们吃。苹果、香蕉、橙子都是水果。水果有维生素，对身体好。妹妹爱吃草莓。 Māma měitiān mǎi xīnxiān shuǐguǒ gěi wǒmen chī. Píngguǒ, xiāngjiāo, chéngzi dōu shì shuǐguǒ. Shuǐguǒ yǒu wéishēngsù, duì shēntǐ hǎo. Mèimei ài chī cǎoméi.
ex_zh: Mum buys fresh fruit for us to eat every day. Apples, bananas, and oranges are all fruit. Fruit has vitamins and is good for your body. My younger sister loves eating strawberries.

quote_en: 我十点睡觉。 Wǒ shí diǎn shuìjiào.
quote_zh: I go to sleep at ten.
ex_en: 每天要睡八个小时，第二天才有精神。弟弟九点就睡觉了，因为他还小。睡觉前我喝一杯牛奶。 Měitiān yào shuì bā ge xiǎoshí, dì èr tiān cái yǒu jīngshén. Dìdi jiǔ diǎn jiù shuìjiào le, yīnwèi tā hái xiǎo. Shuìjiào qián wǒ hē yī bēi niúnǎi.
ex_zh: You need to sleep eight hours every day to have energy the next day. My younger brother goes to sleep at nine because he is still small. Before sleeping, I drink a glass of milk.

def_en: to say, to speak, to talk
quote_en: 请说慢一点。 Qǐng shuō màn yī diǎn.
ex_en: 老师上课说中文，我们听不太懂。我会说一点中文，可以和老师问好。爸爸说英语，妈妈说中文。 Lǎoshī shàngkè shuō Zhōngwén, wǒmen tīng bù tài dǒng. Wǒ huì shuō yī diǎn Zhōngwén, kěyǐ hé lǎoshī wèn hǎo. Bàba shuō Yīngyǔ, māma shuō Zhōngwén.
ex_zh: The teacher speaks Chinese in class; we don't understand very well. I can speak a little Chinese and can greet the teacher. Dad speaks English; Mum speaks Chinese.

def_en: to talk, to speak (never with an object)
quote_en: 上课不要说话。 Shàngkè bù yào shuōhuà.
ex_en: 吃饭的时候我们一家人说话，聊今天的事情。弟弟说话很快，我听不清楚。在图书馆不可以大声说话。 Chī fàn de shíhou wǒmen yī jiā rén shuōhuà, liáo jīntiān de shìqing. Dìdi shuōhuà hěn kuài, wǒ tīng bù qīngchu. Zài túshūguǎn bù kěyǐ dà shēng shuōhuà.
ex_zh: When we eat, our family talks and chats about today's matters. My younger brother speaks very fast; I can't hear clearly. In the library you can't talk loudly.

quote_en: 我有四个苹果。 Wǒ yǒu sì ge píngguǒ.
ex_en: 一个星期有七天，星期四是第四天。我们班有四个女生和六个男生。四加四等于八。 Yī ge xīngqī yǒu qī tiān, xīngqīsì shì dì sì tiān. Wǒmen bān yǒu sì ge nǚshēng hé liù ge nánshēng. Sì jiā sì děngyú bā.
ex_zh: A week has seven days; Thursday is the fourth day. Our class has four girls and six boys. Four plus four equals eight.

def_en: to see somebody off; to send, to give, to deliver
quote_en: 妈妈送我一个礼物。 Māma sòng wǒ yī ge lǐwù.
ex_en: 爸爸去机场送爷爷坐飞机。朋友生日我送了他一本书。老师送我们回家？不，我们自己走路回家。 Bàba qù fēijīchǎng sòng yéye zuò fēijī. Péngyou shēngrì wǒ sòng le tā yī běn shū. Lǎoshī sòng wǒmen huíjiā? Bù, wǒmen zìjǐ zǒulù huíjiā.
ex_zh: Dad went to the airport to see Grandfather off on the plane. For my friend's birthday, I gave him a book. Does the teacher send us home? No, we walk home by ourselves.

quote_en: 我十岁了。 Wǒ shí suì le.
ex_en: 妹妹今年五岁，她很小。爷爷八十岁了，身体还很好。你几岁？我十二岁。弟弟比我小四岁。 Mèimei jīnnián wǔ suì, tā hěn xiǎo. Yéye bāshí suì le, shēntǐ hái hěn hǎo. Nǐ jǐ suì? Wǒ shí'èr suì. Dìdi bǐ wǒ xiǎo sì suì.
ex_zh: My younger sister is five years old this year; she is very small. Grandfather is eighty years old and still very healthy. How old are you? I am twelve. My younger brother is four years younger than me.

quote_en: 他是我的爸爸。 Tā shì wǒ de bàba.
ex_en: 他叫什么名字？他叫王小明。他是我的好朋友，我们常常一起打球。他喜欢喝可乐，我不喜欢。 Tā jiào shénme míngzi? Tā jiào Wáng Xiǎo Míng. Tā shì wǒ de hǎo péngyou, wǒmen chángcháng yìqǐ dǎ qiú. Tā xǐhuan hē kělè, wǒ bù xǐhuan.
ex_zh: What is his name? His name is Wang Xiaoming. He is my good friend; we often play ball games together. He likes drinking cola; I don't like it.

quote_en: 她是我的妈妈。 Tā shì wǒ de māma.
ex_en: 她很喜欢看书，每天晚上看一小时。她是我的中文老师，教我们写汉字。她说话很慢，我们都听得懂。 Tā hěn xǐhuan kàn shū, měitiān wǎnshang kàn yī xiǎoshí. Tā shì wǒ de Zhōngwén lǎoshī, jiāo wǒmen xiě Hànzì. Tā shuōhuà hěn màn, wǒmen dōu tīng de dǒng.
ex_zh: She really likes reading books; she reads for one hour every evening. She is my Chinese teacher and teaches us to write Chinese characters. She speaks slowly, and we all understand.

quote_en: 它是我的狗。 Tā shì wǒ de gǒu.
ex_en: 我家有一只小猫，它很可爱。它喜欢吃鱼和喝牛奶。每天下午它在门口等我回家。它很听话。 Wǒ jiā yǒu yī zhī xiǎo māo, tā hěn kě'ài. Tā xǐhuan chī yú hé hē niúnǎi. Měitiān xiàwǔ tā zài ménkǒu děng wǒ huíjiā. Tā hěn tīnghuà.
ex_zh: My home has a little cat. It is very cute. It likes eating fish and drinking milk. Every afternoon it waits for me at the door when I come home. It is very obedient.

quote_en: 他喜欢踢足球。 Tā xǐhuan tī zúqiú.
quote_zh: He likes playing soccer (kicking the ball).
ex_en: 星期天下午我和朋友在运动场踢足球。踢球要用脚，不能用手。我踢得不好，但是很好玩。 Xīngqītiān xiàwǔ wǒ hé péngyou zài yùndòngchǎng tī zúqiú. Tī qiú yào yòng jiǎo, bù néng yòng shǒu. Wǒ tī de bù hǎo, dànshì hěn hǎo wán.
ex_zh: On Sunday afternoon my friends and I play soccer on the sports field. To kick the ball you use your feet, not your hands. I don't kick well, but it's very fun.

def_zh: 踢足球比赛；喜欢踢足球
quote_en: 哥哥喜欢踢足球。 Gēge xǐhuan tī zúqiú.
ex_en: 星期六下午我和朋友在运动场踢足球。踢足球要用脚，跑得很快。我们踢了一个小时，很累但是很开心。 Xīngqīliù xiàwǔ wǒ hé péngyou zài yùndòngchǎng tī zúqiú. Tī zúqiú yào yòng jiǎo, pǎo de hěn kuài. Wǒmen tī le yī ge xiǎoshí, hěn lèi dànshì hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: On Saturday afternoon my friends and I play soccer on the sports field. To play soccer you use your feet and run very fast. We played for an hour, very tired but very happy.

quote_en: 我喜欢上体育课。 Wǒ xǐhuan shàng tǐyù kè.
ex_en: 体育课我们可以跑步、打球、踢足球。老师教我们做运动。体育对身体好，每个学生都要上。 Tǐyù kè wǒmen kěyǐ pǎobù, dǎ qiú, tī zúqiú. Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen zuò yùndòng. Tǐyù duì shēntǐ hǎo, měi ge xuésheng dōu yào shàng.
ex_zh: In PE class we can run, play ball games, and play soccer. The teacher teaches us to do sports. PE is good for the body, and every student must take it.

quote_en: 体育馆在学校东边。 Tǐyùguǎn zài xuéxiào dōng bian.
quote_zh: The gym is east of the school.
ex_en: 下雨的时候我们在体育馆里上体育课。体育馆很大，可以打篮球和乒乓球。星期六体育馆开门，我和朋友去打篮球。 Xià yǔ de shíhou wǒmen zài tǐyùguǎn li shàng tǐyù kè. Tǐyùguǎn hěn dà, kěyǐ dǎ lánqiú hé pīngpāng qiú. Xīngqīliù tǐyùguǎn kāi mén, wǒ hé péngyou qù dǎ lánqiú.
ex_zh: When it rains, we have PE class inside the gym. The gym is very big; you can play basketball and table tennis. On Saturday the gym is open, and my friends and I go to play basketball.

quote_en: 一天有二十四小时。 Yī tiān yǒu èrshí sì xiǎoshí.
ex_en: 今天天气很好，不冷也不热。每天我早上六点起床，晚上十点睡觉。星期天我不上学，在家休息。 Jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo, bù lěng yě bù rè. Měitiān wǒ zǎoshang liù diǎn qǐchuáng, wǎnshang shí diǎn shuìjiào. Xīngqītiān wǒ bù shàngxué, zài jiā xiūxi.
ex_zh: Today the weather is very good, neither cold nor hot. Every day I get up at six in the morning and go to sleep at ten at night. On Sunday I don't go to school; I rest at home.

quote_en: 今天天气怎么样？ Jīntiān tiānqì zěnme yàng?
ex_en: 今天的天气很好，有太阳，不冷。明天的天气不好，要下雨。冬天天气很冷，夏天天气很热。 Jīntiān de tiānqì hěn hǎo, yǒu tàiyáng, bù lěng. Míngtiān de tiānqì bù hǎo, yào xià yǔ. Dōngtiān tiānqì hěn lěng, xiàtiān tiānqì hěn rè.
ex_zh: Today's weather is very good, sunny and not cold. Tomorrow's weather is not good; it will rain. In winter the weather is very cold; in summer the weather is very hot.

def_en: measure word for long, thin things
quote_en: 我有一条新裤子。 Wǒ yǒu yī tiáo xīn kùzi.
quote_zh: I have a new pair of trousers.
ex_en: 河里有一条大鱼，弟弟想抓它。妈妈买了一条裙子给妹妹，是红色的。一条路很长，从学校到我家要走十分钟。 Hé li yǒu yī tiáo dà yú, dìdi xiǎng zhuā tā. Māma mǎi le yī tiáo qúnzi gěi mèimei, shì hóng sè de. Yī tiáo lù hěn cháng, cóng xuéxiào dào wǒ jiā yào zǒu shí fēn zhōng.
ex_zh: There is a big fish in the river; my younger brother wants to catch it. Mum bought a dress for my younger sister; it is red. A road is very long; walking from school to my home takes ten minutes.

quote_en: 妹妹喜欢跳舞。 Mèimei xǐhuan tiào wǔ.
ex_en: 每天下午妹妹在家跳舞，她跟着音乐跳。妈妈说她跳得很好看。我不会跳舞，但是我会唱歌。 Měitiān xiàwǔ mèimei zài jiā tiào wǔ, tā gēn zhe yīnyuè tiào. Māma shuō tā tiào de hěn hǎo kàn. Wǒ bù huì tiào wǔ, dànshì wǒ huì chàng gē.
ex_zh: Every afternoon my younger sister dances at home; she dances to the music. Mum says she dances very well. I can't dance, but I can sing.

quote_en: 我喜欢听音乐。 Wǒ xǐhuan tīng yīnyuè.
ex_en: 上课要认真听老师说话，不可以玩手机。晚上我听音乐睡觉。你听到什么声音了吗？是外面的风。 Shàngkè yào rènzhēn tīng lǎoshī shuōhuà, bù kěyǐ wán shǒujī. Wǎnshang wǒ tīng yīnyuè shuìjiào. Nǐ tīng dào shénme shēngyīn le ma? Shì wàimian de fēng.
ex_zh: In class you need to listen carefully to the teacher and not play with your phone. At night I listen to music to fall asleep. Did you hear any sound? It's the wind outside.

quote_en: 听说你要去北京。 Tīng shuō nǐ yào qù Běijīng.
quote_zh: I heard that you are going to Beijing.
ex_en: 听说明天要下雨，我们带上伞。我听说朋友生病了，就去看他。你听说那个消息了吗？听说了，是真的吗？ Tīng shuō míngtiān yào xià yǔ, wǒmen dài shàng sǎn. Wǒ tīng shuō péngyou shēngbìng le, jiù qù kàn tā. Nǐ tīng shuō nà ge xiāoxi le ma? Tīng shuō le, shì zhēn de ma?
ex_zh: I heard that it will rain tomorrow, so we'll bring umbrellas. I heard that my friend was sick, so I went to see him. Did you hear that news? I heard it. Is it true?

quote_en: 他是我的同学。 Tā shì wǒ de tóngxué.
ex_en: 我和同学们一起上课、做功课、打球。我们班有二十个同学，大家都很友好。同学之间要互相帮助。 Wǒ hé tóngxué men yìqǐ shàngkè, zuò gōngkè, dǎ qiú. Wǒmen bān yǒu èrshí ge tóngxué, dàjiā dōu hěn yǒuhǎo. Tóngxué zhī jiān yào hùxiāng bāngzhù.
ex_zh: My classmates and I have class, do homework, and play ball games together. Our class has twenty classmates, and everyone is very friendly. Classmates should help each other.

quote_en: 我的头有点疼。 Wǒ de tóu yǒu diǎn téng.
ex_en: 头上戴帽子，冬天不冷。打球的时候要用头？不，不能。弟弟的头很小，爸爸的头很大。 Tóu shang dài màozi, dōngtiān bù lěng. Dǎ qiú de shíhou yào yòng tóu? Bù, bù néng. Dìdi de tóu hěn xiǎo, bàba de tóu hěn dà.
ex_zh: Wearing a hat on your head keeps you warm in winter. When playing ball games, do you use your head? No, you can't. My younger brother's head is very small; Dad's head is very big.

quote_en: 她的头发很长。 Tā de tóufa hěn cháng.
ex_en: 妈妈的头发是黑色的，很长。我的头发短短的。妹妹的头发也很长，她喜欢扎辫子。洗头发要用洗发水。 Māma de tóufa shì hēi sè de, hěn cháng. Wǒ de tóufa duǎn duǎn de. Mèimei de tóufa yě hěn cháng, tā xǐhuan zā biànzi. Xǐ tóufa yào yòng xǐfà shuǐ.
ex_zh: Mum's hair is black and very long. My hair is short. My younger sister's hair is also very long; she likes to braid it. Washing hair requires shampoo.

quote_en: 图书馆很安静。 Túshūguǎn hěn ānjìng.
ex_en: 我每个星期去图书馆借两本书。图书馆里有很多书，还有桌子椅子。在图书馆不可以大声说话，要保持安静。 Wǒ měi ge xīngqī qù túshūguǎn jiè liǎng běn shū. Túshūguǎn li yǒu hěn duō shū, hái yǒu zhuōzi yǐzi. Zài túshūguǎn bù kěyǐ dà shēng shuōhuà, yào bǎochí ānjìng.
ex_zh: I go to the library every week to borrow two books. The library has many books, also desks and chairs. In the library you can't talk loudly; you must keep quiet.

quote_en: 往前走一百米就到了。 Wǎng qián zǒu yī bǎi mǐ jiù dào le.
quote_zh: Go forward one hundred meters and you'll arrive.
ex_en: 去学校要往东边走。往左走是公园，往右走是商店。老师让我们往北走，可是我们往南走了，走错了。 Qù xuéxiào yào wǎng dōng bian zǒu. Wǎng zuǒ zǒu shì gōngyuán, wǎng yòu zǒu shì shāngdiàn. Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen wǎng běi zǒu, kěshì wǒmen wǎng nán zǒu le, zǒu cuò le.
ex_zh: To go to school you need to go east. Going left leads to the park; going right leads to the shops. The teacher told us to go north, but we went south – we went the wrong way.

quote_en: 外边在下雨。 Wàibian zài xià yǔ.
ex_en: 外边很冷，多穿衣服。我不出去，在家看书。弟弟在外边玩球。外边的人很多，都是去公园的。 Wàibian hěn lěng, duō chuān yīfu. Wǒ bù chū qù, zài jiā kàn shū. Dìdi zài wàibian wán qiú. Wàibian de rén hěn duō, dōu shì qù gōngyuán de.
ex_zh: It's cold outside; wear more clothes. I'm not going out; I'm reading at home. My younger brother is playing ball outside. There are many people outside, all going to the park.

def_zh: 一个外国人；外国人说话
quote_en: 他是外国人。 Tā shì wài guó rén.
ex_en: 北京有很多外国人，他们来中国工作或学习。我的中文老师是中国人，不是外国人。外国人说中文很有意思。 Běijīng yǒu hěn duō wài guó rén, tāmen lái Zhōngguó gōngzuò huò xuéxí. Wǒ de Zhōngwén lǎoshī shì Zhōngguó rén, bù shì wài guó rén. Wài guó rén shuō Zhōngwén hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Beijing has many foreigners. They come to China to work or study. My Chinese teacher is Chinese, not a foreigner. Foreigners speaking Chinese is very interesting.

quote_en: 我喜欢学外语。 Wǒ xǐhuan xué wài yǔ.
ex_en: 英语是外语，中文也是外语。在学校我们学外语，可以说和外国人说话。学好外语可以去很多国家。 Yīngyǔ shì wài yǔ, Zhōngwén yě shì wài yǔ. Zài xuéxiào wǒmen xué wài yǔ, kěyǐ shuō hé wài guó rén shuōhuà. Xué hǎo wài yǔ kěyǐ qù hěn duō guójiā.
ex_zh: English is a foreign language; Chinese is also a foreign language. At school we learn foreign languages so we can speak with foreigners. Learning a foreign language well lets you go to many countries.

quote_en: 我们一起玩吧。 Wǒmen yìqǐ wán ba.
ex_en: 星期天我和朋友去公园玩，我们玩球、跑步、放风筝。弟弟在家玩玩具。玩得很开心。 Xīngqītiān wǒ hé péngyou qù gōngyuán wán, wǒmen wán qiú, pǎobù, fàng fēngzheng. Dìdi zài jiā wán wánjù. Wán de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: On Sunday my friends and I go to the park to play. We play ball games, run, and fly kites. My younger brother plays with toys at home. We have a lot of fun.

quote_en: 六点吃晚饭。 Liù diǎn chī wǎnfàn.
ex_en: 妈妈每天做晚饭，我们一家人一起吃饭。晚饭有米饭、菜和肉。吃完晚饭我洗碗。 Wǎnshang wǒ chī wǎnfàn, xǐ wǎn. Māma měitiān zuò wǎnfàn, wǒmen yī jiā rén yìqǐ chī fàn. Wǎnfàn yǒu mǐfàn, cài hé ròu. Chī wán wǎnfàn wǒ xǐ wǎn.
ex_zh: Mum cooks dinner every day, and our whole family eats together. Dinner includes rice, vegetables, and meat. After dinner I wash the dishes.

quote_en: 晚上我在家看书。 Wǎnshang wǒ zài jiā kàn shū.
quote_zh: In the evening I read at home.
ex_en: 今天晚上我们一家人吃饭，然后看电视。晚上八点我做功课，九点洗澡，十点睡觉。晚上很安静。 Jīntiān wǎnshang wǒmen yī jiā rén chī fàn, ránhòu kàn diànshì. Wǎnshang bā diǎn wǒ zuò gōngkè, jiǔ diǎn xǐ zǎo, shí diǎn shuìjiào. Wǎnshang hěn ānjìng.
ex_zh: Tonight our family eats together, then watches TV. At eight in the evening I do homework, at nine I take a shower, and at ten I go to sleep. The evening is very quiet.

quote_en: 一万里有一万个一。 Yī wàn li yǒu yī wàn ge yī.
quote_zh: Ten thousand contains ten thousand ones.
ex_en: 新西兰有五百万人，中国有十四亿人，一万人很少。妈妈一个月挣五千块，两万块要挣四个月。 Xīn Xīlán yǒu wǔ bǎi wàn rén, Zhōngguó yǒu shí sì yì rén, yī wàn rén hěn shǎo. Māma yī ge yuè zhèng wǔ qiān kuài, liǎng wàn kuài yào zhèng sì ge yuè.
ex_zh: New Zealand has five million people, China has 1.4 billion people; ten thousand people is very few. Mum earns five thousand yuan a month; earning twenty thousand takes four months.

def_en: a family name, also means king
quote_en: 王老师教我们中文。 Wáng lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen Zhōngwén.
ex_en: 我有个同学姓王，他叫王小明。王老师是中国人，来自北京。国王是一国之主，中国没有国王。 Wǒ yǒu ge tóngxué xìng Wáng, tā jiào Wáng Xiǎo Míng. Wáng lǎoshī shì Zhōngguó rén, láizì Běijīng. Guówáng shì yī guó zhī zhǔ, Zhōngguó méiyǒu guówáng.
ex_zh: I have a classmate whose surname is Wang; his name is Wang Xiaoming. Teacher Wang is Chinese and comes from Beijing. A king is the ruler of a country; China does not have a king.

quote_en: 我忘了带书。 Wǒ wàng le dài shū.
quote_zh: I forgot to bring my book.
ex_en: 妈妈让我别忘了带午饭，可是我还是忘了。弟弟常常忘带作业，老师让他下次记得。不要忘记爸爸妈妈的生日。 Māma ràng wǒ bié wàng le dài wǔfàn, kěshì wǒ háishì wàng le. Dìdi chángcháng wàng dài zuòyè, lǎoshī ràng tā xià cì jìde. Bùyào wàngjì bàba māma de shēngrì.
ex_zh: Mum told me not to forget to bring lunch, but I still forgot. My younger brother often forgets to bring his homework; the teacher told him to remember next time. Don't forget Mum and Dad's birthdays.

def_zh: 为什么不来；为什么迟到
quote_en: 你为什么不去？ Nǐ wèishénme bù qù?
ex_en: 为什么今天下雨了？因为天气不好。你为什么哭了？因为我摔倒了。老师问你为什么没做功课，你要说实话。 Wèishénme jīntiān xià yǔ le? Yīnwèi tiānqì bù hǎo. Nǐ wèishénme kū le? Yīnwèi wǒ shuāi dǎo le. Lǎoshī wèn nǐ wèishénme méi zuò gōngkè, nǐ yào shuō shíhuà.
ex_zh: Why is it raining today? Because the weather is bad. Why are you crying? Because I fell down. The teacher asks you why you didn't do your homework; you need to tell the truth.

quote_en: 中国文化很有意思。 Zhōngguó wénhuà hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_en: 新西兰有毛利文化，中国有汉字和春节。每个国家都有自己的文化。学文化可以让我们更了解别人。 Xīn Xīlán yǒu Máo lì wénhuà, Zhōngguó yǒu Hànzì hé Chūnjié. Měi ge guójiā dōu yǒu zìjǐ de wénhuà. Xué wénhuà kěyǐ ràng wǒmen gèng liǎojiě biérén.
ex_zh: New Zealand has Māori culture; China has Chinese characters and Spring Festival. Every country has its own culture. Learning about culture helps us understand others better.

quote_en: 我是学生。 Wǒ shì xuésheng.
ex_en: 我今年十岁，我住在北岛。我喜欢看书和打球。我的家人很爱我，我也爱我的家人。 Wǒ jīnnián shí suì, wǒ zhù zài Běi Dǎo. Wǒ xǐhuan kàn shū hé dǎ qiú. Wǒ de jiā rén hěn ài wǒ, wǒ yě ài wǒ de jiā rén.
ex_zh: I am ten years old this year. I live in the North Island. I like reading books and playing ball games. My family members love me very much, and I also love my family members.

quote_en: 我有五个苹果。 Wǒ yǒu wǔ ge píngguǒ.
ex_en: 我家有五口人：爸爸、妈妈、哥哥、妹妹和我。五点放学，我五点十五分到家。五加五等于十。 Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén: bàba, māma, gēge, mèimei hé wǒ. Wǔ diǎn fàngxué, wǒ wǔ diǎn shíwǔ fēn dào jiā. Wǔ jiā wǔ děngyú shí.
ex_zh: My family has five people: Dad, Mum, older brother, younger sister, and me. School finishes at five; I get home at 5:15. Five plus five equals ten.

quote_en: 十二点吃午饭。 Shí'èr diǎn chī wǔfàn.
ex_en: 今天午饭我吃了米饭、炒鸡蛋和一个苹果。妈妈给我带了午饭，不用在学校买。午饭很重要，不吃会饿。 Jīntiān wǔfàn wǒ chī le mǐfàn, chǎo jīdàn hé yī ge píngguǒ. Māma gěi wǒ dài le wǔfàn, bùyòng zài xuéxiào mǎi. Wǔfàn hěn zhòngyào, bù chī huì è.
ex_zh: Today for lunch I ate rice, scrambled eggs, and an apple. Mum packed lunch for me, so I don't need to buy it at school. Lunch is very important; if you don't eat, you'll be hungry.

quote_en: 太阳从西边落下。 Tàiyáng cóng xī bian luò xià.
quote_zh: The sun sets in the west.
ex_en: 学校西边有一个商店，商店西边是车站。我家在学校的西边，走路十分钟。往西边走可以到公园。 Xuéxiào xī bian yǒu yī ge shāngdiàn, shāngdiàn xī bian shì chēzhàn. Wǒ jiā zài xuéxiào de xī bian, zǒulù shí fēn zhōng. Wǎng xī bian zǒu kěyǐ dào gōngyuán.
ex_zh: West of the school there is a shop; west of the shop is the bus stop. My home is west of the school, a ten-minute walk. Going west leads to the park.

quote_en: 吃饭前要洗手。 Chī fàn qián yào xǐ shǒu.
quote_zh: Before eating, you need to wash your hands.
ex_en: 妈妈每天洗衣服，我帮她晒衣服。弟弟自己洗袜子。洗澡要用热水。吃完饭我洗碗。 Māma měitiān xǐ yīfu, wǒ bāng tā shài yīfu. Dìdi zìjǐ xǐ wàzi. Xǐ zǎo yào yòng rè shuǐ. Chī wán fàn wǒ xǐ wǎn.
ex_zh: Mum washes clothes every day; I help her hang the clothes. My younger brother washes his own socks. When taking a shower, use hot water. After eating, I wash the dishes.

def_en: to like, to be fond of, to enjoy
quote_en: 我喜欢吃苹果。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī píngguǒ.
ex_en: 我喜欢看书、打球和听音乐。妹妹喜欢画画和跳舞。爸爸喜欢喝茶，妈妈喜欢喝咖啡。大家都有自己喜欢的东西。 Wǒ xǐhuan kàn shū, dǎ qiú hé tīng yīnyuè. Mèimei xǐhuan huà huà hé tiào wǔ. Bàba xǐhuan hē chá, māma xǐhuan hē kāfēi. Dàjiā dōu yǒu zìjǐ xǐhuan de dōngxi.
ex_zh: I like reading, playing ball games, and listening to music. My younger sister likes drawing and dancing. Dad likes drinking tea; Mum likes drinking coffee. Everyone has things they like.

def_zh: 去洗手间；洗手间在哪儿
quote_en: 洗手间在那边。 Xǐshǒujiān zài nà bian.
ex_en: 学校每一层都有洗手间，男生和女生分开。上课的时候不能去洗手间，要等下课。洗手间很干净。 Xuéxiào měi yī céng dōu yǒu xǐshǒujiān, nánshēng hé nǚshēng fēn kāi. Shàngkè de shíhou bù néng qù xǐshǒujiān, yào děng xiàkè. Xǐshǒujiān hěn gānjìng.
ex_zh: Every floor of the school has bathrooms, separate for boys and girls. You can't go to the bathroom during class; you need to wait until class is over. The bathrooms are very clean.

quote_en: 爸爸六点下班。 Bàba liù diǎn xiàbān.
ex_en: 妈妈下午五点下班，然后去商店买菜，六点到家。爸爸下班很晚，有时候八点才回来。下班以后他们很累。 Māma xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn xiàbān, ránhòu qù shāngdiàn mǎi cài, liù diǎn dào jiā. Bàba xiàbān hěn wǎn, yǒu shíhou bā diǎn cái huílai. Xiàbān yǐhòu tāmen hěn lèi.
ex_zh: Mum finishes work at five in the afternoon, then goes to the shop to buy vegetables, and gets home at six. Dad finishes work very late, sometimes not until eight. After finishing work, they are very tired.

quote_en: 书在桌子下边。 Shū zài zhuōzi xià bian.
quote_zh: The book is under the desk.
ex_en: 黑板上边有字，下边也有字。我的座位在教室的下边，上边的同学个子高。床下边放着一双鞋。 Hēibǎn shàng bian yǒu zì, xià bian yě yǒu zì. Wǒ de zuòwèi zài jiàoshì de xià bian, shàng bian de tóngxué gèzi gāo. Chuáng xià bian fàng zhe yī shuāng xié.
ex_zh: The blackboard has writing on the top and also on the bottom. My seat is at the bottom of the classroom; the classmates at the top are tall. Under the bed there is a pair of shoes.

def_en: to finish a lesson, class dismissed
quote_en: 十点下课。 Shí diǎn xiàkè.
ex_en: 下课以后我去洗手间，然后和朋友说话。老师说完“下课”，同学们站起来说“老师再见”。下午四点半下课，我走路回家。 Xiàkè yǐhòu wǒ qù xǐshǒujiān, ránhòu hé péngyou shuōhuà. Lǎoshī shuō wán “xiàkè”, tóngxué men zhàn qǐlái shuō “lǎoshī zàijiàn”. Xiàwǔ sì diǎn bàn xiàkè, wǒ zǒulù huíjiā.
ex_zh: After class I go to the bathroom, then talk with friends. After the teacher says "class dismissed," the students stand up and say "goodbye, teacher." Class finishes at 4:30 in the afternoon; I walk home.

quote_en: 下午我去打球。 Xiàwǔ wǒ qù dǎ qiú.
quote_zh: In the afternoon I go to play ball games.
ex_en: 今天下午我们有中文课和体育课。下午两点上课，四点下课。下午放学以后我帮妈妈做事情。 Jīntiān xiàwǔ wǒmen yǒu Zhōngwén kè hé tǐyù kè. Xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn shàngkè, sì diǎn xiàkè. Xiàwǔ fàngxué yǐhòu wǒ bāng māma zuò shìqing.
ex_zh: This afternoon we have Chinese and PE. Classes start at two and finish at four. After school in the afternoon I help Mum with things.

quote_en: 今天下雪了。 Jīntiān xià xuě le.
ex_en: 冬天很冷，南岛下雪，北岛不下雪。下雪的时候我们穿很多衣服，堆雪人。雪是白色的，很漂亮。 Dōngtiān hěn lěng, Nán Dǎo xià xuě, Běi Dǎo bù xià xuě. Xià xuě de shíhou wǒmen chuān hěn duō yīfu, duī xuě rén. Xuě shì bái sè de, hěn piàoliang.
ex_zh: In winter it's very cold. The South Island gets snow; the North Island doesn't. When it snows, we wear many clothes and build snowmen. Snow is white and very beautiful.

quote_en: 今天下雨了。 Jīntiān xià yǔ le.
ex_en: 下雨的时候要带伞，不然衣服会湿。我不喜欢下雨，因为不能出去打球。春天常常下雨，天气不冷。 Xià yǔ de shíhou yào dài sǎn, bùrán yīfu huì shī. Wǒ bù xǐhuan xià yǔ, yīnwèi bù néng chū qù dǎ qiú. Chūntiān chángcháng xià yǔ, tiānqì bù lěng.
ex_zh: When it rains, you need to bring an umbrella, otherwise your clothes will get wet. I don't like rain because I can't go out to play ball games. In spring it often rains, and the weather is not cold.

def_zh: 下个星期见；下个星期考试
quote_en: 下个星期我要考试。 Xià ge xīngqī wǒ yào kǎoshì.
quote_zh: I have an exam next week.
ex_en: 下个星期我们学校放假两天。下个星期我朋友过生日，我要送他礼物。下个星期天气会变冷。 Xià ge xīngqī wǒmen xuéxiào fàngjià liǎng tiān. Xià ge xīngqī wǒ péngyou guò shēngrì, wǒ yào sòng tā lǐwù. Xià ge xīngqī tiānqì huì biàn lěng.
ex_zh: Next week our school has a two-day holiday. Next week my friend is celebrating his birthday; I will give him a gift. Next week the weather will become cold.

quote_en: 下个月我去北京。 Xià ge yuè wǒ qù Běijīng.
quote_zh: Next month I am going to Beijing.
ex_en: 下个月是十二月，冬天要来了。下个月爸爸过生日，我要送他一件礼物。下个月我们要考试，现在要好好复习。 Xià ge yuè shì shí'èr yuè, dōngtiān yào lái le. Xià ge yuè bàba guò shēngrì, wǒ yào sòng tā yī jiàn lǐwù. Xià ge yuè wǒmen yào kǎoshì, xiànzài yào hǎohǎo fùxí.
ex_zh: Next month is December; winter is coming. Next month is Dad's birthday; I will give him a gift. Next month we have exams, so now I need to review well.

quote_en: 夏天我喜欢游泳。 Xiàtiān wǒ xǐhuan yóuyǒng.
ex_en: 夏天天气很热，我穿短袖和裙子。夏天我们去海边玩，吃冰淇淋。晚上开空调睡觉。 Xiàtiān tiānqì hěn rè, wǒ chuān duǎn xiù hé qúnzi. Xiàtiān wǒmen qù hǎibiān wán, chī bīngqílín. Wǎnshang kāi kōngtiáo shuìjiào.
ex_zh: In summer the weather is very hot; I wear short sleeves and skirts. In summer we go to the seaside to play and eat ice cream. At night we turn on the air conditioner to sleep.

quote_en: 现在八点。 Xiànzài bā diǎn.
ex_en: 我现在在家，等一会儿去学校。现在没时间看电视，因为我还要做功课。现在天气很好，我们出去走走吧。 Wǒ xiànzài zài jiā, děng yīhuir qù xuéxiào. Xiànzài méi shíjiān kàn diànshì, yīnwèi wǒ hái yào zuò gōngkè. Xiànzài tiānqì hěn hǎo, wǒmen chūqù zǒuzou ba.
ex_zh: I am at home now; I'll go to school in a bit. Now I don't have time to watch TV because I still need to do homework. The weather is nice now; let's go out for a walk.

quote_en: 这只猫很小。 Zhè zhī māo hěn xiǎo.
ex_en: 弟弟还小，他五岁。我住在一个小城市，不大。小狗很可爱，我喜欢小的动物。 Dìdi hái xiǎo, tā wǔ suì. Wǒ zhù zài yī ge xiǎo chéngshì, bù dà. Xiǎo gǒu hěn kě'ài, wǒ xǐhuan xiǎo de dòngwù.
ex_zh: My younger brother is still small; he is five. I live in a small city, not big. Little dogs are very cute; I like small animals.

quote_en: 我等了一个小时。 Wǒ děng le yī ge xiǎoshí.
ex_en: 从我家到学校走路要半小时，骑车要十分钟。每天我睡八个小时。电影两个小时，很长。 Cóng wǒ jiā dào xuéxiào zǒulù yào bàn xiǎoshí, qí chē yào shí fēn zhōng. Měitiān wǒ shuì bā ge xiǎoshí. Diànyǐng liǎng ge xiǎoshí, hěn cháng.
ex_zh: Walking from my home to school takes half an hour; riding a bike takes ten minutes. Every day I sleep eight hours. The movie is two hours long.

quote_en: 我在小学上学。 Wǒ zài xiǎoxué shàngxué.
ex_en: 小学有六个年级，我从一年级开始。小学老师对我很好。明年我上中学，不去小学了。 Xiǎoxué yǒu liù ge niánjí, wǒ cóng yī niánjí kāishǐ. Xiǎoxué lǎoshī duì wǒ hěn hǎo. Míngnián wǒ shàng zhōngxué, bù qù xiǎoxué le.
ex_zh: Primary school has six grades. I started from first grade. Primary school teachers are very good to me. Next year I will go to secondary school; I won't go to primary school anymore.

quote_en: 我每天坐校车上学。 Wǒ měitiān zuò xiàochē shàngxué.
quote_zh: I take the school bus to school every day.
ex_en: 校车是黄色的，早上七点在家门口接我。校车上有很多同学，大家一起说话。放学后校车送我们回家。 Xiàochē shì huáng sè de, zǎoshang qī diǎn zài jiā ménkǒu jiē wǒ. Xiàochē shang yǒu hěn duō tóngxué, dàjiā yìqǐ shuōhuà. Fàngxué hòu xiàochē sòng wǒmen huíjiā.
ex_zh: The school bus is yellow. At seven in the morning it picks me up at my door. There are many classmates on the school bus; everyone talks together. After school the school bus takes us home.

quote_en: 我们每天要穿校服。 Wǒmen měitiān yào chuān xiàofú.
quote_zh: We have to wear school uniforms every day.
ex_en: 校服是白色的上衣和黑色的裤子，女生穿裙子。星期一要穿校服，不穿校服不能进学校。我的校服很干净。 Xiàofú shì bái sè de shàngyī hé hēi sè de kùzi, nǚshēng chuān qúnzi. Xīngqīyī yào chuān xiàofú, bù chuān xiàofú bù néng jìn xuéxiào. Wǒ de xiàofú hěn gānjìng.
ex_zh: The school uniform is a white top and black trousers; girls wear skirts. On Monday we must wear the school uniform; without it you can't enter the school. My school uniform is very clean.

quote_en: 我在写汉字。 Wǒ zài xiě Hànzì.
ex_en: 每天我写十个汉字，复习五个。老师让我们写一篇作文。弟弟还不会写自己的名字。 Měitiān wǒ xiě shí ge Hànzì, fùxí wǔ ge. Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen xiě yī piān zuòwén. Dìdi hái bù huì xiě zìjǐ de míngzi.
ex_zh: Every day I write ten Chinese characters and review five. The teacher asks us to write an essay. My younger brother still can't write his own name.

quote_en: 谢谢你的帮助。 Xièxie nǐ de bāngzhù.
ex_en: 妈妈给我买了礼物，我说谢谢。朋友帮我做功课，我谢谢他。老师说谢谢大家认真听课。 Māma gěi wǒ mǎi le lǐwù, wǒ shuō xièxie. Péngyou bāng wǒ zuò gōngkè, wǒ xièxie tā. Lǎoshī shuō xièxie dàjiā rènzhēn tīng kè.
ex_zh: Mum bought me a gift, and I said thank you. My friend helped me with homework, and I thanked him. The teacher said thank you to everyone for listening carefully.

quote_en: 我有一本新书。 Wǒ yǒu yī běn xīn shū.
ex_en: 妈妈给我买了一件新衣服，是红色的。新学期开始了，我们有了新老师。弟弟的新玩具很好玩。 Māma gěi wǒ mǎi le yī jiàn xīn yīfu, shì hóng sè de. Xīn xuéqī kāishǐ le, wǒmen yǒu le xīn lǎoshī. Dìdi de xīn wánjù hěn hǎo wán.
ex_zh: Mum bought me a new piece of clothing; it's red. The new semester has started, and we have a new teacher. My younger brother's new toy is very fun.

quote_en: 新年到了！ Xīnnián dào le!
ex_en: 新年的时候我们全家一起吃饭，爸爸发红包。新年要穿新衣服。大家说“新年快乐”。新年可以放假。 Xīnnián de shíhou wǒmen quánjiā yìqǐ chī fàn, bàba fā hóngbāo. Xīnnián yào chuān xīn yīfu. Dàjiā shuō “Xīnnián kuàilè”. Xīnnián kěyǐ fàngjià.
ex_zh: During New Year our whole family eats together, and Dad gives red envelopes. For New Year we wear new clothes. Everyone says "Happy New Year." We get a holiday for New Year.

quote_en: 我住在新西兰。 Wǒ zhù zài Xīn Xīlán.
ex_en: 新西兰是一个美丽的国家，有北岛和南岛。新西兰有毛利人和中国人。我在新西兰上学，学中文和英文。 Xīn Xīlán shì yī ge měilì de guójiā, yǒu Běi Dǎo hé Nán Dǎo. Xīn Xīlán yǒu Máo lì rén hé Zhōngguó rén. Wǒ zài Xīn Xīlán shàngxué, xué Zhōngwén hé Yīngwén.
ex_zh: New Zealand is a beautiful country with the North Island and the South Island. New Zealand has Māori people and Chinese people. I go to school in New Zealand, learning Chinese and English.

quote_en: 一个星期有七天。 Yī ge xīngqī yǒu qī tiān.
ex_en: 星期一我去上学，星期二到星期五也去，星期六和星期日在家休息。这个星期我很忙。 Xīngqīyī wǒ qù shàngxué, xīngqī'èr dào xīngqīwǔ yě qù, xīngqīliù hé xīngqīrì zài jiā xiūxi. Zhè ge xīngqī wǒ hěn máng.
ex_zh: On Monday I go to school, Tuesday through Friday as well; on Saturday and Sunday I rest at home. This week I am very busy.

quote_en: 今天星期几？ Jīntiān xīngqī jǐ?
quote_zh: What day of the week is it today?
ex_en: 明天星期几？明天星期三。你星期几有空？我星期日有空。老师问星期几考试？星期五。 Jīntiān xīngqī jǐ? Jīntiān xīngqī'èr. Míngtiān xīngqī jǐ? Míngtiān xīngqīsān. Nǐ xīngqī jǐ yǒu kòng? Wǒ xīngqīrì yǒu kòng. Lǎoshī wèn xīngqī jǐ kǎoshì? Xīngqīwǔ.
ex_zh: What day is it today? Today is Tuesday. What day is tomorrow? Tomorrow is Wednesday. What day are you free? I am free on Sunday. The teacher asks what day the exam is? Friday.

def_zh: 星期日休息；星期天去公园
quote_en: 星期日我不上学。 Xīngqīrì wǒ bù shàngxué.
quote_zh: I don't go to school on Sunday.
ex_en: 星期天我和家人去公园玩。星期日早上我多睡一会儿。星期天晚上我们看电影。 Xīngqītiān wǒ hé jiā rén qù gōngyuán wán. Xīngqīrì zǎoshang wǒ duō shuì yīhuir. Xīngqītiān wǎnshang wǒmen kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: On Sunday I go to the park with my family. On Sunday morning I sleep a bit longer. On Sunday evening we watch a movie.

def_en: family name, surname, to be surnamed
quote_en: 我姓李。 Wǒ xìng Lǐ.
ex_en: 你姓什么？我姓王。老师姓张。我同学姓李，叫李小明。中国人先姓后名。 Nǐ xìng shénme? Wǒ xìng Wáng. Lǎoshī xìng Zhāng. Wǒ tóngxué xìng Lǐ, jiào Lǐ Xiǎo Míng. Zhōngguó rén xiān xìng hòu míng.
ex_zh: What is your surname? My surname is Wang. The teacher's surname is Zhang. My classmate's surname is Li; his name is Li Xiaoming. Chinese people put the surname first, then the given name.

def_en: to rest, to take a break
quote_en: 我累了，要休息。 Wǒ lèi le, yào xiūxi.
quote_zh: I'm tired; I need to rest.
ex_en: 下课以后我们休息十分钟。星期六我在家休息，不去学校。妈妈让我休息一下再写作业。 Xiàkè yǐhòu wǒmen xiūxi shí fēn zhōng. Xīngqīliù wǒ zài jiā xiūxi, bù qù xuéxiào. Māma ràng wǒ xiūxi yīxià zài xiě zuòyè.
ex_zh: After class we rest for ten minutes. On Saturday I rest at home and don't go to school. Mum told me to rest a bit before doing homework.

quote_en: 我是学生。 Wǒ shì xuésheng.
ex_en: 学校里有小学生和老师。学生要好好学习，听老师的话。我们班有二十个学生。 Xuéxiào li yǒu xiǎoxué shēng hé lǎoshī. Xuésheng yào hǎohǎo xuéxí, tīng lǎoshī de huà. Wǒmen bān yǒu èrshí ge xuésheng.
ex_zh: The school has students and teachers. Students need to study hard and listen to the teacher. Our class has twenty students.

quote_en: 我喜欢学习。 Wǒ xǐhuan xuéxí.
ex_en: 每天我在学校学习中文、数学和科学。学习要努力，才能进步。晚上我在家学习一个小时。 Měitiān wǒ zài xuéxiào xuéxí Zhōngwén, shùxué hé kēxué. Xuéxí yào nǔlì, cáinéng jìnbù. Wǎnshang wǒ zài jiā xuéxí yī ge xiǎoshí.
ex_zh: Every day at school I study Chinese, maths, and science. Studying requires effort to make progress. In the evening I study at home for one hour.

quote_en: 学校很漂亮。 Xuéxiào hěn piàoliang.
ex_en: 我的学校在东边，走路十五分钟。学校里有教室、图书馆、体育馆和运动场。我很喜欢我的学校。 Wǒ de xuéxiào zài dōng bian, zǒulù shíwǔ fēn zhōng. Xuéxiào li yǒu jiàoshì, túshūguǎn, tǐyùguǎn hé yùndòngchǎng. Wǒ hěn xǐhuan wǒ de xuéxiào.
ex_zh: My school is to the east, a fifteen-minute walk. The school has classrooms, a library, a gym, and a sports field. I really like my school.

quote_en: 草地上有羊。 Cǎodì shang yǒu yáng.
quote_zh: There are sheep on the grass.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多羊，羊吃草，给我们羊毛和羊肉。爷爷家养了五只羊，白色的很可爱。 Xīn Xīlán yǒu hěn duō yáng, yáng chī cǎo, gěi wǒmen yáng máo hé yáng ròu. Yéye jiā yǎng le wǔ zhī yáng, bái sè de hěn kě'ài.
ex_zh: New Zealand has many sheep. Sheep eat grass and give us wool and mutton. Grandfather's family raises five sheep; they are white and very cute.

quote_en: 爷爷在看电视。 Yéye zài kàn diànshì.
ex_en: 爷爷今年七十岁，他每天早上去公园走路。爷爷会写毛笔字，教过我写汉字。我很爱爷爷。 Yéye jīnnián qīshí suì, tā měitiān zǎoshang qù gōngyuán zǒulù. Yéye huì xiě máo bǐ zì, jiāo guò wǒ xiě Hànzì. Wǒ hěn ài yéye.
ex_zh: Grandfather is seventy years old this year. He goes to the park for a walk every morning. Grandfather can write brush pen characters and taught me to write Chinese characters. I love my grandfather very much.

quote_en: 我有一个哥哥。 Wǒ yǒu yī ge gēge.
ex_en: 一天有二十四小时。一加一等于二。我星期一去上学，星期二也去。一本书，一支笔，一个人。 Yī tiān yǒu èrshí sì xiǎoshí. Yī jiā yī děngyú èr. Wǒ xīngqīyī qù shàngxué, xīngqī'èr yě qù. Yī běn shū, yī zhī bǐ, yī ge rén.
ex_zh: One day has twenty-four hours. One plus one equals two. I go to school on Monday, and also on Tuesday. One book, one pen, one person.

quote_en: 我吃了一半苹果。 Wǒ chī le yí bàn píngguǒ.
quote_zh: I ate half of the apple.
ex_en: 妈妈把一个蛋糕切成两半，我吃了一半，妹妹吃了一半。作业做了一半，还有一半没做。一半学生考了九十分。 Māma bǎ yī ge dàngāo qiē chéng liǎng bàn, wǒ chī le yí bàn, mèimei chī le yí bàn. Zuòyè zuò le yí bàn, hái yǒu yí bàn méi zuò. Yí bàn xuésheng kǎo le jiǔshí fēn.
ex_zh: Mum cut a cake into two halves. I ate half, and my younger sister ate half. I did half of my homework; the other half is not done. Half of the students scored ninety points.

quote_en: 一共花了二十块钱。 Yí gòng huā le èrshí kuài qián.
ex_en: 我们家一共五口人。书包里一共有一本书、两支笔和三个本子。今天一共上了四节课。 Wǒmen jiā yí gòng wǔ kǒu rén. Shūbāo li yí gòng yǒu yī běn shū, liǎng zhī bǐ hé sān ge běnzi. Jīntiān yí gòng shàng le sì jié kè.
ex_zh: Our family has five people in total. Inside my schoolbag there is altogether one book, two pens, and three notebooks. Today I had four lessons in total.

quote_en: 我们一样高。 Wǒmen yí yàng gāo.
ex_en: 这两本书一样大，颜色也一样。我和弟弟的校服不一样，他穿裤子，我穿裙子。妈妈和爸爸的爱好不一样。 Zhè liǎng běn shū yí yàng dà, yánsè yě yí yàng. Wǒ hé dìdi de xiàofú bù yí yàng, tā chuān kùzi, wǒ chuān qúnzi. Māma hé bàba de àihào bù yí yàng.
ex_zh: These two books are the same size and the same colour. My school uniform and my younger brother's are not the same; he wears trousers, I wear a skirt. Mum's hobbies and Dad's hobbies are not the same.

quote_en: 我有一点儿饿。 Wǒ yǒu yì diǎn er è.
quote_zh: I am a little bit hungry.
ex_en: 请说慢一点儿，我听不懂。今天比昨天冷一点儿。我想吃一点儿水果，只要一个苹果就行。 Qǐng shuō màn yì diǎn er, wǒ tīng bù dǒng. Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān lěng yì diǎn er. Wǒ xiǎng chī yì diǎn er shuǐguǒ, zhǐ yào yī ge píngguǒ jiù xíng.
ex_zh: Please speak a little bit slower; I don't understand. Today is a little bit colder than yesterday. I want to eat a little bit of fruit; just one apple is fine.

quote_en: 我们一起吃饭吧。 Wǒmen yìqǐ chī fàn ba.
ex_en: 星期天我和朋友一起去看电影。全家一起过年，吃饺子。一起做功课，一起打球。 Xīngqītiān wǒ hé péngyou yìqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng. Quánjiā yìqǐ guò nián, chī jiǎo zi. Yìqǐ zuò gōngkè, yìqǐ dǎ qiú.
ex_zh: On Sunday my friend and I go to watch a movie together. The whole family celebrates the New Year together and eats dumplings. We do homework together and play ball games together.

quote_en: 我有一些苹果。 Wǒ yǒu yì xiē píngguǒ.
ex_en: 书包里有一些本子和笔。教室里有一些学生在看书。妈妈买了一些水果，有苹果和香蕉。 Shūbāo li yǒu yì xiē běnzi hé bǐ. Jiàoshì li yǒu yì xiē xuésheng zài kàn shū. Māma mǎi le yì xiē shuǐguǒ, yǒu píngguǒ hé xiāngjiāo.
ex_zh: There are some notebooks and pens in the schoolbag. There are some students reading books in the classroom. Mum bought some fruit, including apples and bananas.

quote_en: 我的衣服很干净。 Wǒ de yīfu hěn gānjìng.
ex_en: 妈妈每天洗衣服，然后晒在阳台上。冬天要穿厚衣服，夏天穿短衣服。妹妹喜欢红色的衣服。 Māma měitiān xǐ yīfu, ránhòu shài zài yángtái shang. Dōngtiān yào chuān hòu yīfu, xiàtiān chuān duǎn yīfu. Mèimei xǐhuan hóng sè de yīfu.
ex_zh: Mum washes clothes every day, then hangs them on the balcony. In winter you need to wear thick clothes; in summer wear short clothes. My younger sister likes red clothes.

quote_en: 我妈妈是医生。 Wǒ māma shì yīshēng.
ex_en: 我生病了，妈妈带我去看医生。医生给我开了药，让我多喝水。医生在医院工作，很辛苦。 Wǒ shēngbìng le, māma dài wǒ qù kàn yīshēng. Yīshēng gěi wǒ kāi le yào, ràng wǒ duō hē shuǐ. Yīshēng zài yīyuàn gōngzuò, hěn xīnkǔ.
ex_zh: I got sick, and Mum took me to see a doctor. The doctor prescribed medicine for me and told me to drink more water. Doctors work in hospitals; they work very hard.

quote_en: 医院很大。 Yīyuàn hěn dà.
ex_en: 奶奶生病了，住在医院里。我和爸爸去医院看她，给她带了水果。医院里的医生和护士都很友好。 Nǎinai shēngbìng le, zhù zài yīyuàn li. Wǒ hé bàba qù yīyuàn kàn tā, gěi tā dài le shuǐguǒ. Yīyuàn li de yīshēng hé hùshì dōu hěn yǒuhǎo.
ex_zh: Grandmother is sick and staying in the hospital. Dad and I went to the hospital to visit her and brought her fruit. The doctors and nurses in the hospital are all very friendly.

quote_en: 他已经走了。 Tā yǐjīng zǒu le.
ex_en: 我已经做完功课了，现在可以看电视。弟弟已经五岁了，明年上小学。妈妈已经回家了，正在做饭。 Wǒ yǐjīng zuò wán gōngkè le, xiànzài kěyǐ kàn diànshì. Dìdi yǐjīng wǔ suì le, míngnián shàng xiǎoxué. Māma yǐjīng huíjiā le, zhèngzài zuò fàn.
ex_zh: I have already finished my homework, so now I can watch TV. My younger brother is already five years old; next year he will start primary school. Mum has already come home and is cooking.

quote_en: 这句话什么意思？ Zhè jù huà shénme yìsi?
ex_en: 老师说这个汉字的意思。这本书很有意思，我看了两遍。“对不起”的意思是你做错了。 Lǎoshī shuō zhè ge Hànzì de yìsi. Zhè běn shū hěn yǒu yìsi, wǒ kàn le liǎng biàn. “Duìbuqǐ” de yìsi shì nǐ zuò cuò le.
ex_zh: The teacher explained the meaning of this Chinese character. This book is very interesting; I read it twice. The meaning of "sorry" is that you did something wrong.

quote_en: 我喜欢听音乐。 Wǒ xǐhuan tīng yīnyuè.
ex_en: 音乐课我们唱歌、学乐谱。妹妹学钢琴，每天弹一小时。睡觉前我听安静的音乐。 Yīnyuè kè wǒmen chàng gē, xué yuèpǔ. Mèimei xué gāngqín, měitiān tán yī xiǎoshí. Shuìjiào qián wǒ tīng ānjìng de yīnyuè.
ex_zh: In music class we sing and learn musical scores. My younger sister is learning piano; she plays for one hour every day. Before sleeping, I listen to quiet music.

quote_en: 你应该早点睡觉。 Nǐ yīnggāi zǎo diǎn shuìjiào.
quote_zh: You should go to sleep earlier.
ex_en: 学生应该好好学习，听老师的话。我们应该帮助家人做事情。你不应该吃太多糖，对牙齿不好。 Xuésheng yīnggāi hǎohǎo xuéxí, tīng lǎoshī de huà. Wǒmen yīnggāi bāngzhù jiā rén zuò shìqing. Nǐ bù yīnggāi chī tài duō táng, duì yáchǐ bù hǎo.
