ex_zh: Students should study hard and listen to the teacher. We should help family members with things. You shouldn't eat too much candy; it's bad for your teeth.

quote_en: 英国在欧洲。 Yīngguó zài Ōuzhōu.
quote_zh: The United Kingdom is in Europe.
ex_en: 我叔叔在英国工作，他说英国常常下雨。英国有伦敦桥和大本钟。英国人说英语。 Wǒ shūshu zài Yīngguó gōngzuò, tā shuō Yīngguó chángcháng xià yǔ. Yīngguó yǒu Lúndūn Qiáo hé Dà Běn Zhōng. Yīngguó rén shuō Yīngyǔ.
ex_zh: My uncle works in the United Kingdom. He says it often rains in the UK. The UK has London Bridge and Big Ben. People in the UK speak English.

quote_en: 我会写英文。 Wǒ huì xiě Yīngwén.
ex_en: 老师让我们写一篇英文作文。英文有二十六个字母。我看英文书，学新单词。 Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen xiě yī piān Yīngwén zuòwén. Yīngwén yǒu èrshí liù ge zìmǔ. Wǒ kàn Yīngwén shū, xué xīn dāncí.
ex_zh: The teacher asked us to write an English essay. English has twenty-six letters. I read English books to learn new words.

quote_en: 我会说英语。 Wǒ huì shuō Yīngyǔ.
ex_en: 爸爸每天和外国人说英语。英语很重要，很多国家都说。我在学校学英语，会说“Hello”和“Thank you”。 Bàba měitiān hé wài guó rén shuō Yīngyǔ. Yīngyǔ hěn zhòngyào, hěn duō guójiā dōu shuō. Wǒ zài xuéxiào xué Yīngyǔ, huì shuō “Hello” hé “Thank you”.
ex_zh: Dad speaks English with foreigners every day. English is very important; many countries speak it. I study English at school and can say "Hello" and "Thank you."

quote_en: 我用笔写字。 Wǒ yòng bǐ xiě zì.
quote_zh: I use a pen to write.
ex_en: 上课用电脑学习，用手机不好。爸爸用筷子吃饭。妈妈用洗衣机洗衣服。我们用中文和老师说话。 Shàngkè yòng diànnǎo xuéxí, yòng shǒujī bù hǎo. Bàba yòng kuàizi chī fàn. Māma yòng xǐyījī xǐ yīfu. Wǒmen yòng Zhōngwén hé lǎoshī shuōhuà.
ex_zh: In class we use computers to study; using mobile phones is not good. Dad uses chopsticks to eat. Mum uses a washing machine to wash clothes. We use Chinese to speak with the teacher.

quote_en: 她对我很友好。 Tā duì wǒ hěn yǒuhǎo.
quote_zh: She is very friendly to me.
ex_en: 我的同学都很友好，大家互相帮助。老师也很友好，常常问我们身体好不好。 Xīn Xīlán rén hěn yǒuhǎo. Wǒ de tóngxué dōu hěn yǒuhǎo, dàjiā hùxiāng bāngzhù. Lǎoshī yě hěn yǒuhǎo, chángcháng wèn wǒmen shēntǐ hǎo bù hǎo.
ex_zh: My classmates are all very friendly; everyone helps each other. The teacher is also very friendly and often asks us if we are well. New Zealand people are very friendly.

quote_en: 有的人喜欢苹果。 Yǒu de rén xǐhuan píngguǒ.
ex_en: 有的学生喜欢数学，有的喜欢中文。有的地方下雨，有的地方出太阳。书里有的字我不认识。 Yǒu de xuésheng xǐhuan shùxué, yǒu de xǐhuan Zhōngwén. Yǒu de dìfang xià yǔ, yǒu de dìfang chū tàiyáng. Shū li yǒu de zì wǒ bù rènshi.
ex_zh: Some students like maths, some like Chinese. In some places it rains; in other places the sun comes out. I don't recognize some characters in the book.

quote_en: 北京烤鸭很有名。 Běijīng kǎo yā hěn yǒumíng.
quote_zh: Beijing roast duck is very famous.
ex_en: 新西兰的南岛很有名，很多人去那里玩。长城是很有名的地方。我爷爷是有名的医生。 Xīn Xīlán de Nán Dǎo hěn yǒumíng, hěn duō rén qù nàlǐ wán. Chángchéng shì hěn yǒumíng de dìfang. Wǒ yéye shì yǒumíng de yīshēng.
ex_zh: New Zealand's South Island is very famous; many people go there to play. The Great Wall is a very famous place. My grandfather is a famous doctor.

quote_en: 有时候我去公园。 Yǒu shíhou wǒ qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: Sometimes I go to the park.
ex_en: 有时候天气很热，有时候很冷。我有时候在家看书，有时候和朋友打球。妈妈有时候开车上班，有时候走路。 Yǒu shíhou tiānqì hěn rè, yǒu shíhou hěn lěng. Wǒ yǒu shíhou zài jiā kàn shū, yǒu shíhou hé péngyou dǎ qiú. Māma yǒu shíhou kāi chē shàngbān, yǒu shíhou zǒulù.
ex_zh: Sometimes the weather is very hot, sometimes very cold. Sometimes I read at home, sometimes I play ball games with friends. Sometimes Mum drives to work, sometimes she walks.

quote_en: 这本书很有意思。 Zhè běn shū hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_en: 学中文很有意思，可以认识汉字。看电影很有意思，我喜欢看中文电影。踢足球也很有意思。 Xué Zhōngwén hěn yǒu yìsi, kěyǐ rènshi Hànzì. Kàn diànyǐng hěn yǒu yìsi, wǒ xǐhuan kàn Zhōngwén diànyǐng. Tī zúqiú yě hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Studying Chinese is very interesting; you can learn Chinese characters. Watching movies is very interesting; I like watching Chinese movies. Playing soccer is also very interesting.

quote_en: 这本书很有用。 Zhè běn shū hěn yǒuyòng.
ex_en: 学中文很有用，可以去中国玩。手机很有用，可以打电话、发信息。妈妈说的话很有用。 Xué Zhōngwén hěn yǒuyòng, kěyǐ qù Zhōngguó wán. Shǒujī hěn yǒuyòng, kěyǐ dǎ diànhuà, fā xìnxī. Māma shuō de huà hěn yǒuyòng.
ex_zh: Learning Chinese is very useful; you can go to China to play. Mobile phones are very useful; you can make calls and send messages. The words Mum says are very useful.

quote_en: 我喜欢玩游戏。 Wǒ xǐhuan wán yóuxì.
ex_en: 弟弟每天玩电脑游戏，妈妈说不要玩太多。手机上有一些游戏，很好玩。星期天我和朋友玩球类游戏。 Dìdi měitiān wán diànnǎo yóuxì, māma shuō bùyào wán tài duō. Shǒujī shang yǒu yì xiē yóuxì, hěn hǎo wán. Xīngqītiān wǒ hé péngyou wán qiú lèi yóuxì.
ex_zh: My younger brother plays computer games every day. Mum says not to play too much. There are some games on mobile phones that are very fun. On Sunday I play ball games with my friends.

quote_en: 我喜欢游泳。 Wǒ xǐhuan yóuyǒng.
ex_en: 夏天我去海边游泳，水很凉。弟弟不会游泳，他在浅水区玩水。爸爸游得很快。 Xiàtiān wǒ qù hǎibiān yóuyǒng, shuǐ hěn liáng. Dìdi bù huì yóuyǒng, tā zài qiǎn shuǐ qū wán shuǐ. Bàba yóu de hěn kuài.
ex_zh: In summer I go swimming at the seaside; the water is cool. My younger brother can't swim; he plays in the shallow water. Dad swims very fast.

quote_en: 学校在我家右边。 Xuéxiào zài wǒ jiā yòu bian.
quote_zh: The school is on my right side.
ex_en: 往右边走是商店，往左边走是公园。我的座位在教室的右边。右手写字，左手拿本子。 Wǎng yòu bian zǒu shì shāngdiàn, wǎng zuǒ bian zǒu shì gōngyuán. Wǒ de zuòwèi zài jiàoshì de yòu bian. Yòu shǒu xiě zì, zuǒ shǒu ná běnzi.
ex_zh: Going to the right leads to the shop; going to the left leads to the park. My seat is on the right side of the classroom. The right hand writes; the left hand holds the notebook.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃鱼。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī yú.
ex_en: 河里有鱼，有大的也有小的。猫喜欢吃鱼。妈妈今天做了鱼，很好吃。弟弟不爱吃鱼，他只吃肉。 Hé li yǒu yú, yǒu dà de yě yǒu xiǎo de. Māo xǐhuan chī yú. Māma jīntiān zuò le yú, hěn hǎo chī. Dìdi bù ài chī yú, tā zhǐ chī ròu.
ex_zh: There are fish in the river, both big and small. Cats like to eat fish. Mum made fish today; it was very delicious. My younger brother doesn't like eating fish; he only eats meat.

quote_en: 学校离我家很远。 Xuéxiào lí wǒ jiā hěn yuǎn.
quote_zh: The school is very far from my home.
ex_en: 北京离新西兰很远，要坐十多个小时飞机。从我家到车站不远，走路五分钟。远的地方要坐车去。 Běijīng lí Xīn Xīlán hěn yuǎn, yào zuò shí duō ge xiǎoshí fēijī. Cóng wǒ jiā dào chēzhàn bù yuǎn, zǒulù wǔ fēn zhōng. Yuǎn de dìfang yào zuò chē qù.
ex_zh: Beijing is very far from New Zealand; it takes more than ten hours by plane. From my home to the bus stop is not far, a five-minute walk. For far places, you need to take a vehicle.

quote_en: 一个月有三十天。 Yī ge yuè yǒu sānshí tiān.
ex_en: 一月是一年的开始。我二月过生日。十二月是冬天。一个月有四个星期。 Yī yuè shì yī nián de kāishǐ. Wǒ èr yuè guò shēngrì. Shí'èr yuè shì dōngtiān. Yī ge yuè yǒu sì ge xīngqī.
ex_zh: January is the start of the year. My birthday is in February. December is winter. One month has four weeks.

quote_en: 我喜欢运动。 Wǒ xǐhuan yùndòng.
ex_en: 每天运动对身体好。我早上跑步，下午打球。运动让我很开心。爸爸周末去运动场踢足球。 Měitiān yùndòng duì shēntǐ hǎo. Wǒ zǎoshang pǎobù, xiàwǔ dǎ qiú. Yùndòng ràng wǒ hěn kāixīn. Bàba zhōumò qù yùndòngchǎng tī zúqiú.
ex_zh: Exercising every day is good for the body. I run in the morning and play ball games in the afternoon. Sports make me very happy. Dad goes to the sports field to play soccer on weekends.

quote_en: 运动场很大。 Yùndòngchǎng hěn dà.
quote_zh: The sports field is very big.
ex_en: 我们学校的运动场在东边，可以踢足球、跑步。星期天运动场有很多人。体育课在运动场上。 Wǒmen xuéxiào de yùndòngchǎng zài dōng bian, kěyǐ tī zúqiú, pǎobù. Xīngqītiān yùndòngchǎng yǒu hěn duō rén. Tǐyù kè zài yùndòngchǎng shang.
ex_zh: Our school's sports field is to the east; you can play soccer and run. On Sunday there are many people on the sports field. PE class is on the sports field.

quote_en: 再见，明天见。 Zàijiàn, míngtiān jiàn.
ex_en: 放学了，我对老师说“再见”。朋友要走，我说“再见”。晚上睡觉前跟家人说“再见”？不说，说“晚安”。 Fàngxué le, wǒ duì lǎoshī shuō “zàijiàn”. Péngyou yào zǒu, wǒ shuō “zàijiàn”. Wǎnshang shuìjiào qián gēn jiā rén shuō “zàijiàn”? Bù shuō, shuō “wǎn'ān”.
ex_zh: After school, I say "goodbye" to the teacher. When my friend is leaving, I say "goodbye." Before sleeping at night, do you say "goodbye" to family? No, you say "good night."

quote_en: 我七点吃早饭。 Wǒ qī diǎn chī zǎofàn.
ex_en: 每天早上妈妈给我做早饭，有面包、牛奶和鸡蛋。不吃早饭会饿，对身体不好。早饭很重要。 Měitiān zǎoshang māma gěi wǒ zuò zǎofàn, yǒu miànbāo, niúnǎi hé jīdàn. Bù chī zǎofàn huì è, duì shēntǐ bù hǎo. Zǎofàn hěn zhòngyào.
ex_zh: Every morning Mum makes me breakfast: bread, milk, and eggs. Not eating breakfast makes you hungry and is bad for your body. Breakfast is very important.

quote_en: 早上我六点起床。 Zǎoshang wǒ liù diǎn qǐchuáng.
quote_zh: I get up at six in the morning.
ex_en: 每天早上我去公园跑步。早上天气很凉快。早上吃早饭，然后去学校。星期天早上我多睡一会儿。 Měitiān zǎoshang wǒ qù gōngyuán pǎobù. Zǎoshang tiānqì hěn liángkuai. Zǎoshang chī zǎofàn, ránhòu qù xuéxiào. Xīngqītiān zǎoshang wǒ duō shuì yīhuir.
ex_zh: Every morning I go to the park to run. In the morning the weather is very cool. In the morning I eat breakfast, then go to school. On Sunday morning I sleep a little longer.

quote_en: 这个字怎么写？ Zhè ge zì zěnme xiě?
quote_zh: How do you write this character?
ex_en: 请问去火车站怎么走？往东边走。这道题怎么做？我不会。你怎么了？我有点累。 Qǐng wèn qù huǒchēzhàn zěnme zǒu? Wǎng dōng bian zǒu. Zhè dào tí zěnme zuò? Wǒ bù huì. Nǐ zěnme le? Wǒ yǒu diǎn lèi.
ex_zh: Excuse me, how do I get to the train station? Go east. How do you do this question? I don't know. What's wrong with you? I'm a little tired.

quote_en: 你最近怎么样？ Nǐ zuìjìn zěnme yàng?
ex_en: 今天天气怎么样？很好，不冷不热。这部电影怎么样？很有意思。我们星期天去公园怎么样？好主意。 Jīntiān tiānqì zěnme yàng? Hěn hǎo, bù lěng bù rè. Zhè bù diànyǐng zěnme yàng? Hěn yǒu yìsi. Wǒmen xīngqītiān qù gōngyuán zěnme yàng? Hǎo zhǔyi.
ex_zh: How is the weather today? Very good, neither cold nor hot. How is this movie? Very interesting. How about we go to the park on Sunday? Good idea.

quote_en: 这是我的书。 Zhè shì wǒ de shū.
ex_en: 这所学校很大，这里有很多学生。这朵花是红色的，很好看。这是我妈妈，她是个医生。 Zhè suǒ xuéxiào hěn dà, zhèlǐ yǒu hěn duō xuésheng. Zhè duǒ huā shì hóng sè de, hěn hǎo kàn. Zhè shì wǒ māma, tā shì ge yīshēng.
ex_zh: This school is very big; there are many students here. This flower is red and very pretty. This is my mum; she is a doctor.

quote_en: 这个是我的书。 Zhè ge shì wǒ de shū.
ex_en: 这个苹果很大，那个苹果很小。我要这个，不要那个。这个字怎么写？老师教过我。 Zhè ge píngguǒ hěn dà, nà ge píngguǒ hěn xiǎo. Wǒ yào zhè ge, bù yào nà ge. Zhè ge zì zěnme xiě? Lǎoshī jiāo guò wǒ.
ex_zh: This apple is big; that apple is small. I want this one, not that one. How do you write this character? The teacher taught me.

def_zh: 这个星期忙；这个星期天
quote_en: 这个星期我很忙。 Zhè ge xīngqī wǒ hěn máng.
quote_zh: I am very busy this week.
ex_en: 这个星期有考试，我要好好复习。这个星期天气很好，不冷也不热。这个星期天我和朋友去看电影。 Zhè ge xīngqī yǒu kǎoshì, wǒ yào hǎohǎo fùxí. Zhè ge xīngqī tiānqì hěn hǎo, bù lěng yě bù rè. Zhè ge xīngqītiān wǒ hé péngyou qù kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: There is an exam this week; I need to review well. The weather is very good this week, neither cold nor hot. This Sunday I will go to the movies with my friend.

quote_en: 这个月我过生日。 Zhè ge yuè wǒ guò shēngrì.
ex_en: 这个月我们要考试，还要开家长会。这个月天气开始变冷了。这个月我读了两本书。 Zhè ge yuè wǒmen yào kǎoshì, hái yào kāi jiāzhǎng huì. Zhè ge yuè tiānqì kāishǐ biàn lěng le. Zhè ge yuè wǒ dú le liǎng běn shū.
ex_zh: This month we have exams and also a parent-teacher meeting. The weather is starting to get cold this month. This month I read two books.

quote_en: 我住在这里。 Wǒ zhù zài zhèlǐ.
ex_en: 这里有很多人，很热闹。请来这里坐，这里有位子。这里是我家，欢迎来玩。 Zhèlǐ yǒu hěn duō rén, hěn rènao. Qǐng lái zhèlǐ zuò, zhèlǐ yǒu wèizi. Zhèlǐ shì wǒ jiā, huānyíng lái wán.
ex_zh: There are many people here; it's very lively. Please come here to sit; there's a seat here. This is my home; welcome to visit.

quote_en: 这些是我的朋友。 Zhè xiē shì wǒ de péngyou.
ex_en: 这些苹果很好吃，你要不要吃一个？这些字我都不认识，太难了。这些衣服是妈妈给我买的。 Zhè xiē píngguǒ hěn hǎo chī, nǐ yào bù yào chī yī ge? Zhè xiē zì wǒ dōu bù rènshi, tài nán le. Zhè xiē yīfu shì māma gěi wǒ mǎi de.
ex_zh: These apples are very delicious; do you want to eat one? I don't recognize any of these characters; they're too hard. These clothes were bought for me by Mum.

quote_en: 我家有一只猫。 Wǒ jiā yǒu yī zhī māo.
ex_en: 爷爷养了三只羊和两只狗。一只小鸟在树上唱歌。那只猫很可爱，白色的毛。 Yéye yǎng le sān zhī yáng hé liǎng zhī gǒu. Yī zhī xiǎo niǎo zài shù shang chàng gē. Nèi zhī māo hěn kě'ài, bái sè de máo.
ex_zh: Grandfather raises three sheep and two dogs. A little bird is singing in the tree. That cat is very cute, with white fur.

quote_en: 我知道答案。 Wǒ zhīdào dá'àn.
ex_en: 你知道火车站怎么走吗？我知道，往东边走。我不知道他叫什么名字。老师知道我们都很努力。 Nǐ zhīdào huǒchēzhàn zěnme zǒu ma? Wǒ zhīdào, wǎng dōng bian zǒu. Wǒ bù zhīdào tā jiào shénme míngzi. Lǎoshī zhīdào wǒmen dōu hěn nǔlì.
ex_zh: Do you know how to get to the train station? I know, go east. I don't know what his name is. The teacher knows that we all work very hard.

quote_en: 中国很大。 Zhōngguó hěn dà.
ex_en: 中国有很多大城市，比如北京和上海。中国人说中文，写汉字。我以后想去中国看长城。 Zhōngguó yǒu hěn duō dà chéngshì, bǐrú Běijīng hé Shànghǎi. Zhōngguó rén shuō Zhōngwén, xiě Hànzì. Wǒ yǐhòu xiǎng qù Zhōngguó kàn Chángchéng.
ex_zh: China has many big cities, such as Beijing and Shanghai. Chinese people speak Chinese and write Chinese characters. In the future I want to go to China to see the Great Wall.

quote_en: 我坐在中间。 Wǒ zuò zài zhōngjiān.
ex_en: 教室的中间有一张桌子。我和弟弟中间坐的是妈妈。公园中间有一个湖。 Zhōngjiān yǒu yī zhāng zhuōzi. Wǒ hé dìdi zhōngjiān zuò de shì māma. Gōngyuán zhōngjiān yǒu yī ge hú.
ex_zh: There is a desk in the middle of the classroom. Mum sits between me and my younger brother. There is a lake in the middle of the park.

quote_en: 中秋节要吃月饼。 Zhōngqiū Jié yào chī yuèbǐng.
quote_zh: During Mid-Autumn Festival, you eat mooncakes.
ex_en: 中秋节是中国的一个节日，在秋天。那天晚上月亮很圆。我们一家人吃饭、吃月饼、看月亮。 Zhōngqiū Jié shì Zhōngguó de yī ge jiérì, zài qiūtiān. Nèi tiān wǎnshang yuèliang hěn yuán. Wǒmen yī jiā rén chī fàn, chī yuèbǐng, kàn yuèliang.
ex_zh: Mid-Autumn Festival is a Chinese festival in autumn. That night the moon is very round. Our family eats dinner, eats mooncakes, and looks at the moon.

quote_en: 我会说中文。 Wǒ huì shuō Zhōngwén.
ex_en: 中文很难，但是很有意思。我在学校学中文，写汉字。爸爸也会说一点中文。 Zhōngwén hěn nán, dànshì hěn yǒu yìsi. Wǒ zài xuéxiào xué Zhōngwén, xiě Hànzì. Bàba yě huì shuō yī diǎn Zhōngwén.
ex_zh: Chinese is very hard but very interesting. I study Chinese at school and write Chinese characters. Dad can also speak a little Chinese.

quote_en: 中午我吃饭。 Zhōngwǔ wǒ chī fàn.
ex_en: 中午十二点放学，我去食堂吃午饭。中午很热，我不出去玩。中午妈妈在家休息。 Zhōngwǔ shí'èr diǎn fàngxué, wǒ qù shítáng chī wǔfàn. Zhōngwǔ hěn rè, wǒ bù chū qù wán. Zhōngwǔ māma zài jiā xiūxi.
ex_zh: At twelve noon school finishes; I go to the canteen to eat lunch. It's very hot at noon; I don't go out to play. At noon Mum rests at home.

quote_en: 市中心很热闹。 Shì zhōngxīn hěn rènao.
quote_zh: The city centre is very lively.
ex_en: 公园中心有一个大湖。购物中心有商店和饭馆。我们学校的中心是图书馆。 Gōngyuán zhōngxīn yǒu yī ge dà hú. Gòuwù zhōngxīn yǒu shāngdiàn hé fànguǎn. Wǒmen xuéxiào de zhōngxīn shì túshūguǎn.
ex_zh: There is a big lake in the centre of the park. The shopping centre has shops and restaurants. The centre of our school is the library.

quote_en: 明年我上中学。 Míngnián wǒ shàng zhōngxué.
quote_zh: Next year I will go to secondary school.
ex_en: 中学比小学大，有更多学生。中学要学更多科目。我姐姐在中学上学，她学习很努力。 Zhōngxué bǐ xiǎoxué dà, yǒu gèng duō xuésheng. Zhōngxué yào xué gèng duō kēmù. Wǒ jiějie zài zhōngxué shàngxué, tā xuéxí hěn nǔlì.
ex_zh: Secondary school is bigger than primary school and has more students. In secondary school you study more subjects. My older sister goes to secondary school; she studies very hard.

quote_en: 我哥哥是中学生。 Wǒ gēge shì zhōngxué shēng.
quote_zh: My older brother is a secondary school student.
ex_en: 中学生每天要上很多课，还要做很多功课。中学生比小学生大。我明年也要做中学生了。 Zhōngxué shēng měitiān yào shàng hěn duō kè, hái yào zuò hěn duō gōngkè. Zhōngxué shēng bǐ xiǎoxué shēng dà. Wǒ míngnián yě yào zuò zhōngxué shēng le.
ex_zh: Secondary school students have many classes every day and also a lot of homework. Secondary school students are bigger than primary school students. Next year I will also become a secondary school student.

quote_en: 学习很重要。 Xuéxí hěn zhòngyào.
ex_en: 身体健康很重要，所以要天天运动。朋友之间要互相帮助，这很重要。考试很重要，但是不要太紧张。 Shēntǐ jiànkāng hěn zhòngyào, suǒyǐ yào tiāntiān yùndòng. Péngyou zhī jiān yào hùxiāng bāngzhù, zhè hěn zhòngyào. Kǎoshì hěn zhòngyào, dànshì bùyào tài jǐnzhāng.
ex_zh: Body health is very important, so you need to exercise every day. Friends should help each other; this is very important. Exams are very important, but don't be too nervous.

quote_en: 周末我不上学。 Zhōumò wǒ bù shàngxué.
quote_zh: I don't go to school on weekends.
ex_en: 周末我和家人一起去公园玩。周末可以睡晚一点。周末我常常看书、打球、看电影。 Zhōumò wǒ hé jiā rén yìqǐ qù gōngyuán wán. Zhōumò kěyǐ shuì wǎn yī diǎn. Zhōumò wǒ chángcháng kàn shū, dǎ qiú, kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: On weekends I go to the park to play with my family. On weekends I can sleep a bit later. On weekends I often read, play ball games, and watch movies.

quote_en: 我住在北岛。 Wǒ zhù zài Běi Dǎo.
quote_zh: I live in the North Island.
ex_en: 我和家人住在一个小房子里。爷爷住在乡下。我们去北京玩的时候住在酒店。 Wǒ hé jiā rén zhù zài yī ge xiǎo fángzi li. Yéye zhù zài xiāngxia. Wǒmen qù Běijīng wán de shíhou zhù zài jiǔdiàn.
ex_zh: My family and I live in a small house. Grandfather lives in the countryside. When we go to Beijing to play, we stay in a hotel.

quote_en: 我在准备考试。 Wǒ zài zhǔnbèi kǎoshì.
quote_zh: I am preparing for the exam.
ex_en: 妈妈在准备晚饭，我在准备明天的书包。我们准备好去公园了吗？准备好了。 Zhǔnbèi hǎo le. Māma zài zhǔnbèi wǎnfàn, wǒ zài zhǔnbèi míngtiān de shūbāo. Wǒmen zhǔnbèi hǎo qù gōngyuán le ma? Zhǔnbèi hǎo le.
ex_zh: Mum is preparing dinner; I am preparing tomorrow's schoolbag. Are we ready to go to the park? We're ready.

quote_en: 我有一辆自行车。 Wǒ yǒu yī liàng zìxíngchē.
ex_en: 每天我骑自行车去学校，只要十分钟。自行车是蓝色的，很漂亮。弟弟还不会骑自行车。 Měitiān wǒ qí zìxíngchē qù xuéxiào, zhǐ yào shí fēn zhōng. Zìxíngchē shì lán sè de, hěn piàoliang. Dìdi hái bù huì qí zìxíngchē.
ex_zh: Every day I ride my bicycle to school; it only takes ten minutes. The bicycle is blue and very beautiful. My younger brother doesn't know how to ride a bicycle yet.

quote_en: 我每天走路去学校。 Wǒ měitiān zǒulù qù xuéxiào.
quote_zh: I walk to school every day.
ex_en: 从我家到车站走路要十分钟。走路对身体好，爸爸每天走路上班。弟弟还小，走路很慢。 Cóng wǒ jiā dào chēzhàn zǒulù yào shí fēn zhōng. Zǒulù duì shēntǐ hǎo, bàba měitiān zǒulù shàngbān. Dìdi hái xiǎo, zǒulù hěn màn.
ex_zh: Walking from my home to the bus stop takes ten minutes. Walking is good for your health; Dad walks to work every day. My younger brother is still small; he walks very slowly.

quote_en: 最近我很好。 Zuìjìn wǒ hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: Recently I have been very well.
ex_en: 最近天气很冷，要多穿衣服。最近我在学中文，进步很快。妈妈最近很忙，每天很晚回家。 Zuìjìn tiānqì hěn lěng, yào duō chuān yīfu. Zuìjìn wǒ zài xué Zhōngwén, jìnbù hěn kuài. Māma zuìjìn hěn máng, měitiān hěn wǎn huíjiā.
ex_zh: Recently the weather has been very cold; you need to wear more clothes. Recently I have been studying Chinese and making fast progress. Mum has been very busy recently, coming home very late every day.

quote_en: 昨天我去公园了。 Zuótiān wǒ qù gōngyuán le.
quote_zh: Yesterday I went to the park.
ex_en: 昨天天气很好，不冷也不热。昨天我和朋友一起打球、吃饭。昨天的功课不难，我很快做完了。 Zuótiān tiānqì hěn hǎo, bù lěng yě bù rè. Zuótiān wǒ hé péngyou yìqǐ dǎ qiú, chī fàn. Zuótiān de gōngkè bù nán, wǒ hěn kuài zuò wán le.
ex_zh: Yesterday the weather was very good, neither cold nor hot. Yesterday my friend and I played ball games and ate together. Yesterday's homework was not hard; I finished it very quickly.

quote_en: 学校在我家左边。 Xuéxiào zài wǒ jiā zuǒ bian.
quote_zh: The school is on the left side of my home.
ex_en: 往左边走是公园，往右边走是商店。我的座位在教室的左边。左手拿杯子，右手写字。 Wǎng zuǒ bian zǒu shì gōngyuán, wǎng yòu bian zǒu shì shāngdiàn. Wǒ de zuòwèi zài jiàoshì de zuǒ bian. Zuǒ shǒu ná bēizi, yòu shǒu xiě zì.
ex_zh: Going left leads to the park; going right leads to the shop. My seat is on the left side of the classroom. The left hand holds the cup; the right hand writes.

quote_en: 请坐。 Qǐng zuò.
ex_en: 我坐在椅子上看书。每天我坐公共汽车去学校。坐飞机去中国要十多个小时。 Zuò zài yǐzi shang kàn shū. Měitiān wǒ zuò gōnggòng qìchē qù xuéxiào. Zuò fēijī qù Zhōngguó yào shí duō ge xiǎoshí.
ex_zh: I sit on a chair and read. Every day I take the bus to school. Taking a plane to China takes more than ten hours.

quote_en: 妈妈在做饭。 Māma zài zuò fàn.
ex_en: 每天我做功课，然后帮妈妈做事情。爸爸会做炒饭，很好吃。我们要做一个好学生。 Měitiān wǒ zuò gōngkè, ránhòu bāng māma zuò shìqing. Bàba huì zuò chǎo fàn, hěn hǎo chī. Wǒmen yào zuò yī ge hǎo xuésheng.
ex_zh: Every day I do my homework, then help Mum with things. Dad can make fried rice; it's very delicious. We must be good students.

quote_en: 我是中国人。 Wǒ shì Zhōngguó rén.
ex_en: 他是我的爸爸，她是我的妈妈，我是他们的孩子。我们是快乐的一家人。 Tā shì wǒ de bàba, tā shì wǒ de māma, wǒ shì tāmen de háizi. Wǒmen shì kuàilè de yī jiā rén.
ex_zh: He is my dad, she is my mum, and I am their child. We are a happy family.

quote_en: 我不喜欢下雨。 Wǒ bù xǐhuan xià yǔ.
ex_en: 今天不冷也不热，但是我不想去公园，因为我要在家做功课。弟弟还不会写字。 Jīntiān bù lěng yě bù rè, dànshì wǒ bù xiǎng qù gōngyuán, yīnwèi wǒ yào zài jiā zuò gōngkè. Dìdi hái bù huì xiě zì.
ex_zh: Today is neither cold nor hot, but I don't want to go to the park because I have to do homework at home. My younger brother still can't write.

def_en: is not, am not, are not
quote_en: 这不是我的书。 Zhè bú shì wǒ de shū.
ex_en: 他不是老师，他是医生。我不是小学生，我是中学生。那不是苹果，那是橘子。 Tā bú shì lǎoshī, tā shì yīshēng. Wǒ bú shì xiǎoxué shēng, wǒ shì zhōngxué shēng. Nà bú shì píngguǒ, nà shì júzi.
ex_zh: He is not a teacher; he is a doctor. I am not a primary school student; I am a secondary school student. That is not an apple; that is an orange.

def_en: is or is not, whether or not
quote_en: 你是不是学生？ Nǐ shì bu shì xuésheng?
quote_zh: Are you a student or not?
ex_en: 你是不是喜欢喝牛奶？我不知道他是不是中国人。今天是不是星期一？是的。 Nǐ shì bu shì xǐhuan hē niúnǎi? Wǒ bù zhīdào tā shì bu shì Zhōngguó rén. Jīntiān shì bu shì xīngqīyī? Shì de.
ex_zh: Do you like drinking milk or not? I don't know whether he is Chinese or not. Is today Monday or not? Yes.

quote_en: 我也喜欢苹果。 Wǒ yě xǐhuan píngguǒ.
ex_en: 爸爸会开车，妈妈也会开车。我去公园，弟弟也去公园。这个苹果很大，那个也很大。 Bàba huì kāi chē, māma yě huì kāi chē. Wǒ qù gōngyuán, dìdi yě qù gōngyuán. Zhè ge píngguǒ hěn dà, nà ge yě hěn dà.
ex_zh: Dad can drive; Mum can also drive. I go to the park; my younger brother also goes to the park. This apple is big; that one is also big.

def_zh: 吃饭还是吃面；去还是不去
quote_en: 你喝茶还是喝咖啡？ Nǐ hē chá háishì hē kāfēi?
quote_zh: Do you drink tea or coffee?
ex_en: 今天是星期三还是星期四？我们去公园还是在家看电视？你喜欢吃苹果还是吃香蕉？ Jīntiān shì xīngqīsān háishì xīngqīsì? Wǒmen qù gōngyuán háishì zài jiā kàn diànshì? Nǐ xǐhuan chī píngguǒ háishì chī xiāngjiāo?
ex_zh: Is today Wednesday or Thursday? Shall we go to the park or watch TV at home? Do you like eating apples or bananas?

quote_en: 我有一只狗。 Wǒ yǒu yī zhī gǒu.
ex_en: 我家有五口人。学校有一个大运动场。你有没有中文书？有，我有一本。 Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén. Xuéxiào yǒu yī ge dà yùndòngchǎng. Nǐ yǒu méiyǒu Zhōngwén shū? Yǒu, wǒ yǒu yī běn.
ex_zh: My family has five people. The school has a big sports field. Do you have a Chinese book? Yes, I have one.

def_en: to not have; there is not
quote_en: 我没有哥哥。 Wǒ méiyǒu gēge.
quote_zh: I don't have an older brother.
ex_en: 今天没有下雨，也没有风。我没有手机，弟弟也没有。教室里没有人。 Jīntiān méiyǒu xià yǔ, yě méiyǒu fēng. Wǒ méiyǒu shǒujī, dìdi yě méiyǒu. Jiàoshì li méiyǒu rén.
ex_zh: Today there is no rain and no wind. I don't have a mobile phone; my younger brother doesn't have one either. There is no one in the classroom.

quote_en: 我和弟弟去公园。 Wǒ hé dìdi qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: My younger brother and I go to the park.
ex_en: 爸爸和妈妈在家看电视。苹果和香蕉都是水果。中文和英文都很有意思。 Bàba hé māma zài jiā kàn diànshì. Píngguǒ hé xiāngjiāo dōu shì shuǐguǒ. Zhōngwén hé Yīngwén dōu hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: Dad and Mum are watching TV at home. Apples and bananas are both fruit. Chinese and English are both very interesting.

quote_en: 我们都喜欢打球。 Wǒmen dōu xǐhuan dǎ qiú.
quote_zh: We all like playing ball games.
ex_en: 我和弟弟都喜欢游泳。她们都是女生。你们都做完功课了吗？都做完了。 Wǒ hé dìdi dōu xǐhuan yóuyǒng. Tāmen dōu shì nǚshēng. Nǐmen dōu zuò wán gōngkè le ma? Dōu zuò wán le.
ex_zh: My younger brother and I both like swimming. They are all girls. Have you all finished your homework? We've all finished.

quote_en: 今天很冷。 Jīntiān hěn lěng.
ex_en: 这个苹果很大，很好吃。我的学校很漂亮，老师很友好。弟弟很小，走路很慢。 Zhè ge píngguǒ hěn dà, hěn hǎo chī. Wǒ de xuéxiào hěn piàoliang, lǎoshī hěn yǒuhǎo. Dìdi hěn xiǎo, zǒulù hěn màn.
ex_zh: This apple is very big and very delicious. My school is very beautiful, and the teacher is very friendly. My younger brother is very small and walks very slowly.

quote_en: 我非常喜欢中文。 Wǒ fēicháng xǐhuan Zhōngwén.
ex_en: 今天天气非常好，不冷不热。妈妈做的饭非常好吃。我非常高兴认识你。 Jīntiān tiānqì fēicháng hǎo, bù lěng bù rè. Māma zuò de fàn fēicháng hǎo chī. Wǒ fēicháng gāoxìng rènshi nǐ.
ex_zh: Today's weather is extremely good, neither cold nor hot. The food Mum cooks is extremely delicious. I am very happy to meet you.

quote_en: 我最喜欢吃苹果。 Wǒ zuì xǐhuan chī píngguǒ.
quote_zh: I like eating apples the most.
ex_en: 这个苹果最大，那个最小。我最喜欢蓝色，弟弟最喜欢红色。谁考得最好？我考得最好。 Zhè ge píngguǒ zuì dà, nà ge zuì xiǎo. Wǒ zuì xǐhuan lán sè, dìdi zuì xǐhuan hóng sè. Shéi kǎo de zuì hǎo? Wǒ kǎo de zuì hǎo.
ex_zh: This apple is the biggest; that one is the smallest. I like blue the most; my younger brother likes red the most. Who did the best on the exam? I did the best.

quote_en: 我们一起去公园吧。 Wǒmen yìqǐ qù gōngyuán ba.
quote_zh: Let's go to the park together.
ex_en: 你休息一下吧。快下雨了，我们回家吧。好吧，我同意。 Nǐ xiūxi yīxià ba. Kuài xià yǔ le, wǒmen huíjiā ba. Hǎo ba, wǒ tóngyì.
ex_zh: Take a rest. It's about to rain; let's go home. Okay, I agree.

quote_en: 这是我的书。 Zhè shì wǒ de shū.
ex_en: 红色的花很好看。爸爸的车是黑色的。妈妈做的饭很好吃。 Hóng sè de huā hěn hǎo kàn. Bàba de chē shì hēi sè de. Māma zuò de fàn hěn hǎo chī.
ex_zh: The red flowers are very beautiful. Dad's car is black. The food Mum makes is very delicious.

quote_en: 他跑得很快。 Tā pǎo de hěn kuài.
ex_en: 妹妹唱得很好听。我写汉字写得不好，要多练习。爸爸开车开得很好。 Mèimei chàng de hěn hǎo tīng. Wǒ xiě Hànzì xiě de bù hǎo, yào duō liànxí. Bàba kāi chē kāi de hěn hǎo.
ex_zh: My younger sister sings very nicely. I don't write Chinese characters well; I need to practice more. Dad drives very well.

quote_en: 我在家。 Wǒ zài jiā.
ex_en: 妈妈在做饭，爸爸在看电视。我在学校学中文。你在哪里？我在公园。 Māma zài zuò fàn, bàba zài kàn diànshì. Wǒ zài xuéxiào xué Zhōngwén. Nǐ zài nǎlǐ? Wǒ zài gōngyuán.
ex_zh: Mum is cooking; Dad is watching TV. I am at school studying Chinese. Where are you? I am at the park.

quote_en: 我去过北京。 Wǒ qù guò Běijīng.
ex_en: 你吃过烤鸭吗？我没有吃过。爷爷看过长城。我看过那部电影。 Nǐ chī guò kǎo yā ma? Wǒ méiyǒu chī guò. Yéye kàn guò Chángchéng. Wǒ kàn guò nèi bù diànyǐng.
ex_zh: Have you ever eaten roast duck? I have not. Grandfather has seen the Great Wall. I have seen that movie.

quote_en: 我想去中国。 Wǒ xiǎng qù Zhōngguó.
quote_zh: I would like to go to China.
ex_en: 你想吃什么？我想吃面条。我在想妈妈说的话。弟弟想去公园玩。 Nǐ xiǎng chī shénme? Wǒ xiǎng chī miàntiáo. Wǒ zài xiǎng māma shuō de huà. Dìdi xiǎng qù gōngyuán wán.
ex_zh: What would you like to eat? I would like noodles. I am thinking about what Mum said. My younger brother would like to go to the park to play.

quote_en: 我要喝水。 Wǒ yào hē shuǐ.
ex_en: 明天要下雨，你要带伞。我们要好好学习。妈妈要我去商店买面包。 Míngtiān yào xià yǔ, nǐ yào dài sǎn. Wǒmen yào hǎohǎo xuéxí. Māma yào wǒ qù shāngdiàn mǎi miànbāo.
ex_zh: It will rain tomorrow; you must bring an umbrella. We must study hard. Mum wants me to go to the shop to buy bread.

quote_en: 我会说中文。 Wǒ huì shuō Zhōngwén.
ex_en: 弟弟会骑自行车。明天我会去学校。妈妈会做炒饭。 Dìdi huì qí zìxíngchē. Míngtiān wǒ huì qù xuéxiào. Māma huì zuò chǎo fàn.
ex_zh: My younger brother can ride a bicycle. I will go to school tomorrow. Mum can make fried rice.

quote_en: 我不会开车。 Wǒ bú huì kāi chē.
ex_en: 妹妹不会写汉字。明天不会下雨。爸爸不会做饭，他会洗碗。 Mèimei bú huì xiě Hànzì. Míngtiān bú huì xià yǔ. Bàba bú huì zuò fàn, tā huì xǐ wǎn.
ex_zh: My younger sister cannot write Chinese characters. It will not rain tomorrow. Dad cannot cook; he can wash dishes.

quote_en: 我可以去公园吗？ Wǒ kěyǐ qù gōngyuán ma?
quote_zh: May I go to the park?
ex_en: 你可以用我的笔。这里不可以大声说话。我可以吃一个苹果吗？可以。 Nǐ kěyǐ yòng wǒ de bǐ. Zhèlǐ bù kěyǐ dà shēng shuōhuà. Wǒ kěyǐ chī yī ge píngguǒ ma? Kěyǐ.
ex_zh: You may use my pen. You cannot talk loudly here. May I eat an apple? Yes.

quote_en: 我想去，可是没时间。 Wǒ xiǎng qù, kěshì méi shíjiān.
quote_zh: I want to go, but I don't have time.
ex_en: 这个苹果很好吃，可是太贵了。天气很好，可是我不舒服。弟弟想去，可是妈妈不让。 Zhè ge píngguǒ hěn hǎo chī, kěshì tài guì le. Tiānqì hěn hǎo, kěshì wǒ bù shūfu. Dìdi xiǎng qù, kěshì māma bù ràng.
ex_zh: This apple is very delicious, but it's too expensive. The weather is good, but I don't feel well. My younger brother wants to go, but Mum won't let him.

quote_en: 我吃了饭。 Wǒ chī le fàn.
ex_en: 下雨了，快回家吧。弟弟长大了。我做完功课了，可以看电视了。 Xià yǔ le, kuài huíjiā ba. Dìdi zhǎng dà le. Wǒ zuò wán gōngkè le, kěyǐ kàn diànshì le.
ex_zh: It's raining; go home quickly. My younger brother has grown up. I have finished my homework, so I can watch TV now.

quote_en: 这个苹果太大了。 Zhè ge píngguǒ tài dà le.
ex_en: 今天太冷了，我不想出门。妈妈太好了，给我买了礼物。弟弟跑得太快了。 Jīntiān tài lěng le, wǒ bù xiǎng chūmén. Māma tài hǎo le, gěi wǒ mǎi le lǐwù. Dìdi pǎo de tài kuài le.
ex_zh: Today is too cold; I don't want to go out. Mum is too good; she bought me a gift. My younger brother runs too fast.

quote_en: 从我家到学校很近。 Cóng wǒ jiā dào xuéxiào hěn jìn.
quote_zh: From my home to school is very close.
ex_en: 从星期一到星期五我上学。从早上八点到下午五点上课。从北京到上海坐火车要五个小时。 Cóng xīngqīyī dào xīngqīwǔ wǒ shàngxué. Cóng zǎoshang bā diǎn dào xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn shàngkè. Cóng Běijīng dào Shànghǎi zuò huǒchē yào wǔ ge xiǎoshí.
ex_zh: From Monday to Friday I go to school. From 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. I have class. From Beijing to Shanghai by train takes five hours.

def_zh: 吃饭的时候；下雨的时候
quote_en: 下雨的时候我不出门。 Xià yǔ de shíhou wǒ bù chūmén.
quote_zh: When it rains, I don't go out.
ex_en: 吃饭的时候不要说话。我小的时候住在北京。上课的时候要认真听老师说话。 Chī fàn de shíhou bù yào shuōhuà. Wǒ xiǎo de shíhou zhù zài Běijīng. Shàngkè de shíhou yào rènzhēn tīng lǎoshī shuōhuà.
ex_zh: Don't talk when eating. When I was little, I lived in Beijing. When in class, you need to listen carefully to the teacher.

quote_en: 运动对身体好。 Yùndòng duì shēntǐ hǎo.
quote_zh: Exercise is good for the body.
ex_en: 妈妈对我很好。老师说读书对学习有用。你对朋友要友好。 Māma duì wǒ hěn hǎo. Lǎoshī shuō dú shū duì xuéxí yǒuyòng. Nǐ duì péngyou yào yǒuhǎo.
ex_zh: Mum is very good to me. The teacher says reading is useful for studying. You should be friendly to friends.

def_zh: 虽然小但是快；虽然累但是开心
quote_en: 虽然下雨，但是我还是去了。 Suīrán xià yǔ, dànshì wǒ háishì qù le.
quote_zh: Although it rained, I still went.
ex_en: 虽然中文很难，但是很有意思。弟弟虽然小，但是跑得很快。虽然很累，但是我很开心。 Suīrán Zhōngwén hěn nán, dànshì hěn yǒu yìsi. Dìdi suīrán xiǎo, dànshì pǎo de hěn kuài. Suīrán hěn lèi, dànshì wǒ hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Although Chinese is very hard, it is very interesting. Although my younger brother is small, he runs very fast. Although I am very tired, I am very happy.

def_zh: 因为下雨所以不去；因为好吃所以多吃
quote_en: 因为下雨，所以我不去公园。 Yīnwèi xià yǔ, suǒyǐ wǒ bù qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: Because it's raining, I am not going to the park.
ex_en: 因为我生病了，所以没去学校。因为中文很难，所以我要多练习。因为妈妈很忙，所以爸爸做饭。 Yīnwèi wǒ shēngbìng le, suǒyǐ méi qù xuéxiào. Yīnwèi Zhōngwén hěn nán, suǒyǐ wǒ yào duō liànxí. Yīnwèi māma hěn máng, suǒyǐ bàba zuò fàn.
ex_zh: Because I was sick, I didn't go to school. Because Chinese is very hard, I need to practice more. Because Mum is very busy, Dad cooks.

def_zh: 先吃饭然后看电视；先写字然后看书
quote_en: 我先做功课，然后看电视。 Wǒ xiān zuò gōngkè, ránhòu kàn diànshì.
quote_zh: First I do homework, then I watch TV.
ex_en: 我先去商店买面包，然后去学校。早上先起床，然后吃早饭。弟弟先洗手，然后吃饭。 Wǒ xiān qù shāngdiàn mǎi miànbāo, ránhòu qù xuéxiào. Zǎoshang xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu chī zǎofàn. Dìdi xiān xǐ shǒu, ránhòu chī fàn.
ex_zh: First I go to the shop to buy bread, then I go to school. In the morning, first get up, then eat breakfast. My younger brother first washes his hands, then eats.

quote_en: 我比你高。 Wǒ bǐ nǐ gāo.
ex_en: 苹果比香蕉好吃。今天比昨天冷。弟弟比我小五岁。 Píngguǒ bǐ xiāngjiāo hǎo chī. Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān lěng. Dìdi bǐ wǒ xiǎo wǔ suì.
ex_zh: Apples are more delicious than bananas. Today is colder than yesterday. My younger brother is five years younger than me.

def_zh: 如果下雨就不去；如果累就休息
quote_en: 如果明天下雨，我就不去公园。 Rúguǒ míngtiān xià yǔ, wǒ jiù bù qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: If it rains tomorrow, then I won't go to the park.
ex_en: 如果你累了，就休息一下。如果好好学习，就能考好。如果妈妈回家，我们就吃饭。 Rúguǒ nǐ lèi le, jiù xiūxi yīxià. Rúguǒ hǎohǎo xuéxí, jiù néng kǎo hǎo. Rúguǒ māma huíjiā, wǒmen jiù chī fàn.
ex_zh: If you are tired, then rest for a while. If you study hard, then you can do well on the exam. If Mum comes home, then we will eat.

quote_en: 我马上就走。 Wǒ mǎshàng jiù zǒu.
ex_en: 如果你来，我就去。吃完饭我就做功课。学校就在我家旁边。 Rúguǒ nǐ lái, wǒ jiù qù. Chī wán fàn wǒ jiù zuò gōngkè. Xuéxiào jiù zài wǒ jiā pángbiān.
ex_zh: If you come, I will go. As soon as I finish eating, I will do homework. The school is right next to my home.

quote_en: 我家离学校很近。 Wǒ jiā lí xuéxiào hěn jìn.
quote_zh: My home is very near the school.
ex_en: 车站离我家很远。北京离新西兰很远。公园离这里很近，走路五分钟。 Chēzhàn lí wǒ jiā hěn yuǎn. Běijīng lí Xīn Xīlán hěn yuǎn. Gōngyuán lí zhèlǐ hěn jìn, zǒulù wǔ fēn zhōng.
ex_zh: The bus stop is very far from my home. Beijing is very far from New Zealand. The park is very near here, a five-minute walk.

quote_en: 吃饭以前要洗手。 Chī fàn yǐqián yào xǐ shǒu.
quote_zh: Before eating, you need to wash your hands.
ex_en: 睡觉以前我喝一杯牛奶。来学校以前我吃了早饭。以前我住在北京。 Shuìjiào yǐqián wǒ hē yī bēi niúnǎi. Lái xuéxiào yǐqián wǒ chī le zǎofàn. Yǐqián wǒ zhù zài Běijīng.
ex_zh: Before sleeping, I drink a glass of milk. Before coming to school, I ate breakfast. Before, I lived in Beijing.

quote_en: 吃饭以后我做功课。 Chī fàn yǐhòu wǒ zuò gōngkè.
ex_en: 放学以后我打球。以后我想去中国。下课以后我们去洗手间。 Fàngxué yǐhòu wǒ dǎ qiú. Yǐhòu wǒ xiǎng qù Zhōngguó. Xiàkè yǐhòu wǒmen qù xǐshǒujiān.
ex_zh: After school, I play ball games. In the future, I want to go to China. After class, we go to the bathroom.

quote_en: 妈妈给我一个苹果。 Māma gěi wǒ yī ge píngguǒ.
ex_en: 我给朋友送了一本书。爸爸给弟弟买了玩具。请给我一杯水。 Wǒ gěi péngyou sòng le yī běn shū. Bàba gěi dìdi mǎi le wánjù. Qǐng gěi wǒ yī bēi shuǐ.
ex_zh: I gave a book to my friend. Dad bought a toy for my younger brother. Please give me a glass of water.

quote_en: 我跟你一起去。 Wǒ gēn nǐ yìqǐ qù.
ex_en: 我跟朋友打球。妈妈跟爸爸说话。弟弟跟妹妹一起看电视。 Wǒ gēn péngyou dǎ qiú. Māma gēn bàba shuōhuà. Dìdi gēn mèimei yìqǐ kàn diànshì.
ex_zh: I play ball games with my friend. Mum talks with Dad. My younger brother and younger sister watch TV together.

quote_en: 请把门打开。 Qǐng bǎ mén dǎkāi.
ex_en: 我把苹果吃了。弟弟把书包放在桌子上。妈妈把衣服洗了。 Wǒ bǎ píngguǒ chī le. Dìdi bǎ shūbāo fàng zài zhuōzi shang. Māma bǎ yīfu xǐ le.
ex_zh: I ate the apple. My younger brother put his schoolbag on the desk. Mum washed the clothes.

def_en: to call; to ask (someone to do)
quote_en: 妈妈叫我回家。 Māma jiào wǒ huíjiā.
quote_zh: Mum called me to come home.
ex_en: 老师叫我回答问题。我叫弟弟起床。爸爸叫我去买牛奶。 Lǎoshī jiào wǒ huídá wèntí. Wǒ jiào dìdi qǐchuáng. Bàba jiào wǒ qù mǎi niúnǎi.
ex_zh: The teacher asked me to answer a question. I called my younger brother to get up. Dad asked me to go buy milk.

quote_en: 妈妈让我看电视。 Māma ràng wǒ kàn diànshì.
ex_en: 老师让我们安静。爸爸不让我玩手机。让弟弟先吃。 Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen ānjìng. Bàba bù ràng wǒ wán shǒujī. Ràng dìdi xiān chī.
ex_zh: The teacher told us to be quiet. Dad doesn't let me play with my mobile phone. Let my younger brother eat first.

quote_en: 苹果被弟弟吃了。 Píngguǒ bèi dìdi chī le.
quote_zh: The apple was eaten by my younger brother.
ex_en: 我的书被妹妹拿走了。窗户被风吹开了。作业被老师收走了。 Wǒ de shū bèi mèimei ná zǒu le. Chuānghu bèi fēng chuī kāi le. Zuòyè bèi lǎoshī shōu zǒu le.
ex_zh: My book was taken away by my younger sister. The window was blown open by the wind. The homework was collected by the teacher.

quote_en: 他还没来。 Tā hái méi lái.
ex_en: 我还想再吃一个苹果。弟弟还在睡觉。我不仅有书，还有笔。 Tā hái méi lái. Wǒ hái xiǎng zài chī yī ge píngguǒ. Dìdi hái zài shuìjiào. Wǒ bùjǐn yǒu shū, hái yǒu bǐ.
ex_zh: He hasn't come yet. I still want to eat one more apple. My younger brother is still sleeping. I not only have books, but also pens.

quote_en: 我只有一个苹果。 Wǒ zhǐ yǒu yī ge píngguǒ.
ex_en: 我只吃米饭，不吃面条。今天只上了两节课。弟弟只喝牛奶，不喝水。 Wǒ zhǐ chī mǐfàn, bù chī miàntiáo. Jīntiān zhǐ shàng le liǎng jié kè. Dìdi zhǐ hē niúnǎi, bù hē shuǐ.
ex_zh: I only eat rice, not noodles. Today I only had two lessons. My younger brother only drinks milk, not water.

quote_en: 我们一起去公园。 Wǒmen yìqǐ qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: We go to the park together.
ex_en: 我和朋友一起做功课。全家人一起吃饭。一起看电影很有意思。 Wǒ hé péngyou yìqǐ zuò gōngkè. Quánjiā rén yìqǐ chī fàn. Yìqǐ kàn diànyǐng hěn yǒu yìsi.
ex_zh: My friend and I do homework together. The whole family eats together. Watching a movie together is very interesting.

quote_en: 一共花了二十块钱。 Yí gòng huā le èrshí kuài qián.
ex_en: 我们家一共五口人。书包里一共有三本书。今天一共上了四节课。 Wǒmen jiā yí gòng wǔ kǒu rén. Shūbāo li yí gòng yǒu sān běn shū. Jīntiān yí gòng shàng le sì jié kè.
ex_zh: Our family has five people in total. There are three books in total in my schoolbag. Today I had four lessons in total.

quote_en: 我有一些苹果。 Wǒ yǒu yì xiē píngguǒ.
ex_en: 教室里有一些学生。妈妈买了一些水果。我想吃一些面包。 Jiàoshì li yǒu yì xiē xuésheng. Māma mǎi le yì xiē shuǐguǒ. Wǒ xiǎng chī yì xiē miànbāo.
ex_zh: There are some students in the classroom. Mum bought some fruit. I want to eat some bread.

quote_en: 今天有点冷。 Jīntiān yǒu diǎn lěng.
quote_zh: Today is a little bit cold.
ex_en: 我有点累了，想休息。弟弟有点不高兴。这个苹果有点小。 Wǒ yǒu diǎn lèi le, xiǎng xiūxi. Dìdi yǒu diǎn bù gāoxìng. Zhè ge píngguǒ yǒu diǎn xiǎo.
ex_zh: I am a little bit tired and want to rest. My younger brother is a little bit unhappy. This apple is a little bit small.

quote_en: 有的人喜欢苹果。 Yǒu de rén xǐhuan píngguǒ.
ex_en: 有的学生喜欢数学，有的喜欢中文。有的地方下雨，有的地方晴天。书里有的字我不认识。 Yǒu de xuésheng xǐhuan shùxué, yǒu de xǐhuan Zhōngwén. Yǒu de dìfang xià yǔ, yǒu de dìfang qíngtiān. Shū li yǒu de zì wǒ bù rènshi.
ex_zh: Some students like maths, some like Chinese. In some places it rains; in some places it's sunny. I don't recognize some characters in the book.

quote_en: 有时候我去公园。 Yǒu shíhou wǒ qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: Sometimes I go to the park.
ex_en: 有时候天气很热，有时候很冷。妈妈有时候开车，有时候走路。弟弟有时候哭，有时候笑。 Yǒu shíhou tiānqì hěn rè, yǒu shíhou hěn lěng. Māma yǒu shíhou kāi chē, yǒu shíhou zǒulù. Dìdi yǒu shíhou kū, yǒu shíhou xiào.
ex_zh: Sometimes the weather is very hot, sometimes very cold. Sometimes Mum drives, sometimes she walks. Sometimes my younger brother cries, sometimes he laughs.

quote_en: 你喝茶还是咖啡？ Nǐ hē chá háishì kāfēi?
quote_zh: Do you drink tea or coffee?
ex_en: 今天是星期一还是星期二？去公园还是在家？他还是不来了？ Jīntiān shì xīngqīyī háishì xīngqī'èr? Qù gōngyuán háishì zài jiā? Tā háishì bù lái le?
ex_zh: Is today Monday or Tuesday? Go to the park or stay home? He still isn't coming?

quote_en: 我想去，但是没时间。 Wǒ xiǎng qù, dànshì méi shíjiān.
quote_zh: I want to go, but I don't have time.
ex_en: 中文很难，但是很有意思。苹果很好吃，但是太贵了。天气很好，但是我不舒服。 Zhōngwén hěn nán, dànshì hěn yǒu yìsi. Píngguǒ hěn hǎo chī, dànshì tài guì le. Tiānqì hěn hǎo, dànshì wǒ bù shūfu.
ex_zh: Chinese is very hard, but it's very interesting. Apples are very delicious, but they're too expensive. The weather is good, but I don't feel well.

quote_en: 下雨了，所以我不去公园。 Xià yǔ le, suǒyǐ wǒ bù qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: It's raining, so I'm not going to the park.
ex_en: 我生病了，所以没去学校。中文很难，所以我要多练习。妈妈很忙，所以爸爸做饭。 Wǒ shēngbìng le, suǒyǐ méi qù xuéxiào. Zhōngwén hěn nán, suǒyǐ wǒ yào duō liànxí. Māma hěn máng, suǒyǐ bàba zuò fàn.
ex_zh: I was sick, so I didn't go to school. Chinese is very hard, so I need to practice more. Mum is very busy, so Dad cooks.

quote_en: 因为下雨，我不去公园。 Yīnwèi xià yǔ, wǒ bù qù gōngyuán.
quote_zh: Because it's raining, I'm not going to the park.
ex_en: 因为生病，所以没上学。因为中文有意思，所以我想学。因为妈妈回家了，所以我们吃饭。 Yīnwèi shēngbìng, suǒyǐ méi shàngxué. Yīnwèi Zhōngwén yǒu yìsi, suǒyǐ wǒ xiǎng xué. Yīnwèi māma huíjiā le, suǒyǐ wǒmen chī fàn.
ex_zh: Because I was sick, I didn't go to school. Because Chinese is interesting, I want to learn it. Because Mum came home, we are eating.

quote_en: 如果下雨，我就不去。 Rúguǒ xià yǔ, wǒ jiù bù qù.
quote_zh: If it rains, I won't go.
ex_en: 如果你累了，就休息。如果好好学习，就能考好。如果妈妈回来，我们就吃饭。 Rúguǒ nǐ lèi le, jiù xiūxi. Rúguǒ hǎohǎo xuéxí, jiù néng kǎo hǎo. Rúguǒ māma huílái, wǒmen jiù chī fàn.
ex_zh: If you are tired, then rest. If you study hard, then you can do well on the exam. If Mum comes back, then we will eat.

quote_en: 虽然下雨，我还是去了。 Suīrán xià yǔ, wǒ háishì qù le.
quote_zh: Although it rained, I still went.
ex_en: 虽然中文很难，但是很有意思。弟弟虽然小，但是跑得快。虽然很累，但是我很开心。 Suīrán Zhōngwén hěn nán, dànshì hěn yǒu yìsi. Dìdi suīrán xiǎo, dànshì pǎo de kuài. Suīrán hěn lèi, dànshì wǒ hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Although Chinese is very hard, it is very interesting. Although my younger brother is small, he runs fast. Although I am very tired, I am very happy.

quote_en: 我先做功课，然后看电视。 Wǒ xiān zuò gōngkè, ránhòu kàn diànshì.
quote_zh: First I do homework, then I watch TV.
ex_en: 我先洗手，然后吃饭。去商店买面包，然后去学校。早上起床，然后吃早饭。 Wǒ xiān xǐ shǒu, ránhòu chī fàn. Qù shāngdiàn mǎi miànbāo, ránhòu qù xuéxiào. Zǎoshang qǐchuáng, ránhòu chī zǎofàn.
ex_zh: First I wash my hands, then I eat. Go to the shop to buy bread, then go to school. In the morning get up, then eat breakfast.

quote_en: 我先做功课。 Wǒ xiān zuò gōngkè.
ex_en: 先洗手，再吃饭。你先走，我马上来。先学汉字，再写句子。 Xiān xǐ shǒu, zài chī fàn. Nǐ xiān zǒu, wǒ mǎshàng lái. Xiān xué Hànzì, zài xiě jùzi.
ex_zh: First wash your hands, then eat. You go first; I'll come right away. First learn Chinese characters, then write sentences.

quote_en: 放学以后我打球。 Fàngxué yǐhòu wǒ dǎ qiú.
quote_zh: After school I play ball games.
ex_en: 吃饭以后我做功课。以后我想去中国。下课以后我们去洗手间。 Chī fàn yǐhòu wǒ zuò gōngkè. Yǐhòu wǒ xiǎng qù Zhōngguó. Xiàkè yǐhòu wǒmen qù xǐshǒujiān.
ex_zh: After eating I do homework. In the future I want to go to China. After class we go to the bathroom.

quote_en: 吃饭以前要洗手。 Chī fàn yǐqián yào xǐ shǒu.
quote_zh: Before eating, you need to wash your hands.
ex_en: 睡觉以前我喝牛奶。来学校以前我吃了早饭。以前我住在北京。 Shuìjiào yǐqián wǒ hē niúnǎi. Lái xuéxiào yǐqián wǒ chī le zǎofàn. Yǐqián wǒ zhù zài Běijīng.
ex_zh: Before sleeping, I drink milk. Before coming to school, I ate breakfast. Before, I lived in Beijing.

quote_en: 请等我一下。 Qǐng děng wǒ yīxià.
quote_zh: Please wait for me a moment.
ex_en: 我在车站等车。妈妈在门口等我。别等了，他今天不来了。 Wǒ zài chēzhàn děng chē. Māma zài ménkǒu děng wǒ. Bié děng le, tā jīntiān bù lái le.
ex_zh: I wait for the bus at the bus stop. Mum waits for me at the door. Don't wait; he's not coming today.
